# Resonance Dream IDEAS ‚Äî living queue

Each idea has a status (`queued` / `in-progress` / `demoable` / `polished` / `dead`),
a slug (becomes the route `/dream/<n>-<slug>`), and a spec terse enough for
the Dream Agent to build from. Add new ideas to the bottom; promote
items by editing status in place.

The agent appends new ideas here from research cycles. Karel adds ideas
via Claude Code conversation; assistant transcribes into this file.

---

## ¬ß659 ‚Äî banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 659, 2026-07-04) ‚Äî both FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-659/`, `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ¬∑ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal explorers answering the loud 2026-07-04 jury (bright / real-world / non-physics), none using a banned tag. Shipped `1161-flight-choir` (live ADS-B air-traffic sonified over a bright daylight world-map ‚Äî the real-world-data lane, jury #5, highest ambition [4/5, grep-0√ó aircraft data source]). The two below lost on ambition/territory, not quality. Resurrect at a fresh number (their folders were `rm -rf`'d after backup; renumber on revival ‚Äî max committed folder after this fire = 1161).**

### ‚≠ê `1162-loom-of-hours` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî TOP RESURRECT (ship the next real-piano / bright-textile cycle ‚Äî honors the jury's explicit 1155 praise: "use Karel's real Path music")
**Karel's REAL "Welcome Home" solo piano woven into a living bright textile as it plays ‚Äî every note a weft thread, the whole track a finished tapestry.** The jury named 1155-crucible a standout precisely for using his real piano + being bright; this is the same mandate in a NON-physics register. **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-659/1162-loom-of-hours/`):** `audio.ts` = 3-tier loader (real recording `549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` via read-only `GET /api/audio/<id>`, both response shapes, 8s abort ‚Üí dropped file ‚Üí offline-rendered piano arpeggio fallback) + `source‚Üídry+convolver‚Üícomp/limiter‚Üíanalyser` graph exposing RMS/flux/centroid; `loom.ts` = `mulberry32` + centroid‚Üíbright-hue palette + adaptive `OnsetDetector` + `LoomWeaver` (warp columns, incremental weft rows on an offscreen buffer, `(column+row)`-parity over/under interlace so it reads as CLOTH not stripes, scroll-when-full, idle warp shimmer, edge glow); `page.tsx` = bright ivory loom, gesture-gated, source chip (emerald/violet/amber). **Mapping:** onset (spectral flux)‚Üíadvance one weft row ¬∑ centroid‚Üíthread hue (deep terracotta‚Üípale gold/sky) ¬∑ RMS‚Üíweft thickness + lit-warp density. **Named refs:** Anni Albers / Bauhaus weaving; Jacquard loom as proto-computer; textile-as-code. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [real-audio decode + onset/spectral analysis + generative plain-weave renderer + reverb/limiter] + #3 named ref). **Why banked not shipped:** lower ambition floor (2/5 vs winner's 4/5) and "visualize Karel's piano" sits nearer the lab's existing paint/tapestry territory; the real-world-data lane was the louder unfilled jury gap this fire. **Honest gap:** onset‚âÝpolyphonic transcription (dense pedalled passages merge to thicker rows); centroid‚Üíhue tuned for solo piano; no export of the finished cloth. **Ship next real-piano/bright-textile slot.**

### `1163-answer-song` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî the live-performance call-and-response lane (resurrect on a mic / live-duet slot)
**Sing a short phrase; a warm bright choir sings an ANSWER back ‚Äî a turn-taking generative duet you also SEE (your coral‚Üígold ribbon vs the answer's sky‚Üíviolet ribbon).** Live-performance fitness (Karel #3) + audio-first-leaning (jury #4). **Build (done, scratchpad `dream-losers-659/1163-answer-song/`):** `listen.ts` = from-scratch **NSDF/McLeod pitch detector** (key-maxima peak-pick + parabolic interp, 80‚Äì1000 Hz, clarity gate) + `PhraseSegmenter` (quantize to C-major-pentatonic, ~650ms silence = phrase end); `respond.ts` = `generateAnswer()` (transpose/invert/**Continuator-style interval-Markov continue**/develop in scale-index space + cadential tonic resolution + anti-echo guard + evolving 8-phrase memory, deterministic mulberry32) + `ChoirEngine` (detuned choir, thirds harmony, procedural convolver reverb, limiter); `viz.ts` = bright two-ribbon dialogue canvas; `page.tsx` = mic path + always-visible QWERTY/on-screen keyboard fallback, phase machine idle‚Üílistening‚Üíthinking‚Üíanswering. **Named refs:** Pachet *Continuator*; call-and-response / antiphon; McLeod & Wyvill NSDF. **Ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why banked:** pitch-detection + mic pieces are well-trodden in the lab (not grep-0√ó); the "answer not echo" is the fresh bit but ambition tops at 2/5. **Honest gap:** entirely code-verified ‚Äî NSDF detector, segmenter thresholds, answer musicality all reasoned headless, not ear-tested; octave-doubling risk near 1kHz; keyboard fallback has fixed durations. **Resurrect on a mic/live-duet slot** ‚Äî the cleanest next step is a real hardware pitch-tune pass.

## ¬ß658 ‚Äî banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 658, 2026-07-04) ‚Äî both FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-658/`, `tsc`+folder-eslint clean ¬∑ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**WIDE fire: 3 orthogonal embodied/world explorers, all bright/high-key Canvas2D, each answering a different 2026-07-04 jury 0√ó lane. Shipped `1160-body-choir` (camera-motion choir ‚Äî the jury's loudest gap [embodiment] + love-converged). The two below lost on sequencing, not quality ‚Äî each answers a DIFFERENT jury provocation and is ready to ship on its lane. ### ‚≠ê `1161-seismic-song` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî TOP RESURRECT (ship the next real-world-data / non-physics cycle ‚Äî directly answers jury 2026-07-04 provocation #5)
**The last 24 hours of the entire Earth's earthquakes, as music, over a bright daylight world-map.** Answers the jury's "build about something other than physics ‚Äî sonify the real world, so the piece is *about* something other than a Hamiltonian" ‚Äî a 0√ó lane. **Build (already done, in scratchpad `dream-losers-658/1161-seismic-song/`):** `seismic-data.ts` = robust USGS `all_day.geojson` parser (**live, CORS-open, keyless** ‚Äî fetched client-side, NO API route) + a **mandatory embedded ~30-quake fallback snapshot** so it always plays + mulberry32 + equirectangular projection + low-poly continent outlines + bright magnitude color scale; `seismic-audio.ts` = `SeismicAudio` ‚Äî an inharmonic bell/gong voice pool where **mag‚Üípitch (62Hz great-quake gong ‚Üí 660Hz micro-chime) + loudness + decay-length**, **depth‚Üílowpass timbre (shallow bright, deep muffled)**, **lon‚Üístereo pan**, **lat‚Üíoctave lift**, over a slow A1/E2 drone pad, through a shared convolver reverb + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; `page.tsx` = bright Canvas2D map (pale-blue ocean, warm-sand continents, graticule), an ~84s playhead sweeping the 24h window, each quake blooming as a magnitude-sized/colored ripple, live legend (time/mag/depth/place), emerald "N live quakes" / amber "sample data" status chips. **Named refs:** "Sounds of Seismic (SoS)" *Electronica Earthwork* (sos.allshookup.org); Sarah Smith, earthquake sonification at Stanford CCRMA. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 real-world-data sonification grep-0√ó + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems [live fetch + parse + sonification engine + map viz + fallback] + #3 named refs). **Why banked not shipped (sequencing):** the fire's flagship priority was the jury's *loudest* gap (embodiment) + the love convergence on camera; this answers a *different* (also 0√ó, also strong) lane, so it's the cleanest TOP resurrect ‚Äî ship it next non-physics cycle. **Honest gap:** voice balance / reverb / pitch-range designed but not ear-tuned (headless); a real CORS check against the live feed in prod is worth a glance (the fallback guarantees it plays regardless).

### `1162-key-garden` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST Web MIDI integration (resurrect on a MIDI / live-performance lane)
**A sunlit generative garden played by a MIDI keyboard, your computer keys, or an on-screen piano.** Answers the jury's named MIDI 0√ó lane (provocation #3). **Build (already done, in scratchpad `dream-losers-658/1162-key-garden/`):** `page.tsx` = three input paths ‚Äî **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, note-on/off, device-name readout) + **QWERTY** tracker-piano (`A S D F G H J K` white, `W E T Y U` sharps, `Z`/`X` octave) + on-screen mini-piano ‚Äî idle meadow swaying on mount, live readout, full teardown (`input.onmidimessage=null`); `audio.ts` = `GardenAudio` polyphonic plucked/belled synth (detuned tri+sine, velocity‚Üíamplitude+brightness, 16-voice stealing) through offline-rendered reverb + compressor; `garden.ts` = high-key daylit scene (sky+sun+meadow), per-note plants (**pitch‚Üíx + pitch-class‚Üíbright spring hue**, **velocity‚Üíthickness/height**, **held‚Üígrowth**, **released‚Üífade-to-meadow**), mulberry32 per-plant jitter. **Named ref:** Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton* (2005) / *Tenori-on*; L-system generative botany (Lindenmayer). **Ambition 3/5** (#1 Web MIDI grep-0√ó + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named ref). **Why banked second:** genuine lab-first Web MIDI, but its *real* demo path is QWERTY (least *embodied* in practice ‚Äî most reviewers have no MIDI keyboard), and generative-botany viz is nearest the lab's prior paint/kids territory, so it's the least-diverse of the three despite the novel input. **Honest gap:** QWERTY/on-screen path is code-verified; the actual MIDI-hardware path + sound are unverified (no device, headless).

## ¬ß657 ‚Äî banked DEEP non-winner (cycle 657, 2026-07-04) ‚Äî FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-657/`, `tsc`+eslint clean ¬∑ NOT committed (non-winner rule)

**DEEP fire: ONE concept ‚Äî fly forever through an infinite gyroid "impossible cathedral" ‚Äî raced via 2 parallel RENDERING approaches. Shipped `1158-gyroid-cathedral` (the from-scratch marching-cubes MESH ‚Äî it won on the diversity audit [three.js meshed geometry is only 3√ó in the last 10 shipped, whereas raw-WebGL2-fragment output is 6√ó = over-represented = banned this cycle, and 1159 uses exactly that banned output], on the higher novel-technique ambition claim [marching cubes is a genuine lab-first algorithm; raymarching is NOT novel ‚Äî 1148 already raymarched], and on mechanism legibility [you see the actual gyroid surface]). The sibling below was built complete + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit`/folder-lint 0, backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d. Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1160.**

### ‚≠ê `1159-gyroid-lightfall` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî TOP RESURRECT (the "cathedral of LIGHT" ‚Äî resurrect as a render-mode toggle on 1158, or when a fragment-shader lane is explicitly due)
**The SAME infinite gyroid, but rendered as a raymarched *luminous volume* instead of a solid mesh ‚Äî a "cathedral of dissolving light."** A single WebGL2 fragment shader (full-screen triangle, no three.js) volumetrically front-to-back marches the analytic gyroid `dot(sin p, cos p.yzx)`, accumulating emission/absorption around a soft density band `dens = 1 ‚àí smoothstep(0, band, |g ‚àí iso|)` so the walls *glow* rather than read as stone; analytic gradient (shared sin/cos) drives a violet‚Üîteal thin-film shift by normal ¬∑ Fresnel ¬∑ depth, with an ACES-ish tone map + sRGB so the accumulated glow never full-screen flashes. Infinite world-space camera advance + pointer-drag steer; `iso` drifts slowly for a dissolving feel. Same audio as 1158 (JI chord over A1, gradient-magnitude-driven lowpass, convolution reverb, limiter). **Files preserved in scratchpad `dream-losers-657/1159-gyroid-lightfall/`:** `page.tsx` (WebGL2 renderer + HUD + fallbacks), `shaders.ts` (the raymarch GLSL), `gyroid.ts` (JS field+gradient for audio), `audio.ts`, `README.md`. **Why banked not shipped (sequencing, not weakness):** it's arguably the *more transporting* of the two (soft dissolving light vs crisp stone ‚Äî the immersion lens that won 1142/1148), BUT (a) its raw-WebGL2-fragment output is the over-represented modality this window (6√ó in last 10 ‚Äî the diversity hard-gate), and (b) raymarching is not novel-to-lab (1148), so its ambition floor is a notch below the mesh's marching-cubes lab-first. **The cleanest resurrect is as a "solid ‚Üî light" render-mode toggle grafted onto 1158** ‚Äî both are aesthetics of the one gyroid field, a real cycle-2 deepening (mirrors the 1153/1154 "lines‚Üîcondensate" pattern). **Named refs:** Schoen 1970; Schwarz P/D; gyroid acoustic crystal PMC9951337; Callophrys rubi; arXiv 2512.18308 (Dec 2025); √ç√±igo Qu√≠lez / Shadertoy distance-field lineage. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 ¬ß657 research). **SAFETY-compliant** (tone-mapped, no strobe, reduced-motion lowers steps). **Nit:** glow/absorption/band constants tuned blind (no live display) ‚Äî want a nudge on resurrect; fixed-step (not sphere-traced) so thin edge-on walls can shimmer slightly (hidden by the soft band + dither).

## ¬ß656 ‚Äî banked WIDE non-winners (cycle 656, 2026-07-04) ‚Äî both FULLY BUILT in scratchpad `dream-losers-656/`, `tsc`+eslint clean

### ‚≠ê `1156-gyroid-cathedral` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî TOP RESURRECT (ship the next cosmic-ambient / passive-immersion lane)
**The most *transporting* piece the lab has made in weeks ‚Äî a genuinely fresh domain.** Fly through an INFINITE **gyroid** ‚Äî Alan Schoen's triply-periodic minimal surface (NASA, 1970), implicit `sin x¬∑cos y + sin y¬∑cos z + sin z¬∑cos x = t`. Space-filling + periodic ‚Üí an endless labyrinthine "impossible cathedral" that reads exactly like DMT/mystical architecture. **Build (already done, in scratchpad):** `gyroid.ts` = blended TPMS field (gyroid ‚Üî Schwarz-P `cos x+cos y+cos z=t` ‚Üî Schwarz-D) + analytic gradient + a **from-scratch marching-cubes** polygoniser (full 256-case edge/tri tables, NO three addons); `scene.ts` = marches one 2œÄ chunk, instances it on a 5√ó5√ó5 lattice that **re-centres on the camera each frame** for seamless infinite flight (one draw call for all 125 instances), `MeshPhysicalMaterial` with real thin-film **iridescence** + teal-cyan **fresnel rim** via `onBeforeCompile`, exp fog, drag-steer; `audio.ts` = geometry-sampled cavernous **drone** (local field/gradient/curvature ‚Üí lowpass cutoff + just-intonation chord over A1 + convolution reverb). Iridescent violet-teal on near-black. **Why it's the fresh domain:** `gyroid`/`minimal surface`/`triply periodic` all grep-0√ó. **Named refs:** Alan Schoen (gyroid, NASA TN D-5541, 1970); Hermann Schwarz (P/D surfaces); gyroid **acoustic crystal** topological-sound (PMC9951337, 2023 ‚Äî grounds geometry‚Üídrone as real physics); butterfly-wing gyroid photonics (Callophrys rubi); arXiv **2512.18308** (Dec 2025, new chiral gyrating-surface family). **Diversity:** three.js meshed geometry OUTPUT (deliberately NOT a raymarch fragment shader ‚Äî dodges the banned raw-WebGL2-fragment). **Ambition 4/5.** **Resurrect:** ship standalone as the cosmic-ambient calm ship; perf note ‚Äî the ~160 ms re-march allocates fresh Float32Arrays (GC pressure), drops to 30¬≥ under reduced-motion; a human-GPU frame-rate check is the one thing unverifiable headless.

### `1157-scalogram-veil` ‚Äî `queued` ‚Äî resurrect for a fresh-audio-analysis / meditative lane
**Your voice through a WAVELET instead of an FFT.** Live mic ‚Üí a real **continuous wavelet transform (Morlet)** ‚Äî scale-adaptive windows give crisp time resolution on transients the FFT smears. Sing/hum/whistle and watch a **scalogram** bloom as a three.js scrolling **3D scale-terrain** (time in depth, scale/pitch across, magnitude as height + ice-teal‚Üíwhite emissive on `#04070f`), with a pitch readout, a ridge sonifier, and an optional faint FFT-overlay that makes the wavelet's sharper transients legible. **Build (done, scratchpad):** `cwt.ts` = radix-2 FFT + bank of 72 L2-normalised Morlet filters evaluated in the frequency domain (scale‚Üîfreq `a = œâ0¬∑fs/(2œÄ¬∑f)`, œâ0‚âà5‚Äì6); `mic.ts` = getUserMedia + box-filter decimation to ~16 kHz, no mic monitor (feedback-safe), generated-arpeggio fallback if mic denied, ridge sonify, limiter; `page.tsx` = three.js `BufferGeometry` terrain (220√ó72 verts, history ring). **Fresh:** `wavelet`/`scalogram` grep-0√ó (the lab is all-FFT). **Named refs:** Grossmann & Morlet (CWT, 1984); Morlet/Gabor wavelet. **Ambition 3/5.** **Resurrect note:** wants a human-ears mic-gain/gamma tuning pass + check box-filter aliasing near ~8 kHz; ~128 ms analysis latency (fine for a meditative visualiser, not tight rhythmic feedback).

## ¬ß655 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-07-04 (cycle 655 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **DEEP** ‚Äî ONE novel concept, *stir a superfluid: quantized vortex filaments carry Kelvin waves and fire sonified reconnection bursts*, raced via 2 parallel three.js-true-3D **rendering** approaches of the SAME LIA-vortex engine; shipped `1153-vortex-filaments` (the crisp glowing-line render, INTENSE pole ‚Äî it won on breaking the recent cosmic-ambient run, on **mechanism legibility** [you literally see the discrete quantized vortices, Kelvin-wave ripples and reconnection glints ‚Äî the "huh, I didn't know we could do that" surprise is sharpest as crisp lines], and on being the fresher OUTPUT vs the lab's already-heavy particle/point-cloud territory). The sibling below was **built complete** + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 / folder-eslint `--max-warnings=0` 0, backed up to scratchpad `dream-losers-655/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1155.**)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1154-vortex-condensate` ‚Äî the SAME superfluid LIA-vortex engine rendered as a soft **Anadol-style volumetric particle glow** (active pointer-STIR INPUT ¬∑ **three.js ~26k additive `THREE.Points` tracer condensate** OUTPUT ¬∑ pale-cyan/white/faint-violet mist on near-black ¬∑ **cosmic-ambient/meditative** pole) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect as the **calm sibling / a render-mode toggle on 1153**. Same physics (LIA binormal-curvature filaments + Kelvin-wave seeding + 2025 reconnection-asymmetry bursts), but ~26k tracer particles are *bound* to hidden vortex cores so the mist's brightest threads REVEAL the quantized vortices you never draw directly; reconnections bloom locally and ring soft pentatonic bells through a feedback-delay tail (long reverberant, boundless). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** it was a genuinely strong, more *transporting* build (the immersion lens that won 1142/1148) ‚Äî but its POLE (cosmic-ambient) repeats the last two ships (1148, 1152), its soft mist *softens* the novel-physics read that is this concept's whole surprise, and dense additive point-clouds are the lab's most-trodden particle territory; 1153's crisp lines diversify pole + output + maximise mechanism legibility. **The cleanest resurrect is as a "lines ‚Üî condensate" toggle grafted onto 1153** (both are aesthetics of the one accreting vortex field) ‚Äî a real cycle-2 deepening rather than a standalone. Files preserved in scratchpad: `physics.ts` (LIA field, Kelvin seeding, stir, reconnection), `scene.ts` (tracer/core point clouds + soft-sprite `ShaderMaterial` + cursor unproject), `audio.ts` (drone + bells + feedback-delay tail + limiter), `page.tsx`, `README.md`. **NAMED REFS:** Feynman (1955); Da Rios/LIA (1906); Kelvin (1880); arXiv 2607.00821 (2026); 2025 reconnection law; Refik Anadol (volumetric glow). **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 superfluid-LIA novel-to-lab + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 ¬ß655 research). **SAFETY-compliant** (localized blooms, ‚â§0.05 Hz global drift, no strobe). **Known nit:** particle `uSize`/brightness constants were tuned blind (no live display) ‚Äî may want a nudge on resurrect.

## ¬ß654 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-04 (cycle 654 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers spanning slider/tilt/inverted-mic INPUT √ó form-constant-shader / three.js-tunnel / silence-mandala TECHNIQUE √ó electric-neon / deep-ocean-cool / deep-violet PALETTE √ó intense/cosmic/meditative POLE, all dodging every 2026-07-03 jury ban; shipped `1152-anechoic-veil` (the inverted-mic "instrument is your stillness" surprise ‚Äî it won on being the literal answer to the jury's "surprise it / build the thing no jury asked for / payoff NOT a trick of your cortex" meta-ask + filling the thin conceptual/critical lane + breaking the audio-reactive monoculture at the concept level). The two below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit`/folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1153.** Both dodge every 2026-07-03 jury ban.)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1150-halluci-atlas` ‚Äî the 2026 six MEASURED dimensions of hallucination as the sliders of a form-constant field (active 6-slider + pointer-drag INPUT ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 log-polar form-constant field** OUTPUT ¬∑ **saturated electric-neon on near-black** (magenta/cyan/violet/lime) ¬∑ **intense**) ‚Äî `queued`, **SHIP THIS on the next intense/electric GPU cycle ‚Äî now DEFERRED TWICE** (banked ‚≠ê at ¬ß650 as `1141`, again here). The intense pole has cooled (last ships cosmic-ambient), so it is genuinely due.
- **The question:** what if the six MEASURED axes of a visual hallucination were six live sliders? Six labelled sliders = the 6D-VHQ axes (geometric‚Üîsemantic complexity ¬∑ fine-structure detail ¬∑ vividness/saturation ¬∑ entropy/chaos ¬∑ focality‚Üîspread ¬∑ motion/flow) + a Kl√ºver form-constant selector (tunnel/spoke/spiral/honeycomb). Push the axes ‚Üí the field morphs from a sparse lattice to a dense electric-neon bloom; you traverse the measured hallucination space.
- **Exercises the load-bearing shared psych infra the mandate wants used:** `_shared/psych/logpolar` (`LOGPOLAR_GLSL` exp()-warp + `FORM_CONSTANTS`/`FORM_LABEL`) for the retina‚ÜíV1 map; `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (`createSafeFlicker` ‚â§3 Hz opt-in off-by-default + `prefersReducedMotion`) for the pulse; `_shared/psych/droneBank` (`startDroneBank`) + `convolutionVoid` (`createVoidReverb`) for the axis-driven bed.
- **Built complete this fire (all builder-verified `tsc`/`eslint` 0):** `page.tsx` (WebGL2 guard + 6 sliders + form selector + opt-in ‚â§3 Hz safe-pulse toggle + pointer-drag core + full `loseContext`/`close()`/`kill()` teardown), `shaders.ts` (GLSL injecting `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` + fbm value-noise domain-warp + electric-neon cosine palette), `field2d.ts` (Canvas2D downscaled fallback mirroring the shared `screenToCortex`/`formConstant`/`honeycomb` math ‚Äî never blank), `audio.ts` (`startDroneBank` + detuned shimmer + filtered noise band ‚Üí `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí limiter, all axis-driven), `types.ts` (`Axes` + `mulberry32`), `README.md`.
- **Why de-selected (not weakness):** it was the strongest/safest build and the jury-mandated electric-neon palette + love-aligned ‚Äî but form-constant fields are the lab's **most-trodden** psychedelic ground, and shipping it would be *cashing* the jury's own surfaced idea rather than the "surprise it" mandate; 1152's inversion is the thing no jury asked for. **Minor known edge:** the builder read `prefersReducedMotion()` in a `useState` initializer (harmless SSR/first-render divergence) ‚Äî trivially moved into the mount `useEffect` on resurrect. **NAMED REFS:** 6D-VHQ (2026); bioRxiv 2026.02.18 (strobe form-constant CV map); Kl√ºver (form constants, 1926); Bressloff & Cowan (cortical model, 2001). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 the 6D-VHQ 2026 research as the six axes; NO #1 ‚Äî log-polar engine is shared/pre-existing). **SAFETY-compliant** (SafeFlicker, no hard strobe). Rebuild from this spec / the `rm -rf`'d folder at ‚â•1153.

### `1151-tilt-descent` ‚Äî TILT your phone to descend a non-Euclidean tunnel toward a distant light (**device-tilt gyroscope + pointer-drag** INPUT ¬∑ **true-3D three.js** navigable receding tunnel OUTPUT ¬∑ **deep-ocean-cool indigo‚Üíteal‚Üípale-cyan** ¬∑ **cosmic-ambient** ¬∑ NDE tunnel-toward-light) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect **with a caveat** (see below), phone-first. A curved tube of receding luminous rings + lattice spokes scrolls toward the camera on a wrap buffer with a `tanh` hyperbolic warp; you steer by tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()` on the Start gesture) or pointer-drag fallback; the far end brightens toward a core being-of-light; an HRTF `PannerNode` at the core pans the drone as you bank, with a SAFE ~0.7 Hz **audio-only** isochronic shimmer (grounded in the ¬ß654 AVE dive ‚Äî visual stays smooth luminance drift). Built complete (`page.tsx` + `scene.ts` + `audio.ts` + `prng.ts` + `README.md`), builder-verified `tsc`/`eslint` 0, full three.js `dispose()`+`forceContextLoss()` teardown, reduced-motion honored.
- **Why de-selected ‚Äî a real diversity strike:** its NDE tunnel-toward-the-light theme **collides directly with yesterday's `1148-light-accretion`** (also an NDE tunnel-toward-a-being-of-light, cosmic-ambient). ### `1147-breath-break` ‚Äî breath-HOLD as the DMT-BREAKTHROUGH trigger (breath via **microphone RMS + breath-hold detector** INPUT ¬∑ **WebGL2 log-polar form-constant field** OUTPUT ¬∑ **saturated DMT-neon / iridescent jeweled** ¬∑ **intense** ¬∑ DMT breakthrough) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect for an intense breath-driven lane. ### `1139-chrono-lattice` ‚Äî psychedelic TIME-dilation ("the stretched present") as pure data (active drag + keyboard INPUT ¬∑ **Canvas2D hard-edged Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT ¬∑ **pure Ikeda monochrome** ‚Äî `#050505` + near-white + one electric-cyan `#00e5ff` ¬∑ **cerebral-sublime**) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when a cerebral / Ikeda-monochrome / non-immersion lane is due (the freshest palette the window still lacks after 1140)
- **One question:** what if you could FEEL psychedelic time-dilation ‚Äî a single moment stretching toward eternity, then snapping back ‚Äî rendered as precise data rather than swirl? Two clocks run side-by-side: **OBJ** (real wall time, never bends) and **SUBJ** (a warped grid clock at 1/dilation that drives both the lattice AND a pure-sine metronome). Drag up ‚Üí dilation deepens: born-ticks spread apart (the lattice thins toward one held instant, Wittmann's *stretched present*), the metronome slows in lock-step, a sub-sine sags in pitch; the gap **DEBT = OBJ‚àíSUBJ** + a Shannon **tick-entropy** read out on right-edge sparklines. Release ‚Üí cadence snaps home. Files (all builder-verified `tsc`/`eslint` 0): `warpClock.ts` (deterministic dual-clock + born-tick detection + entropy ring + mulberry32 idle drift), `audioEngine.ts` (Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler firing sine ticks quantised to the warping grid, bar accents, pitch-bend sub-sine, limiter, fade-and-`close()`), `latticeRenderer.ts` (1px ticks + scrolling barcode band + timecode labels + single cyan NOW line + sparkline panel), `page.tsx`. **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the ship served the PRIMARY immersion driver + the real-music mandate; 1139 is deliberately *cerebral* (the same axis that has twice de-selected `slow-machine`) ‚Äî its win is the freshest palette, not transport. **Resurrect** on a genuinely cerebral / Ikeda-monochrome / non-immersion cycle (it is now the cleanest cash of the jury's *named* Ikeda-mono palette, alongside the banked `1134-slow-machine`). **NAMED REFS:** Ryoji Ikeda (*test pattern*, *datamatics*); Marc Wittmann (psychedelic time-perception / the stretched present); Brian Eno (systems music). **Ambition honest 2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [warp-clock engine + look-ahead sine-tick scheduler + Ikeda data-notation renderer + sparkline panel] + #3 named refs; NO novelty claim ‚Äî time-viz has priors). Steady, no flicker. Rebuild from this spec.

## ¬ß647 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 647 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing all four 2026-07-03 jury bans on a different axis-set; shipped `1133-resonant-bowl` (cosmic-ambient singing-bowl sound-bath ‚Äî it won on serving Karel's PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion driver while balancing the jury-flagged intense-heavy lane, cool-luminous palette, true-3D three.js, active strike+rub). ### `slow-machine` ‚Äî a piece of music with MEMORY that never loops (active seed+steer INPUT ¬∑ **SVG-primary Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT ¬∑ pure black + white + one electric-cyan ¬∑ cosmic/cerebral) ‚Äî `queued`, **top resurrect** when a long-form-generative / Ikeda-monochrome / non-spectacle-conceptual lane is due
- **The question:** what if a piece of music learned from every note it just played ‚Äî Hebbian reinforcement + decay + live steering feeding back into one Markov matrix so the exact state never recurs ‚Äî and you could watch its mind drift?
- **Built (complete, this fire):** `engine.ts` ‚Äî `SlowMachine`: live Markov matrix `M[i][j]` over 5‚Äì7 scale degrees, seedable Mulberry32 (never Math.random); `step()` = tension-weighted sample ‚Üí Hebbian bump ‚Üí decay + steered mutation; `seedMotif()` / `perturb()` / `snapshot()` (matrix/entropy/consonance/density). `audio.ts` ‚Äî sine/triangle pad bed (register‚Üípitch, tension‚Üílowpass) + 2-op FM bell + dry ticks ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; 25ms look-ahead scheduler ~120ms ahead. `page.tsx` ‚Äî seed stage (Dorian/Pentatonic/Phrygian + tap-a-motif) ‚Üí live stage (SVG memory-lattice: nodes=degrees, edges thicken/brighten as they reinforce, active transition glows cyan; scrolling velocity-sized note-stream; entropy/consonance/density sparklines) + DENSITY/TENSION/REGISTER/MUTATION dials + PERTURB + Design-notes. Builder-reported ESLint 0, no TS errors in folder.
- **Why it was strong (18/18-tie winner-candidate):** the most conceptually *surprising* build of the fire (a machine with memory, not a spectacle ‚Äî directly answers the jury's "STOP cashing the jury, surprise it"), the most-literal cash of the jury's named "Ikeda monochrome" palette provocation, fills the thin long-form-generative-with-**state/memory** categorical-menu slot, and has the lowest verification debt in the lab (pure SVG + WebAudio, guaranteed to run on Karel's 06:30 phone ‚Äî the jury's #1 liability).
- **Why de-selected (not weakness):** off the PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion brand ‚Äî it reads cerebral/data-viz rather than "transport me to an altered state," so it lost the tiebreaker to `1133`'s literal meditative sound-bath. **Resurrect FIRST** on any cerebral/long-form/Ikeda cycle, or when the lane needs a non-spectacle conceptual piece. Named refs: Ryoji Ikeda (*datamatics*/*test pattern*), Markov+Hebbian composition, Brian Eno generative/systems music. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [Markov engine + Hebbian reinforce/decay + FM/pad synth + SVG notation] + #3 named refs + soft-#5 long-form-stateful). Rebuild from this spec.

### `liquid-room` ‚Äî peak-LSD, the room turns to liquid you stir (active drag + mic/file INPUT ¬∑ **WebGL2 fragment-shader stable-fluids field** OUTPUT ¬∑ indigo‚Üíelectric-cyan‚Üíhot-magenta on near-black ¬∑ intense) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when an intense-pole / GPU-shader lane is due (the lane is currently intense-heavy ‚Äî hold until it cools)
- **The question:** what if the moment reality liquefies and melts were a screen you could reach into and stir, driven by sound?
- **Built (complete, this fire):** `fluid.ts` ‚Äî `LiquidField` full Jos-Stam stable-fluids solver entirely in WebGL2 fragment shaders on ping-pong `RGBA16F` float FBOs (256¬≤): advect velocity ‚Üí curl ‚Üí **audio-driven vorticity confinement** (the "melting") ‚Üí divergence ‚Üí 30-iter Jacobi pressure ‚Üí gradient subtract ‚Üí advect dye ‚Üí display (cool‚Üíhot palette + 4√ó4 Bayer dither + bloom). NOT a particle system ‚Äî a real advected velocity+dye field. `audio-engine.ts` ‚Äî self-playing detuned drone + mic (analyser-only, no feedback) + drop-a-file; FFT low/mid/high + RMS ‚Üí swirl/shimmer/brightness; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. `page.tsx` ‚Äî drag-to-stir, HUD, Canvas2D reaction-diffusion fallback if float-FBOs absent. Builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` + eslint 0-in-folder.
- **THE RESEARCH-CHAIN build of this fire** (RESEARCH ¬ß647 ‚Äî Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER*, 2026, audio-reactive WebGPU fluid + dither): today's-research‚Üítoday's-build was visible here. **Why de-selected:** fluid sim is the lab's single most-trodden technique (19 READMEs mention fluid/Navier/RD), it adds to the already intense-heavy lane the jury flagged, and hand-rolled WebGL2 shaders carry the highest headless-verification risk of the three (mitigated by its Canvas2D fallback). **Resurrect** on an intense GPU cycle once the lane has cooled; pair with Karel's real piano as the melting carrier. Named refs: Jos Stam "Stable Fluids" (SIGGRAPH 1999) + ASTRODITHER (Borghesi 2026). Ambition honest 3/5 (#3 named ref + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß647 <30d + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems [FFT analysis + GPU fluid solver + drag forcing + dither post]). Rebuild from this spec.

## ¬ß646 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 646 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing all four 2026-07-03 jury bans; shipped `1130-spectral-scrub` (Karel's real piano through a granular-phase-vocoder + WebGL2-spectral-field instrument ‚Äî it won on cashing the jury's #1 overdue mandate: put his actual Welcome Home recording through the pipeline, which the whole 15-build window ignored). The two below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1133.** Both dodge every 2026-07-03 jury ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß646.)

### `flock-organ` ‚Äî a GPU swarm you conduct into an instrument (active pointer-drag INPUT ¬∑ **WebGL2 GPGPU float-texture particle flock** OUTPUT ¬∑ electric neon magenta/cyan on near-black ¬∑ intense) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when a GPU/particle or live-performance lane is due
- **The question:** what if a swarm of thousands of GPU-simulated particles was a playable instrument ‚Äî you drag to herd the flock, and its living structure (density, velocity, coherence) is what you *hear*, an electric organism you conduct?
- **Built (complete):** `flock.ts` ‚Äî WebGL2 GPGPU sim; each particle's pos+vel packed into one `RGBA32F` texel, ping-pong FBOs (`EXT_color_buffer_float`), up to ~43k particles; forces = large-N Reynolds boids (centroid cohesion + attractor swirl + inverse-square repulsor on Shift/right-click + curl-of-2D-simplex-noise turbulence); additive neon point-splat into a fading float trail, tone-mapped present. `audio.ts` ‚Äî 7-partial additive bank + bandpass noise voice + enveloped sine grains ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **flock‚Üísound map**: centroid-Y‚Üíroot pitch (pentatonic), centroid-X‚Üípan, speed‚Üílowpass cutoff, **coherence (Vicsek order param |mean(vÃÇ)|)‚Üíharmonicity** (ordered = pure tuned partials + quiet noise; chaotic = beating detune + louder noise), density‚Üígrain rate; EMA-smoothed, gesture-gated. `fallback.ts` ‚Äî `probeWebGL2()` + Canvas2D CPU boids (~450) so it still demos + herds. `page.tsx` + `README.md`.
- **Refs:** Craig Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds, and Schools" (SIGGRAPH 1987); Robert Hodgin (flight404) flocking/particle work.
- **Deepen next:** real GPU neighbour search (texture spatial-hash grid) for true alignment/separation; GPU-side parallel-reduce of statistics to remove the readback stall and read *all* particles; multiple attractors / two-hand steering splitting the flock into duetting sub-swarms.
- **Note (credibility):** TSL compute already shipped (`130-tsl-particle-compute`) ‚Äî this is a fresh *application* of GPGPU, NOT a first-ever-compute claim.

### `slow-machine` ‚Äî a piece of music with memory that never loops (active seed+steer INPUT ¬∑ **cold Ikeda data-notation** OUTPUT ‚Äî Canvas2D hard-edged marks + SVG lattice/sparklines ¬∑ pure black + white + one red ¬∑ cerebral) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when a long-form-generative or Ikeda-monochrome lane is due
- **The question:** what if a piece had memory ‚Äî a long-form generative system you seed and steer that evolves and never repeats, so minute 5 is genuinely different from minute 1, rendered as cold Ikeda data-notation?
- **Built (complete):** `engine.ts` ‚Äî `SlowMachine`: a **Markov transition matrix** `M[i][j]` over scale degrees under three per-step forces ‚Äî **Hebbian reinforcement** (path taken bumped = memory), **mutation+decay** (rows leak to baseline + steered noise = forgetting), **tension bias** (reweight by interval consonance); because reinforcement + stochastic mutation + live steering all feed back, the **exact matrix state never recurs** ‚Äî a drifting attractor, not a loop; `snapshot()` exposes matrix+entropy+consonance+mean-interval so the drift is legible immediately; seedable PRNG. `audio.ts` ‚Äî sine pad bed (pitch/brightness ‚Üê register/tension) + 2-op FM bells per event + dry ticks ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; 25 ms look-ahead scheduler ~120 ms ahead. `render.ts` ‚Äî crisp black/white/red Ikeda marks (octave grid, scrolling time ticks, velocity-sized points, red live-event guide) + SVG sparklines. `page.tsx` (pre-start seed: scale buttons + tap-a-motif; live steer: DENSITY/TENSION/REGISTER/MUTATION dials + PERTURB + drop-a-motif strip; live memory-lattice + entropy/consonance/density sparklines) + `README.md`.
- **Refs:** Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics* / *test pattern*; Brian Eno *Music for Airports* (generative); Terry Riley *In C* (evolving non-looping process).
- **Deepen next:** a second interacting voice/matrix (call-and-response between two drifting machines); export the evolving score; longer-horizon memory (slow-decay habits that resurface after minutes) to make the "it remembers" arc land over a full listen.

## ¬ß645 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 645 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **DEEP** ‚Äî 2 parallel technical approaches to ONE concept (*a solid your brain builds from flat moving dots, then flips* ‚Äî the kinetic depth effect / structure-from-motion); shipped `1129-kinetic-dancer` (the **Johansson point-light human figure** approach ‚Äî it won on being the explicitly-queued deepening, the bigger/more-visceral surprise (the iconic Spinning Dancer), and the cleanest today's-research chain). This fire **resurrected + deepened** ¬ß644's ‚≠ê TOP banked `kinetic-depth` into the true Johansson point-light dancer the queued note named. The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1131.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß645.)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `kinetic-solid` (drag-to-bias + audio-only-bias INPUT ¬∑ **three.js** orthographic point-cloud OUTPUT ¬∑ ivory-on-slate ¬∑ uncanny) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when the abstract-form / three.js lane is due
- **What:** the abstract sibling of the shipped dancer ‚Äî ~300‚Äì600 flat, equal-size, un-shaded ivory dots sampled on the surface of an **invisible rotating 3D solid** and projected **orthographically** (no perspective, no shading, `depthTest:false` so no occlusion), so the brain manufactures a solid whose depth ordering is mathematically undecidable ‚Üí it **bistably flips** its spin. A **3-form menu** ‚Äî Fibonacci sphere / hourglass volume-of-revolution / twisted double-helix ‚Äî each a pure sampler function. Two rivalrous stereo drones (bright-CW-right / dark-CCW-left) crossfade with the bias over a JI pad through a limiter; drag adds a real Z-tilt; an audio-only-bias mode swings the stereo image hard to one side; slow autonomous drift (9 s/turn). Built files were `page.tsx` + `form.ts` (`mulberry32` + the three samplers) + `scene.ts` (`KineticSolid`: `OrthographicCamera`, flat `PointsMaterial` `sizeAttenuation:false`, `depthTest:false`, `dispose()`+`forceContextLoss()`, `hasWebGL()`) + `audio.ts` (`RivalDrones`, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, `close()`) + README.
- **Why it lost / why to resurrect:** the more **reliably legible** candidate headless-unverified (an abstract rotating solid doesn't depend on 14 dots reading as a *body* ‚Äî the one thing the shipped dancer can't eye-verify) and carries the richer **multi-form menu** ‚Äî but on *this* DEEP fire the dancer won as the explicitly-queued deepening + the bigger surprise + the clean today's-research chain. Resurrect on an abstract-form / three.js cycle, OR fold its 3-form selector into 1129 as a cycle-2 "abstract form" toggle (the DEEP-mode graft). **Deepen:** more forms (superquadric, Klein-bottle silhouette); a "commit strength" that reads how hard the drag tips the flip; a two-solid duet where two ambiguous forms flip in/out of sync. **NAMED REFS:** Wallach & O'Connell (1953); Ullman (1979); Miles rotating-trapezoid lineage (1931). **Ambition 3/5** (novel kinetic-depth/SFM technique + ‚â•3 subsystems + named refs).

## ¬ß644 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 644 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, each a *drug-free perceptual hallucination the geometry composes in you*, via a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT √ó non-Canvas2D/non-field-sim OUTPUT √ó mechanism √ó palette √ó pole; shipped `1126-enigma-drift` (the Enigma/peripheral-drift piece ‚Äî it won on cashing the **overdue INTENSE pole** via a non-form-constant, non-black mechanism, being the most reliably hardware-free demo, and the freshest SVG output). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **¬ß644-banked `kinetic-depth` was resurrected + deepened + SHIPPED cycle 645 as `1129-kinetic-dancer`; `necker-vase` remains banked (resurrect ‚â•1131).** Both dodge every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß644.)

### ‚úÖ SHIPPED cycle 645 as `1129-kinetic-dancer` (deepened into the Johansson point-light figure) ‚Äî `kinetic-depth` (drag-to-bias INPUT ¬∑ **three.js** structure-from-motion OUTPUT ¬∑ ivory-on-slate ¬∑ uncanny/contemplative) ‚Äî was `queued`, consumed this cycle. *The abstract-solid approach that lost the ¬ß645 DEEP is now banked above as `kinetic-solid` (resurrect ‚â•1131).*
- **What:** ~360 flat, equal-size, un-shaded dots that are the **orthographic** projection of points sampled on an invisible rotating 3D surface (a Fibonacci-sphere, or a stylized volume-of-revolution "figure"). With zero depth cues the brain builds a solid form from motion alone (**kinetic depth effect / structure-from-motion**) ‚Äî and its rotation direction is genuinely ambiguous, so it **bistably flips** (the "Spinning Dancer" illusion). Two **rivalrous stereo drones** (bright CW panned right, dark CCW panned left) crossfade with the field's bias over a soft pad; **drag left/right adds a tiny real tilt** (the only disambiguating cue) that nudges the form to commit and leans the sound with it; release ‚Üí fully ambiguous. Built files were `page.tsx` + `scene.ts` (`KineticField`: samplers, orthographic camera, flat `PointsMaterial` `sizeAttenuation:false`, `dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`, `hasWebGL()` probe) + `audio.ts` (`DroneEngine`, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 2.2 s onset, clean `ctx.close()`) + README.
- **Why it lost / why to resurrect:** the most **immersive & dramatic** candidate and a rich grep-fresh technique (structure-from-motion, 0√ó) ‚Äî but its effect strength "varies a lot" and the drag-bias is subtle, and three.js was just used (1124), so on *this* fire the more reliable Enigma won the demoability + output-freshness axes. Resurrect on an immersive/three.js cycle. **Deepen:** a true **point-light "spinning dancer"** (Johansson biological-motion) figure instead of a volume-of-revolution; a stronger felt "lock/flip"; optional stereo-audio-only bias so the *sound* alone tips the percept. **NAMED REFS:** Wallach & O'Connell (1953); Ullman (1979); Kayahara *Spinning Dancer* (2003); Johansson (1973). **Ambition 3/5** (novel SFM technique + ‚â•3 subsystems + named refs).

### banked ‚Äî `necker-vase` (press-to-hold INPUT ¬∑ raw-**WebGL2 SDF-figure** OUTPUT (non-field-sim) ¬∑ warm-paper riso ¬∑ liminal/meditative-uncanny) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when the WebGL2-shape-rendering lane is due
- **What:** an instrument for **multistable perception** ‚Äî three reversible figures rendered from scratch in ONE hand-written WebGL2 fragment shader (Necker cube & Schr√∂der staircase as crisp SDF line-work; the Rubin face‚Äìvase as an analytic bicolor silhouette built from facial-feature gaussians), each with a signed `bias` uniform that nudges figure-ground shading toward one reading and lifts a single burnt-orange riso accent onto the dominant one. Two Web Audio drones (hollow square-ish "reading A" vs. rounded sine "reading B") crossfade with the bias over a low shared drone; **press-and-hold toward a cue** biases perception; an **autonomous slow drift** flips it on its own every several seconds so it's never static/silent. Built files were `page.tsx` + `gl.ts` (GLSL ES 3.00, NaN-defensive `sq()`/`bump()`, clean compile/link logging, context-loss dispose) + `audio.ts` + `figures.ts` (per-figure pointer‚Üíbias maps) + README; static SVG Necker-cube fallback when WebGL2 is absent.
- **Why it lost / why to resurrect:** ambitious (three illusions, one shader) and grep-fresh (multistable-figure, 0√ó) with the best palette-break of the trio ‚Äî but the honest self-assessment flags that the face‚Äìvase "reads more as a goblet than faces," and the on-screen accent marks only the *nudged* bias, not the viewer's true percept, so the audio-follows-perception loop is looser than 1126's. Resurrect on a WebGL2-shape (non-field-sim) cycle. **Deepen:** re-tune the face‚Äìvase profile so it unmistakably reads as two faces; add a **"tap when it flips" report** so the sound follows the *actual* percept (closing the loop) rather than only the pointer nudge; add binocular-rivalry-style version. **NAMED REFS:** Necker (1832); Rubin, *Synsoplevede Figurer* (1915); Schr√∂der staircase; G.H. Fisher; perceptual-bistability literature. **Ambition 3/5** (novel multistable-figure technique + ‚â•3 subsystems + named refs).

## ¬ß643 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 643 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **DEEP** ‚Äî 2 parallel technical approaches to ONE concept (*the word rewritten in you* ‚Äî Warren's Verbal Transformation Effect); shipped `1125-verbal-oracle` (the **synth-word** approach ‚Äî it won on being the purest zero-input passive-listen fill of the jury's under-served audio-first lane + the most reliably hardware-free demo). The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1127.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß642/¬ß643.)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1126-own-word` (mic-record INPUT ¬∑ **audio-first** OUTPUT ¬∑ paper-white ¬∑ eerie-liminal) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when the mic/embodied lane is due
**One question:** what if you recorded *your own voice* saying a single word, then looped that exact recording ‚Äî undegraded and click-free ‚Äî until you heard it rewrite itself into other words? **Why it's strong / the bigger, more visceral sibling:** it makes the looped VTE stimulus **the listener's own recorded voice** ‚Äî the illusion becomes visceral because it is *your* word dissolving in your own ears ‚Äî and it is more **embodied/participatory** (Karel priority #3: you *speak* to play) and technically richer than the shipped synth-word 1125. **Its build (complete as of ¬ß643):** `capture.ts` = `getUserMedia` + `MediaRecorder` grabs ~1.3 s of you speaking one word ‚Üí decoded to an `AudioBuffer`; `dsp.ts` = the technical core (`findWordBounds` amplitude-gate **trim** of leading/trailing silence with a 20 ms margin ‚Üí `peakNormalize` to 0.95 ‚Üí `cosineFadeEdges` forcing sample 0 and N‚àí1 to **exact zero** with a raised-cosine curve ‚Üí a click-free, invariant loop stimulus ‚Äî a seam tick resets the ear and kills the illusion, so this pipeline IS the payload); `synth.ts` = `renderFallbackWord`, a **deterministic** 3-parallel-band-pass formant synth (120 Hz sawtooth glottis ‚Üí Peterson & Barney vowel script, offline-rendered/normalized/edge-faded, no `Math.random`/`Date.now`) so the piece works with no mic / on desktop / headless; `engine.ts` = `OwnWordEngine`, the same Chris-Wilson **look-ahead** scheduler firing the **identical** buffer (`nextTime += period`, ~0.2 s ahead) ‚Üí master gain ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, with a backlog guard + full `dispose()`; `page.tsx` = paper/cream UI ‚Äî **Record a word** (gesture ‚Üí countdown/record window) / **Loop it** / **Use fallback voice** / Stop, a 1.2‚Äì3 Hz rate slider, a perception log with the shaded ~15‚Äì40 s onset zone + seeded illustrative ghost marks, a **minimal Canvas2D companion** (breathing waveform of *your* word + loop-pulse ring + playhead), the fallback auto-looping on mount (never blank/silent), full teardown. **Privacy:** the mic is **analysis/loop-only** ‚Äî the captured audio lives as an in-memory `AudioBuffer` for the page's lifetime, discarded on unmount, **never written to disk, never uploaded** (no network code, no API route). **Honest Lucier distinction (in the README):** Alvin Lucier's *I Am Sitting in a Room* also loops one's own voice, but Lucier **re-records into a room** so its resonant modes progressively filter the voice into pure tone (an *acoustic* change in the air); here the loop is **undegraded** ‚Äî byte-identical every repetition ‚Äî so any change is a **perceptual re-grouping in you**, not a physical filtering. The build deliberately does NOT convolve/degrade the loop. **Ambition:** #1 (VTE-on-your-own-voice, grep-fresh; distinct from Deutsch dichotic 1109 + semantic-satiation 1122) + #2 (mic capture + trim/normalize/fade DSP + fallback formant synth + seamless scheduler + perception log = 5) + #3 (Warren VTE 1958/1961; Peterson & Barney 1952; Lucier as the honest *distinction*). **Dodges every ban:** mic-record INPUT (not tap-to-seed), **audio-first OUTPUT** (the jury's under-served lane; sparse Canvas2D companion, not the artwork), paper-white PALETTE (not black-void), eerie-liminal pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked (NOT quality ‚Äî build-complete + clean):** the DEEP fire ships one, and 1125 won on being the purer *zero-input passive listen* (the illusion entirely internal) + the more reliably hardware-free 06:30 demo (Begin plays the canonical Warren stimulus immediately, no mic); 1126's real payload is mic-only and its fallback synth is a muddier vowel-glide ‚Üí so it lost the *demoability* axis despite being the bigger concept. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ¬ß643 ‚Äî needs a real headphones + mic pass to tune the trim `gate` + `fadeSeconds` by ear (a seam tick or over-trim kills it). **Deepen:** an **A/B of illusion strength on your-own-voice vs the synth** side-by-side; a **free-text "what did you hear?"** capture at each mark that clusters listeners' illusory-word sequences; a tiny A/B that briefly inserts one *degraded* repetition to feel how fast a seam-tick resets the effect; couple with banked `1122-mantra-melt` (VTE = perceptual re-grouping; satiation = meaning-drain ‚Äî two takes on repetition-until-dissolution). `state: verbal transformation on your own voice ‚Äî the word rewritten in you ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal`.

## ¬ß642 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 642 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT √ó **NON-Canvas2D** OUTPUT √ó technique √ó palette; shipped `1124-noise-veil` (audio-led Ganzfeld ‚Äî it won on the clean *today's-research ‚Üí today's-build* chain, the diversity flip, and being the purest mandate embodiment). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1127.** Both dodge every 2026-07-02 ban AND this cycle's Canvas2D-output ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß642.)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1125-verbal-oracle` (headphone-listen INPUT ¬∑ **audio-first** OUTPUT ¬∑ paper-white ¬∑ eerie-liminal) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect next
**One question:** what if you looped one *identical* word until your own brain rewrote it? Put on headphones ‚Äî a single word repeats unchanged ~2√ó/second, and after ~20‚Äì40 s you begin to *hear it morph* into different words that were never spoken. **Why it's strong / the boldest OUTPUT break of the fire:** it is deliberately **audio-first** ‚Äî the jury's *most under-served output* (audio-first only 3√ó across the whole last-15) ‚Äî and a **grep-fresh mechanism**: the **Verbal Transformation Effect** (R.M. Warren 1958; Warren & Gwynn 1961), a purely auditory percept manufactured in the listener, *distinct* from Deutsch's dichotic illusions (`1109-inner-ear` already ships those ‚Äî NOT rebuilt) and from semantic satiation (banked `1122-mantra-melt` ‚Äî meaning-drain, not perceptual re-grouping). **Its build:** `voice.ts` = a real source‚Äìfilter **formant synth** (`renderWord`: sawtooth glottal buzz at f0 ‚Üí 3 parallel band-pass "formant" filters automated along a vowel script + band-passed noise fricatives, rendered offline into an `AudioBuffer`, peak-normalized, cosine-faded to exact silence at both edges ‚Äî NO fetch, NO assets) + `VerbalOracleEngine` (look-ahead **exact-period** scheduler ‚Üí a byte-for-byte-identical buffer fired click-free at 1.2‚Äì3 Hz, the invariant loop that is VTE's precondition); `words.ts` = 4 preset one-syllable recipes ("rest"=Warren's canonical stimulus, "life","say","flow"; F1/F2/F3 after Peterson & Barney 1952 + per-word illusory-alternate lists); `page.tsx` = a "mark what you hear now" perception log dropping timestamped glyphs against the ~20 s onset zone + a minimal ink-on-cream Canvas2D glyph (breathing word, loop-pulse ring, token waveform + playhead) ‚Äî the restraint is the point; a deterministic seeded "ghost listener" drops illustrative marks on a cold glance (a placard, not a measurement). **Ambition:** #1 (VTE + looped formant-synth word, grep-fresh, audio-first) + #2 (formant voice + seamless-loop scheduler + preset scripts + perception log + minimal glyph = 5) + #3 (Warren VTE 1958/1961). **Dodges every ban:** headphone-listen INPUT (not tap), **audio-first OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D ‚Äî the piece is the sound; the glyph is a sparse secondary), paper-white PALETTE (not black-void), eerie-liminal pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked (NOT quality ‚Äî build-complete + clean):** the WIDE fire ships one, and 1124 won on the *today's-research chain* + diversity; 1125 is not today's-research-grounded (Warren is foundational) and it adds to the "percept-in-you" thread the 2026-07-02 jury flagged as crowding ‚Äî but it is the **boldest output break** and the obvious resurrect when the audio-first / headphones / eyes-closed lane is due. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ¬ß642 ‚Äî needs a headphones pass to tune formant intelligibility + loop rate against real VTE onset; **deepen** with a real phoneme / di-syllabic model (so the morphs are genuine speech re-parses), a free-text "what did you hear?" capture that clusters listeners' illusory words, and a pairing with `1122-mantra-melt` (VTE = perceptual re-grouping; satiation = meaning-drain ‚Äî two takes on repetition-until-dissolution). `state: verbal transformation ‚Äî the word rewritten in you ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal`.

### `1126-pulse-cave` (camera-PPG INPUT ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2** OUTPUT ¬∑ warm ember womb ¬∑ cosmic-ambient embodied) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect on a fresh-input/embodied cycle
**One question:** what if your own heartbeat were the metronome? Rest a fingertip over the phone's rear camera (torch on) and the camera reads the faint pulsation of blood in your fingertip ‚Üí a warm womb/cave drone breathes and glows in time with your live heart rate. **Why it's strong / the freshest INPUT of the fire:** **camera photoplethysmography (PPG)** is a **genuinely novel input for the lab** (0√ó ‚Äî no prior piece reads a pulse from the camera), and it's embodied/live-performance territory (Karel priority #3). **Its build:** `ppg.ts` = each rear-camera frame drawn to a tiny 48√ó36 offscreen canvas ‚Üí **red-channel spatial mean** = the raw photoplethysmogram ‚Üí slow-EMA detrend (high-pass ~0.23 Hz) + fast-EMA smooth (low-pass ~2.6 Hz) ‚Üí refractory amplitude-gated upward-zero-crossing peak detection ‚Üí **BPM clamped [40,180]** with implausible-interval rejection + a confidence score; a deterministic `mulberry32` **synthetic pulse** (resting rate + respiratory-sinus-arrhythmia HRV, no `Math.random`) is the never-blank fallback. `audio.ts` = shared `startDroneBank` warm JI bed whose filter/level **breathe** with the smoothed pulse swell + a scheduled low-pass **lub-dub** (S1 low + S2 higher/shorter) on each beat. `gl.ts` = **raw WebGL2** hand-written warm fragment shader ‚Äî a lit womb/cave of drifting fleshy fbm folds + ember vein ridges (blood-red walls ‚Üí amber core), walls breathing toward the viewer + a central bloom swelling/brightening on each beat (NOT a field-sim; the uniforms *are* the pulse); Canvas2D 2D fallback. Frames analysis-only, never recorded/sent; torch best-effort via `applyConstraints({advanced:[{torch:true}]})` in try/catch; permission-denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + auto-fallback. **Ambition:** #1 (camera-PPG heart-rate as a musical/visual input, grep-fresh) + #2 (red-channel PPG extractor + band-pass/peak BPM tracker + beat-entrained warm synth/heartbeat + WebGL2 cave shader = 4) + #3 (Verkruysse, Svaasand & Nelson, "Remote plethysmographic imaging using ambient light," *Opt. Express* 2008). **Dodges every ban:** camera-PPG INPUT (not tap), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D; a hand-written warm shader, NOT a field-sim), warm ember womb PALETTE (not black-void), cosmic-ambient embodied pole (not intense-hypnotic). **Why banked:** not today's-research-grounded (Verkruysse 2008 is foundational), and camera input appeared recently at `1103-strange-face` ‚Äî so it lost to 1124's clean research chain; but it's the freshest input + strongest embodied/live-performance fit ‚Üí resurrect on a fresh-input/embodied cycle. **Honest caveat carried:** no medical/health claim; the live PPG path is **hardware-only** (needs a phone rear camera + torch + still fingertip; desktop runs the synthetic pulse) ‚Äî cannot be verified headless. **Deepen:** **two-fingertip PPG for an interpersonal heart-sync duet** ‚Äî the *biometric* cousin of `1121-pulse-lock`'s tapped-pulse two-body Kuramoto (do two people's heart rates drift toward each other?); HRV ‚Üí texture; a breath-paced "settle your pulse" arc. `state: interoception / the inner pulse made audible-visible ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (warm, embodied)`.

## ¬ß641 note ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 641 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **DEEP** ‚Äî shipped `1123-conductor-veil` by resurrecting ¬ß640's ‚≠ê TOP `1120-conductor-veil`; the planned DEEP concept was scrapped mid-fire as redundant)
**No new banked seed ‚Äî a lesson instead.** This fire planned a DEEP Deutsch-dichotic trio (`1123-two-ears` octave ¬∑ `1124-phantom-scale` scale ¬∑ `1125-tritone-oracle` tritone) and built all three clean, then curation found **`1109-inner-ear` already ships the entire Deutsch suite** (octave + scale + tritone + Zwicker + the personal pitch-class-template map). All three were `rm -rf`'d, none committed ‚Äî do **NOT** resurrect them (1109 covers the concept; a 4th dichotic piece is exactly the "too similar" trap). **The lesson (for the Decide gate):** *grep the technique BEFORE spawning builders* ‚Äî the ambition-floor grep-rule is a pre-spawn check, and trusting a stale jury bullet ("cash the dichotic piece" ‚Äî written 2026-07-02, window ‚â§1105, before 1109 shipped) over a fresh grep cost three parallel builders. If anything from the trio is ever wanted, it's a *cycle-2 graft onto 1109* (e.g. 1124's live "the trick vs. what you heard" A/B routing was a genuinely nice interaction 1109 lacks), never a standalone.

## ¬ß640 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-03 (cycle 640 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers; shipped `1121-pulse-lock` (two-person one-device Kuramoto phase-lock ‚Äî it hit the most jury asks at once: the "two people" fresh verb, extends the only 5/5 standout 1082, and gives the COLD multi-user lane its first buildable answer). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1123.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß640.)

### ‚úÖ SHIPPED cycle 641 as `1123-conductor-veil` ‚Äî `1120-conductor-veil` (continuous conduct-gesture INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D aurora-ribbon ¬∑ cosmic-ambient warm flow) ‚Äî was `queued`, resurrect next; consumed this cycle. *Deepening still open (not yet built): a left-hand "dynamics" 2nd-pointer channel + a 2/3/4-beat-pattern classifier + quantized register steps; the `1123/conductor.ts` downbeat‚ÜíEMA-tempo primitive is reusable for any gesture-timed piece.*
**One question:** what if you could *conduct* an unseen ensemble with a continuous baton gesture ‚Äî and hear phrasing, tempo, and dynamics answer your hand in real time? **Why it's strong / the freshest-RESEARCH origin of the fire:** it directly implements this cycle's freshest anchor ‚Äî **arXiv:2604.27957 (2026) "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures"** (a dome installation that estimates *phase-within-a-bar* from the conductor's gesture) ‚Äî and has the strongest **live-performance / installation** fit (Karel priority #3). **Its build:** `conductor.ts` tracks baton position/velocity/curvature every frame and detects the downbeat as a **vertical-velocity reversal** (the low point of a stroke) ‚Üí EMA-smoothed BPM; height‚Üíregister (+~1.2 oct) + lowpass brightness; gesture energy/speed‚Üílevel + vibrato/tremolo depth. `audio.ts` = 4 lightly-detuned oscillator "sections" (saw+triangle) over a sustaining pad drone (root+sub), a slowly-cycling set of just-intonation chords all from one just major scale `{1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2}` (no wrong notes), a `ConvolverNode` hall ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. `render.ts` = Canvas2D **aurora ribbons** streaming from the baton, billowing with dynamics (peach/rose/gold/violet/amber over deep-plum‚Üíwarm-ember), a luminous baton trail + one soft slowly-decaying bloom per downbeat (no strobe). Deterministic `mulberry32` **ghost conductor** (fixed seed `0x1120c04f`) traces a gentle down-up beat so it sounds/animates on a cold glance. **Ambition:** #1 (continuous conduct-gesture‚Üítempo/register/dynamics, grep-fresh; prior "conduct" pieces were body-tracking dance-avatars, not a pointer baton) + #2 (gesture tracker + downbeat/tempo estimator + ensemble synth + convolver + ribbon renderer = 5) + #3 (Max Mathews *Radio Baton*; *Personal Orchestra* / *You're the Conductor*; the 2026 virtual-orchestra-conducting paper) + #5 (RESEARCH ¬ß640, today). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** conduct-gesture INPUT (not tap-to-seed), Canvas2D OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm sunset PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ¬ß640 ‚Äî needs a live pointer + speakers pass to tune the downbeat heuristic (it assumes a roughly vertical motion; erratic scribbling reads as arrhythmic) and the register *glide* (currently continuous ‚Äî try quantized scale steps); deepen with a **left-hand "dynamics" channel** (a second pointer/touch) and a beat-pattern classifier (2/3/4-beat gestures). **Its downbeat-from-gesture‚Üítempo is a reusable primitive** for any gesture-timed piece.

### `1122-mantra-melt` (typed-text INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D kinetic-typography ¬∑ warm paper-white ¬∑ semantic-satiation meditative) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect when the cross-modal/conceptual lane is due
**One question:** what if you typed a word and repeated it until ‚Äî like a mantra chanted too many times ‚Äî its *meaning dissolved and only pure sound and light remained*? **What it does:** typed text is a **genuinely fresh input for the lab** (keyboard-as-musical-driver; 1107 was MIDI *notes*, not typed language). Each letter‚Üípitch on a **JI major-pentatonic** across two octaves (root D3 146.83 Hz; ratios `1,9/8,5/4,3/2,5/3,2,9/4,5/2,3,10/3`); vowels are *sung* on stable low chord tones (additive partials), consonants are a short pitched body + a bandpass-filtered noise "breath," spaces are rests ‚Äî so any typed string is consonant. **The core mechanism ‚Äî semantic satiation:** repeating the motif advances `s` 0‚Üí1 (~`1/9` per repetition; meaning-meter = `(1‚àís)¬∑100%`); as `s` rises, consonant breath‚Üí0 and attack softens, vowels stretch (0.55‚Üí2.2 s) and dull toward pure sine + spawn granular detuned grains, whole-motif detune spreads to ¬±55¬¢, pan smears, and the `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed swells up under it ‚Äî the *word audibly melts into a warm drone*. Visually a rotating **kinetic-typography mandala** on warm paper stays crisp at full meaning and, as legibility drains, letters drift/rotate/overlap and multiply into a mirrored symmetric bloom of glowing ink-strokes with lengthening trails. Deterministic default mantra ("mantra") types itself in and melts on a virtual clock for the cold glance. **Palette:** warm paper-white / luminous ink (illuminated manuscript meets light-field) ‚Äî NOT the banned dark "dissolve-the-void" trope (the melt here is *linguistic/semantic*, warm). Refs: **semantic satiation / "verbal satiation"** (Jakobovits & Lambert, 1961‚Äì62); **mantra / japa** repetition. **Ambition:** #1 (semantic-satiation-as-a-sound-mechanic, grep-fresh; typed-text input ~0√ó) + #2 (letter‚Üípitch mapper + vowel/consonant synth + satiation state machine + droneBank + kinetic-typography renderer) + #3 (Jakobovits; japa). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** typed-text INPUT (not tap), Canvas2D typography OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm paper PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Why banked, not shipped:** the most conceptually *original* of the three, but the **least embodied** (keyboard, not the body) and hardest to verify, and the letter‚Üípitch map is an admitted aesthetic invention (not phonetics) ‚Äî so it lost to 1121's real named mechanism + triple jury-alignment. **Deepen:** a real **phoneme‚Üíformant** model (so the melt is genuine speech decomposing, not a letter-cipher); a "meaning restored" reverse-satiation on a fresh word; type a whole line ‚Üí a slow chant that satiates phrase-by-phrase.

The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder + folder-eslint 0, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1120.** Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß639/¬ß638.)

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1118-exhale-reeds` (breath INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D sumi-e ¬∑ cosmic-ambient calm) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect next
**One question:** what if you played a whole field of reeds with your *breath alone* ‚Äî not your voice, your actual exhale ‚Äî and a garden of wind-voices bent and sang in the direction and force of your breath? **Why it's strong / the freshest-TECHNIQUE origin of the fire:** the same **spectral-flatness breath-vs-voice discriminator** the shipped 1119 carries ‚Äî `breath.ts` gates a band-energy envelope by spectral flatness (geo/arith mean of the power spectrum over ~200 Hz‚Äì8 kHz) so a *broadband exhale* drives it while a sustained hum/whistle/sung note at equal loudness is heavily attenuated (a genuine breath-vs-voice discriminator, not a level meter or pitch tracker ‚Äî grep-fresh; breath *input* is not a lab-first (1020/1067/1109-banked) but this discriminator is). **Its distinct build:** a bank of **9 high-Q band-pass "wind voices"** (JI major-pentatonic ratios 1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3 over ~C3, ~2 octaves) + octave partial + a short feedback `DelayNode` (Karplus-Strong-ish comb) for breathy pitched shimmer, stereo-spread, over a low-passed wind drone bed ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; breath drive opens gains/brightens Q, breath centroid biases WHICH reeds bloom; shared `AnalyserNode` fed by mic OR a deterministic seeded `mulberry32` "breeze" so it's never blank/silent. **Palette:** warm daylight **sumi-e / rice-paper** ‚Äî cream `#f3ebd8` paper with seeded grain, ~46 ink-green/umber bezier reeds bending to wind force+direction, standing-wave shimmer + gold tip-bloom on singing reeds, low gold sun; `prefers-reduced-motion` settles it. Refs: **Aeolian harp**, shakuhachi *ro-buki* breath-tone, Ronald van der Meijs' aeolian nylon-string+resonance-tube installations, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*, Alvin Lucier. **Ambition:** #1 (spectral-flatness breath discriminator, grep-fresh) + #2 (breath detector + 9-voice band-pass/KS-comb bank + wind drone bed + Canvas2D reed field = 4) + #3 (named refs). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban:** breath INPUT (not tap), Canvas2D OUTPUT (not GPU-shader/field-sim), warm rice-paper PALETTE (not black-void), calm cosmic-ambient pole. **Why banked (NOT quality ‚Äî it's build-complete + clean + the queued ‚≠ê from cycle 638):** the DEEP fire ships one, and the **ambition axis** decided it ‚Äî 1119's long-form generative-growth-with-**memory/evolution** lands the categorical-diversity menu's *thin* "long-form generative (state, memory, evolution ‚Äî not loops)" lane and is the bigger/more-surprising concept, whereas 1118 is the more atmospheric/loop-ish (if lovelier) wind-choir. **Resurrect note:** build-complete as of ¬ß639 ‚Äî needs only a live-mic pass to tune `FLATNESS_FLOOR_*` + the energy-dB mapping + comb loudness against a real exhale; deepen with formant/vowel ‚Üí which reeds bloom, and a "wind memory" that keeps a bent reed ringing after the breath stops. **Also fold its reed-voice band-pass timbre + sumi-e ink rendering into 1119 as a cycle-2 alternate voice-bank/skin (per the DEEP-mode graft).**

### `1117-tide-drone` (live external-data INPUT ¬∑ Canvas2D loom ¬∑ cosmic-ambient oceanic) ‚Äî `queued`, resurrect once the data-sonification lane cools
**One question:** what if the ocean's real tides were the score ‚Äî live tide + harmonic-constituent data from a coastal station driving a slow beating drone built from the *genuine* tidal constituents, woven into a tidal-flat loom you watch breathe? **What it does:** `data.ts` fetches NOAA CO-OPS `mdapi` harmonic constituents + `datagetter` predictions client-side (4 s `AbortController` each, CORS-open, no key), with the canonical M2/S2/N2/K1/O1 table + `tideHeightAt` (Kelvin's harmonic sum) + a deterministic simulated-tide fallback (mulberry32) ‚Üí always-visible `‚óè LIVE ¬∑ NOAA` / `‚óè simulated` badge. `audio.ts` = **additive synthesis from the tidal constituents** (each becomes a detuned beating sine partial whose amplitude comes from the station's real harmonic data), tide-height‚Üílowpass, tidal-flow‚Üítremolo, through a limiter. Canvas2D warp/weft **loom** over a warm teal-water / sand / dusk-amber tidal flat whose water line breathes with the live tide; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows it; 3-station picker. Refs: **Lord Kelvin's tide-predicting machine** (mechanical harmonic synthesis ‚Äî the direct ancestor of the additive synth), Jana Winderen ocean sound art, the overview-effect/oceanic-boundlessness pole. **Ambition:** #2 (live fetch/parse + tidal-constituent additive synth + Canvas2D loom + fallback) + #3 (Kelvin/Winderen) + #5 (RESEARCH ¬ß638). **Dodges every 2026-07-02 ban** (external-data INPUT, Canvas2D OUTPUT, teal-sand PALETTE, cosmic-ambient pole). **Why banked, not shipped:** it is the **third real-world-data-sonification in a short window** (1084 aurora ‚Üí 1110 Schumann ‚Üí this) ‚Äî the exact category-convergence the jury warns of ‚Äî so hold it until the data-sonification lane cools, OR resurrect it paired with a fresher output than another Canvas2D. **Deepen:** add a second NDBC buoy wave-period feed to drive the weft/shimmer independently (the builder flagged this as next-cycle); a day/night tide-clock; multiple stations beating against each other (a coastline as a chord).

Files were `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`pitch.ts`+`renderer.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-636/1111-throat-of-light/`. **Why banked (not quality):** the WIDE fire could ship only one, and 1110 won on being the jury's *explicitly-named* real-world-data extension (the thinnest category); 1111 is the fresher **input** (voice) and the more overtly beautiful ship. **Resurrect when:** the lane wants a voice-driven / ritual / live-performance piece ‚Äî it's the obvious next ship and needs only a live-mic pass to tune the autocorrelation gate + resonator decay. **Deepen:** vowel/formant ‚Üí different chapel geometries; a "call and response" mode where the temple sings back a held drone after you stop; real-hardware latency tuning; a second voice (duet) lighting a second rose window. - **`1112-after-motion` ‚Äî the movement made in you (Motion Aftereffect / "waterfall illusion").** A cool-palette perceptual-adaptation instrument on the **Motion Aftereffect (MAE)**: stare at steady motion ~20‚Äì40 s, then when it freezes the static world appears to drift the OPPOSITE way (direction-selective MT/V5 neurons adapt + rebound) ‚Äî nothing in the image moves during the aftereffect; the motion is manufactured entirely inside *you*. A raw-WebGL2 full-screen field (three types ‚Äî concentric rings / rotating spiral / drifting bands) driven by an accumulated `phase` uniform so freezing is genuinely pixel-static; an autonomous **adapt (~24 s) ‚Üí hold (~11 s) ‚Üí reverse** cycle with a clear phase indicator ("Adapting‚Ä¶ / Hold still ‚Äî watch the centre") + fixation crosshair on hold; keyboard `Space`=freeze, arrows=speed/direction, `1`‚Äì`3`=field type (no pointer-drag). **Auditory analog:** a `GlideDrone` (root/fifth/octave, filtered) glides in pitch with the visual direction and freezes on hold, through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Äî many listeners "hear" the glide continue a moment (an auditory-MAE analog), reinforcing the cross-modal "it was in you" point. Cool silver/pale-blue near-monochrome, constant mean luminance, drift 0.1 cyc/s clamped 0.03‚Äì0.28, `prefers-reduced-motion` √ó0.6, no strobe. `state: perceptual adaptation / the motion made in you ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal (cool)`. Named refs: **Robert Addams (1834, Falls of Foyers)**; **Adolf Wohlgemuth, *On the After-effect of Seen Movement* (1911)**; direction-selective adaptation in **MT/V5**. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 MAE is grep-0√ó in the lab ‚Äî a new "percept-in-you" mechanism (adaptation/rebound), distinct from stereopsis 1105 / dichotic 1109 / stochastic-resonance 1096 ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ borderline #2: WebGL2 field + glide-drone + adapt controller ‚âà 3). Files were `page.tsx`+`renderer.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-636/1112-after-motion/`. **Why banked:** it's the **4th "percept-in-you" piece** (after 1096/1105/1109) ‚Äî the exact theme convergence the jury warns of ‚Äî and the lowest ambition of the three; the fresh *mechanism* + cool palette weren't enough to beat the jury-named data-sonification ship. **Honest caveat carried:** the aftereffect strength is viewer/screen-dependent and **cannot be verified headless** (there's no motion in the frozen frame to measure) ‚Äî the README states this plainly. **Resurrect when:** the lane wants a cool-palette / passive-gaze / perceptual piece and the "percept-in-you" thread has rested a few cycles ‚Äî or pair the MAE with a *different* modality (a tactile/audio-only aftereffect) so it's not a 4th visual illusion. Tags: passive-watch + keyboard INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 cool motion-field OUTPUT ¬∑ motion-aftereffect adaptation + auditory-glide-analog TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cool silver/pale-blue VIBE.

Strict per-ear `ChannelMerger(2)` routing (leftGain‚Üíinput 0, rightGain‚Üíinput 1), equal-power cos¬≤ ramps, deterministic schedules, Shepard-tone builder for the tritone. Warm paper-white `#f4efe6` ground, dark-ink typography, amber üéß advisory, honest "right-hander model, a prediction not a measurement" caveat. **Why banked (not quality):** the DEEP fire could ship only one, and 1109 won on **ambition** ‚Äî it is a *superset* (adds the grep-0√ó Zwicker phantom-in-silence, which cashes THIS cycle's fresh RESEARCH ¬ß635 finding, and a personal tritone calibration that turns the paradox into a measurement of the listener), which is the "massively bigger" the mandate wants over an incremental variant. **Resurrect when:** Karel wants a *maximally glance-legible* single-screen version for the 06:30 phone review (no gallery nav, everything on one diagram) ‚Äî the cleaner first-impression at the cost of depth. Its single-screen legibility is already folded into 1109's README as a cycle-2 "one exhibit mode" toggle; this seed is the standalone alternative. `state: auditory illusion ‚Äî the music only in the mind ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal/uncanny`. Named refs: Diana Deutsch ‚Äî octave (1974) / scale (1975) / tritone-paradox (1986), *Musical Illusions and Phantom Words* (Oxford 2019); Roger Shepard ‚Äî Shepard tones (1964). Ambition ~3/5 (#1 dichotic grep-0√ó ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ audio-first output; borderline #2). Files were `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`illusions.ts`+`README.md`.
