## ¬ß634 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-02 (cycle 634 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers each cashing a named provocation of the fresh 2026-07-02 jury on a DIFFERENT fresh input √ó output √ó palette; shipped `1107-chromatic-organ` (the pianist's chromesthesia color-organ ‚Äî the jury's "one-move" input-collapse fix). The two below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0-in-folder, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-634/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1110.** Both dodge every 2026-07-02 ban; grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß634.)

- **‚≠ê `1108-two-ears` (TOP resurrect ‚Äî the jury's explicitly-named next ship).** The music that exists only in your head ‚Äî **Diana Deutsch's dichotic illusions**, **audio-first**, headphones-required, **zero-GPU, non-black**. Strict per-ear routing: one `ChannelMergerNode(2)`, `leftBus‚Üíinput0`, `rightBus‚Üíinput1`, each a GainNode ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter ‚Üí destination, so each ear is fed a genuinely different physical stream. Three modes: **octave illusion** (400/800 Hz antiphase across ears ~4/s ‚Äî most right-handers hear one tone bouncing ear-to-ear AND jumping octave), **scale illusion** (a C-major ascending + a descending scale split note-by-note between ears ‚Üí listeners reassemble a smooth per-ear contour present in neither channel ‚Äî the clearest diagram "aha"), **tritone paradox** (diotic Shepard-pairs a half-octave apart ‚Üí up/down is listener/dialect-dependent, so it honestly refuses to label direction, `?`). Raised-cosine (equal-power) ramps, deterministic schedules (no runtime RNG). **Reveal Both/Left/Right** (ramp one ear bus ‚Üí 0 to collapse the phantom ‚Äî the built-in "aha") + **ear-swap** (percept depends on ear-dominance). Live **paper-white Canvas score** (deliberate break from the black-void house style): three lanes scroll past a playhead ‚Äî physical-L (blue), physical-R (red), perceived-phantom (violet), with an honest "perceived = right-hander model, not a measurement" caveat. Autonomous 14s illusion cycle; unmissable amber üéß advisory. `state: auditory illusion / the music only in the mind ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal/uncanny`. Named refs: **Diana Deutsch** ‚Äî octave illusion (1974), scale illusion, tritone paradox; *Musical Illusions and Phantom Words* (Oxford 2019); Shepard (1964). Ambition ~3/5 (#1 dichotic grep-0√ó ‚Äî sound generated in the listener ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ audio-first output; borderline #2 ‚Äî per-ear routing engine + illusion scheduler + diagram ‚âà 3). Files were `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`illusions.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-634/1108-two-ears/`. **Why banked (not quality):** the WIDE fire could ship only one, and 1107 won on Karel-serving playability + glance-legibility (dichotic *requires* headphones to land); 1108 is the stronger fix for the *output*-collapse axis the jury flagged (audio-first only 3√ó, genuinely under-served). **Resurrect when:** the lane wants an audio-first / headphones / eyes-closed piece ‚Äî the jury named it as the single best remaining move against output+palette monotony. **Deepen:** add **phantom words** (offset word/syllable pairs ‚Üí language-shaped hallucinated words) + the **speech-to-song illusion** (looped phrase flips into song) for a fuller Deutsch suite; and a **personal tritone calibration** (log the listener's up/down for all 12 pitch-classes ‚Üí draw their pitch-class circle, turning the paradox into a measurement of *their* speech template).
- **`1109-oceanic-breath` ‚Äî breathe yourself into an altered state.** A **breath-driven** altered-states piece on a **warm dawn (non-black)** palette: the mic senses the slow breath **envelope** (RMS, not pitch) + estimates **breaths-per-minute**; a `z ‚àà [0,1]` arousal/hypocapnia proxy **integrates** upward the longer you sustain a fast rate (`z += dt¬∑(rateNorm¬∑K_up ‚àí (1‚àírateNorm)¬∑K_down)`, K_up‚âà0.032, K_down‚âà0.02) and decays when you slow ‚Äî an honest tens-of-seconds escalation toward "oceanic boundlessness." `z` drives everything: a warm coral/gold/amber **Canvas2D bloom** that grows radial symmetry + flowing waves + a Troxler periphery-wash toward **near-white oceanic light** at peak, and the audio ‚Äî shared **`startDroneBank`** (`root 55`, `z‚ÜísetDrive`) + a breath-synced filtered-noise **wind** rising on inhale, through a `DynamicsCompressor`. Always-on **guided pacer** (Settle 5-5 / Active 2.5-2.5 / Holotropic 1.5-1.5); **no-mic ‚Üí autonomous seeded rise-and-settle arc** (never blank/silent). **NO strobe** (slow luminance drift only). Honest caveat: `z` is inferred from breath rate/loudness ‚Äî a phenomenological analog, NOT a CO‚ÇÇ/blood-flow measurement. `state: high-ventilation breathwork / oceanic boundlessness ¬∑ pole: meditative-oceanic (cosmic-ambient, warm)`. Named refs: **Grof Holotropic Breathwork** (SUNY 2010); **Fincham et al., PLOS One 27 Aug 2025** (hypocapnia ‚Üí oceanic boundlessness; breathing, not music, carries the state). Ambition ~3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems: breath envelope/bpm analysis + `z` escalation integrator + Canvas2D bloom + drone/wind = 4 ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ #5 research ¬ß634; **breath NOT claimed a lab-first** ‚Äî 1067/922/655/186 exist). Files were `page.tsx`+`breath.ts`+`audio.ts`+`scene.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-634/1109-oceanic-breath/`. **Why banked:** its primary output is **Canvas2D** (on the 2026-07-02 standing ban list) and breath is well-trodden lab-wide, so it was the weakest on the diversity gates despite the boldest warm-palette break. **Resurrect when:** rework the output off Canvas2D-primary (a warm WebGL2 bloom shader) to clear the ban; then it's a distinct warm-palette breathwork-escalation ship differentiated from the lab's *calm/cool* breath pieces. **Deepen:** real inhale/exhale-asymmetry from the mic (bloom on the user's actual phase); breath-**hold/retention** detection ‚Üí a distinct peak wash + held drone suspension; a scripted build-up‚Üípeak‚Üíintegration journey that adapts coaching to the user's real `z`.

- **‚≠ê `1106-wallpaper-deep` (TOP resurrect ‚Äî the accessible + more colourful cousin; and it IS the shipped winner's own README cycle-2 graft).** The **wallpaper autostereogram**: instead of random dots, a tileable **colour-palette psychedelic motif** repeated horizontally, whose *local horizontal period* is modulated by the hidden depth field ‚Äî `s(x,y) = P0¬∑(1 ‚àí MU¬∑depth)` (P0‚âà118px, MU‚âà0.24), turned into a repeat by accumulating **phase along each row** (`phase(x) = ‚à´‚ÇÄÀ£ dx'/s(x')`, `colour = pattern(fract(phase))`; verified numerically: flat depth ‚Üí strictly periodic at 118px, depth 0.9 ‚Üí 92.5px). The row prefix-sum is computed CPU-side on a coarse 192√ó112 grid (depth is smooth) and uploaded as an `R32F` texture the WebGL2 fused shader samples; the base pattern is a procedural GLSL motif (organic interference + a crisp per-tile dot landmark for fusing, cosine-palette coloured). **Headline feature = the parallax "wiggle" reveal** (its distinct advantage over 1105's gradient-shaded reveal): renders the hidden surface as a shaded heightfield with the wallpaper wrapped on, swaying the virtual camera and re-sampling each pixel at `x' = x ‚àí sway¬∑(depth ‚àí 0.5)` so **nearer points translate more than far ones** ‚Äî true motion parallax, unmistakable hands-free, no fusing required (the default on load). Same 4-form morph (dome‚Üítunnel‚Üíripples‚Üímandala) + relief‚ÜíJI-drone + form-state‚Üíchord + FM-bell-on-lock (reuses `startDroneBank`) through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Raw-WebGL2 (fused shader + wiggle shader). `state: geometric emergence / hidden-signal-in-noise ¬∑ pole: intense-hypnotic (more overtly colourful than 1105)`. Named refs: **David Brewster's "wallpaper illusion" (1844)**; Julesz *Foundations of Cyclopean Perception* (1971); Tyler & Clarke, "The autostereogram" (SPIE 1256, 1990). Ambition ~4/5 (#1 autostereogram grep-0√ó (shared with the shipped 1105) ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems: depth-field + wallpaper-period encoder + parallax-wiggle shader + relief‚Üíaudio = 4 ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ #5 soft RESEARCH ¬ß633). Files were `page.tsx`+`stereogram.ts`+`gl.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-633/1106-wallpaper-deep/`. **Why banked:** de-selected NOT on quality (build-complete, clean, arguably *easier to fuse* + more colourful) but because the **random-dot 1105 is the truer, more surprising ship** ‚Äî depth from pure noise with zero monocular cue is the cleaner embodiment of the cycle's Julesz "percept-in-you" thesis, and 1105's equality-chain-root colour hash is a more elegant no-strobe guarantee. **Resurrect when:** the lane wants a more overtly colourful / accessible magic-eye ‚Äî OR, better, **do it as the cycle-2 of 1105** (fold this wallpaper-texture mode in as a toggle alongside the random-dot one, adopt this truer parallax formula, and unify the JS/GLSL depth into a single source), which is exactly what 1105's README next-steps call for. **Honest caveat carried:** the depth function is duplicated JS‚ÜîGLSL (drift risk ‚Äî flagged); on hardware without `OES_texture_float_linear` the fused wallpaper is slightly blockier (the wiggle mode is unaffected). Same **desync + "Re-bind" A/B** core as the winner: motes are drawn ~550ms in the past + a fixed spatial offset + a lagged head-turn (violet-void tint), and Re-bind collapses all three to zero (emerald tint) so you feel the binding snap on/off. `state: ketamine spatial-dissociation / source de-localization ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí dissociative`. - **‚≠ê `1097-resonant-drift` (TOP resurrect ‚Äî the space IS the instrument).** The ¬ß628 concept, now built a second time and lost only on ambition/jury-alignment to the WebGPU neural field. Raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader raymarch of an endless, slowly-morphing resonant corridor (SDF tube around a serpentine spine); you drift forward (autonomous + arrow/W-S keyboard, no pointer-drag). The KEY IDEA ‚Äî **grep-0√ó in the lab**: a single `radiusAt(z,t)` (the corridor's local cavity radius) is used by BOTH the shader (to carve + tint the tube ‚Äî amber throat ‚Üí cyan/violet chamber) AND the audio engine, driving a **dynamic convolution reverb** (two crossfading ConvolverNodes, IR rebuilt ~3√ó/sec, decay ‚àù radius) + a **modal "tube singer"** bandpass at the cavity eigenfrequency (‚àù 1/radius, Q ‚Üë as the throat narrows) ‚Äî a narrow throat chokes the drone into a tight pitched-and-dry resonance, a vast chamber blooms it into a long cathedral tail. `state: NDE tunnel / meditative-boundless ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. Named ref: **Sonic4D** (arXiv:2506.15759, June 2026 ‚Äî this *inverts* it: the space is the sound-shaping apparatus, not decorated by sound). Ambition ~4/5 (#1 cross-modal geometry‚Üíreverb grep-0 ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems: SDF raymarch + dynamic convolution + modal waveguide + keyboard-drift ¬∑ #3 named ref ¬∑ #5 ¬ß628). This build's files: `page.tsx`+`shaders.ts`+`tunnel.ts` (`radiusAt` + `GLSL_TUNNEL` generated from the same constants so sight/sound can't diverge)+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-630/1097-resonant-drift/`. **Why banked (again):** de-selected on ambition + the jury's explicit WebGPU-want, NOT on quality ‚Äî it's build-complete, clean, and **love-aligned** (closest to the loved `148-spatial-palette`‚ù§Ô∏è / GPU-field-spatial cluster). **Resurrect: ready as-is;** the only open question is a live ear pass on whether the throat‚Üítube resonance reads (main-thread IR rebuild is throttled + crossfaded but can hitch on low-end machines ‚Äî a Worker/OfflineAudioContext IR bake is the obvious next hardening).
- **`1099-third-sound` ‚Äî the voice generated in your own ear (combination tones).** An **audio-first** sustained just-intonation drone built around **Tartini / difference tones**: two loud pure sines f‚ÇÅ,f‚ÇÇ make the ear's nonlinearity manufacture *audible* phantom partials that are NOT in the signal ‚Äî the difference tone f‚ÇÇ‚àíf‚ÇÅ, the cubic combination tones 2f‚ÇÅ‚àíf‚ÇÇ / 2f‚ÇÇ‚àíf‚ÇÅ, the summation tone f‚ÇÅ+f‚ÇÇ. Interval buttons/sliders + a root dial let you play the phantom chord; the central **"reveal the phantom" A/B toggle** places a faint real sine at exactly f‚ÇÇ‚àíf‚ÇÅ so a musician can confirm the pitch they were hearing in-ear was real (hiding it again is the truer state ‚Äî that A/B is the "huh"). Sines-only (harmonic-rich tones mask the phantom), soft limiter, loudness/headphones advisory. Visual (secondary, diagrammatic): a Canvas2D **Lissajous** phase portrait that locks into a still knot at simple JI ratios and tumbles at complex ones (you SEE consonance) + a log-freq spectral ladder drawing the real partials solid and the combination tones as dashed ghosts (a diagram of tones an FFT of the signal can't contain ‚Äî the poetic point). `state: meditative overtone drone / sensory-immersive threshold ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí meditative`. Named refs: **Giuseppe Tartini's *terzo suono*** (~1714); **Helmholtz**, *On the Sensations of Tone*; **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, *Dream House*** (sustained-JI sine environment where difference tones become the music); overtone/throat-singing. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 first psychoacoustic combination-tone instrument in the lab ‚Äî the sound is generated in the listener, not the signal ‚Äî grep-0√ó ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ audio-first fresh output; borderline #2 ‚Äî the diagrammatic canvas keeps it to ~3 subsystems). Files: `page.tsx`+`audio.ts`+`intervals.ts`+`scope.ts`+`README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-630/1099-third-sound/`. **Why banked:** lowest ambition of the three + thematically adjacent to the just-shipped 1096 (phantom perception, though a different mechanism ‚Äî ear-nonlinearity vs stochastic resonance). **Resurrect:** ship standalone when the lane wants an audio-first / meditative-drone piece; or graft the difference-tone reveal into a sustained-drone piece for a richer overtone instrument.

## ¬ß628 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-02 (cycle 628 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped `1095-plate-modes`, the physically-honest GPU-FDTD Chladni plate. The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-628/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule ‚Äî NOT committed. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1096.** Both dodge every 2026-07-01 ban; both are grounded in RESEARCH ¬ß628.)

- **‚≠ê `1093-resonant-drift` (TOP resurrect) ‚Äî the space IS the instrument.** Raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader raymarch of an endless, slowly-morphing resonant corridor (SDF tube around a serpentine spine); you drift forward (autonomous + arrow/W-S keyboard, no pointer-drag). The KEY IDEA ‚Äî **grep-0√ó in the lab**: the tunnel's local cavity radius *at the listener's position* drives a **dynamic convolution reverb** (a ConvolverNode whose impulse response is regenerated ~4√ó/sec as the cavity swells/chokes) + a **modal "tube singer"** bandpass at the cavity eigenfrequency (‚àù 1/radius, Q rising as the throat narrows), so a narrow throat chokes the drone into a tight pitched resonance and a vast chamber blooms into a cathedral tail. A single `radiusAt(z,t)` shared by shader + audio binds sight to sound. `state: NDE tunnel / meditative-boundless ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. Named ref: **Sonic4D** (arXiv:2506.15759, June 2026 ‚Äî spatial audio from navigable scene geometry; this *inverts* it ‚Äî the space is the sound-shaping apparatus, not decorated by sound). Ambition ~4/5 (#1 cross-modal geometry‚Üíreverb grep-0 + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems: raymarch SDF + dynamic convolution + modal waveguide + keyboard-drift + #3 named ref + #5 ¬ß628). Files existed: `page.tsx`+`shaders.ts`+`audio.ts`+`tunnel.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked not shipped:** lost to 1095 only on physical-honesty + pole-diversity (1093 is another cosmic-ambient after a recent run of them); it is the most research-fresh (June-2026 paper) and closest to the spatial loves (`148-spatial-palette`‚ù§Ô∏è) ‚Äî a strong near-term ship. **Resurrect:** it's ready as-is; a live ear pass on whether the throat‚Üítube resonance reads is the only open question.
- **`1094-dither-veil` ‚Äî ordered dithering as a psychedelic engine.** Raw-WebGL2 full-screen fragment shader: domain-warped fbm (IQ triple-warp) crushed through a hand-coded **8√ó8 Bayer ordered-dither** matrix to 2‚Äì4 luminance levels, so smooth gradients shatter into a boiling 1-bit stipple that swims/reorganizes into moving moir√© ‚Äî the closed-eye/hypnagogic entoptic grain. Mic (analysis-only) amplitude ‚Üí warp speed + boil rate + RGB fringe; spectral centroid ‚Üí cyan/magenta tint; autonomous LFO fallback when mic denied. Audio: low JI oscillator cluster + slow filtered-noise wash, tremolo locked to the visual boil rate. **Ordered/Bayer dithering is grep-0√ó in the lab.** `state: hypnagogia / closed-eye entoptic grain ¬∑ pole: intense` (grain, NOT strobe ‚Äî mean brightness held ~constant, boil clamped ‚â§3 Hz, reduced-motion aware). Named refs: **ASTRODITHER** (Robert Borghesi), Bridget Riley / Ryoji Ikeda op-art, IQ domain-warping. Ambition ~3/5 (#1 ordered-dither grep-0 + #3 named ref + #5 ¬ß628; borderline #2 ‚Äî it's essentially shader+drone, the 2-subsystem shape). Files existed: `page.tsx`+`shader.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`. **Why banked:** lowest ambition of the three + the "pretty shader + drone" shape the mandate warns against ‚Äî but the **dither aesthetic itself is genuinely new to the lab** and worth resurrecting **paired with a stronger substrate** (e.g. dither the Chladni field of 1095, or a hand-tracked op-art surface) so it clears the ambition floor on subsystems too.

- **‚≠ê `1091-filament-bridge` (RESURRECT ‚Äî the WebGPU-compute sibling of the shipped cycle-3 merge; resurrect for a live GPU pass, or once raw-WebGL2 has had its turn and WebGPU-compute has cooled):** identical concept to the shipped `1092-filament-lattice` ‚Äî the cosmic-web cycle-3 graph MERGE ‚Äî but implemented over **1089's exact WGSL WebGPU-compute spine** (atomic i32 ping-pong trail buffers, two-species agent/diffuse/render/reduce passes) instead of raw-WebGL2 fragment shaders. Keeps 1089's Jones two-species Physarum + radial-ray **degree** + gravitational accretion, and adds the same three new subsystems the winner has: (1) **adjacency-edge extraction** (sample the trail field along each node-pair segment, coverage ‚â•60% above a ridge threshold = an edge, smoothed + hysteresis-gated so flicker can't spam events); (2) the extracted edges **drawn** as glowing lines on a transparent Canvas2D overlay above the compute canvas (new edges flash white ~1s, woven nodes get a warm clustering ring ‚Äî closes the see‚Üíhear loop); (3) the graph **sonified** ‚Äî edge **interval dyads** between endpoint pitches + a bright FM "connection formed" chime per new edge, **local clustering coefficient** ‚Üí chord density/brightness (woven node = fuller/brighter, lonely bridge node = thin fundamental), and the accretion **awe crescendo**. Built complete this fire (`page.tsx`+`physarum.ts`+`gpu.ts`+`audio.ts`+`notes.ts`+`README.md`; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 + scoped eslint 0; `any` confined to a minimal `navigator.gpu` shim behind one eslint-disable; its reduce uses a block-max at 128¬≤ so thin filaments survive downsampling for edge sampling). **Why banked not shipped:** both siblings cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-01 ban; the raw-WebGL2 `1092` won on (a) **output diversity ‚Äî the whole point of this two-output DEEP fire** ‚Äî raw-WebGL2 is jury #1's actively-wanted output and only 1√ó in the window (1085), whereas shipping the WebGPU-compute `1091` would be the **3rd WebGPU-compute in the last 4 fires** (after 1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of; and (b) **stronger headless verification** ‚Äî the `1092` builder ran a real `tsx` harness against its live `physarum.ts`+`graph.ts` and confirmed the edge/clustering math numerically (a 3-node cluster ‚Üí 3 edges, coverage 1.0, clustering 1.0), while `1091` could only *reason* its `EDGE_RIDGE=0.85`/`coverage‚â•0.6` thresholds from 1089's working 0.9 degree threshold, not confirm edge-formation timing. **Resurrect when:** a fire can bless a live GPU pass (its WGSL edge-sampling readback timing is the un-tuned part), OR as the honest cycle-4 that unifies both render paths. Files at `/tmp/dream-losers-627/1091-filament-bridge/`. Named refs carried: Jones 2010; Codis/Pogosyan/Pichon 2018 (arXiv:1803.11477, cosmic-web connectivity ‚Äî degree/clustering); arXiv:2510.10286 (Oct 2025, neuron‚Üîcosmos graph parallels); Euclid Q1 DR XXXV (A&A 2026, arXiv:2503.15332). ## ¬ß626 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-01 (cycle 626 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers across 3 DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT targets; shipped `1090-threshold-descent` (audio-first/SVG ‚Äî the lab's least-repeated output, the directest answer to "too similar"). - **‚≠ê `1092-liquid-melt` (RESURRECT ‚Äî TOP resurrect; strongest engineering of the fire):** "What if your VOICE could melt the world into fluid?" A genuine **Jos Stam stable-fluids Navier‚ÄìStokes** solver ‚Äî semi-Lagrangian advection, vorticity confinement, divergence + Jacobi pressure-solve (20‚Äì40 iters) + gradient-subtract projection, dye advection ‚Äî implemented on **BOTH** a WebGPU-compute path (six WGSL passes over ping-pong `rg32float`/`rgba16float` storage textures, fullscreen-quad render, downsampled dye+velocity readback) AND a true CPU/Canvas2D fallback running the identical algorithm (with `‚óè GPU`/`‚óè CPU` badge). The mic (AnalyserNode ‚Äî RMS level + spectral centroid, analyse-only, no playback) injects dye+force positionally into the fluid; a throttled fluid-stats readback (mean speed/vorticity) drives a shared JI drone-bank's brightness + a pad glide **back** into the sound ‚Äî a closed **mic‚Üífluid‚Üíaudio** loop. DMT/psilocybin surface-liquefaction, iridescent oily palette, autonomous wandering injection so it melts within ~2s with zero permissions. Built complete this fire (`page.tsx`+`gpu.ts`+`fluid.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; `tsc`/eslint clean; `any` confined to the minimal `navigator.gpu` shim behind one eslint-disable). **Why banked not shipped:** (1) the GPU-fluid *substrate is NOT a lab-first* ‚Äî `15-webgpu-fluid` and `3-fluid` already exist (the grep-first discipline; its genuine 0√ó novelty is the closed mic‚Üífluid‚Üíaudio feedback loop + the melt framing, not the solver); (2) shipping it would be the **4th WebGPU-compute in the 15-window / 3rd in a row** (after 1086-lenia + 1089-cosmic-connectome) ‚Äî the exact output-monoculture the 2026-07-01 jury warns of ("the render target keeps sliding one seat over"). **Resurrect when:** WebGPU-compute has cooled for a fire or two, OR a fire can bless a live GPU/mic verification pass (the feedback-loop *feel* is the un-verified part). Files at `/tmp/dream-losers-626/1092-liquid-melt/`. Named refs: Stam "Stable Fluids" (SIGGRAPH 1999) + "Real-Time Fluid Dynamics for Games" (2003); Fedkiw/Stam vorticity confinement; kishimisu WebGPU-fluid + Codrops 2025 + 80.lv MLS-MPM 2025 (the fresh WebGPU-fluid frontier). Tags: mic INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute (+ CPU fallback) OUTPUT ¬∑ Stam Navier‚ÄìStokes + vorticity + closed audio-feedback TECHNIQUE ¬∑ DMT liquid-melt intense VIBE.

- **‚≠ê `1091-fourth-turn` (RESURRECT ‚Äî the raw-WebGL2 "hear the invisible rotation" sibling; reframe honestly as cycle-N of the 1042/1051 4D thread):** "What if you could HEAR a rotation you cannot see?" A real 4D polytope (tesseract / 16-cell / 24-cell ‚Äî **verified** edge counts 32 / 24 / 96 asserted at load via `verifyGeometry()`) tumbling through **six independent rotation planes** (XY, XZ, YZ visible + XW, YW, ZW "impossible"), projected R‚Å¥‚ÜíR¬≥‚ÜíR¬≤ and drawn in **raw WebGL2** as additive glowing edge-quads with an RGBA16F ping-pong afterglow trail. Each plane's smoothed angular speed swells **one of six just-intonation voices** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over ~110 Hz); the three W-plane voices sit an octave up with detune + shimmer LFO ‚Äî so when you spin up a W-plane its 2D shadow barely moves but you HEAR the impossible turn. Input: auto-tumble + keys 1‚Äì6 (hold to spin a plane) + arrows (W-planes) + device-tilt; no pointer-drag. Built complete this fire (`page.tsx`+`polytope.ts`+`gl.ts`+`audio.ts`+`README.md`; `tsc`/eslint clean, no `any`). **Why banked not shipped:** the **4D-polytope substrate is NOT a lab-first** ‚Äî `1042-hyperspace-bloom` (raymarch) and `1051-hand-hyperspace` (Canvas2D) already ship it, both six-plane stereographic (the grep-first discipline caught this before the claim went out). ## ¬ß625 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-07-01 (cycle 625 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **DEEP** cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web` ‚Äî 2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept ("the cosmic web's connectivity as the instrument"); shipped `1089-cosmic-connectome` (the radial ray-count degree take ‚Äî the truer Euclid-2026 connectivity statistic + continuous voicing that's robust headless). The non-winner below was **built complete** by a parallel builder + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-625/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **Resurrect at a fresh number ‚â•1091.**)

- **‚≠ê `1090-web-weaver` (RESURRECT ‚Äî the adjacency-graph + edge-event sibling; it is literally the winner's own README next-step #2, "true edge graph"):** cycle-2/3 of the cosmic-web thread via a *different* graph-extraction method than the shipped 1089. Where 1089 counts filaments radiating from each node (radial rays ‚Üí degree), 1090 builds an **actual node-edge graph**: for every pair of seeded wells within range, sample the trail field along the segment between them; if a sustained above-threshold filament bridges them, record an **edge**; from the edge set compute each node's true graph degree ‚Üí the same JI degree‚Üíchord voicing. Two things 1089 lacks and this does better: (1) it **draws the extracted edges as glowing lines over the slime**, so the reviewer literally *sees* the graph the sound is reading (closes the see‚Üíhear loop); (2) it rings a bright FM **"connection formed" chime** the instant a filament first bridges two nodes (a discrete, satisfying musical event; edges use rising-edge memory so a one-frame flicker doesn't spam). Plus the same gravitational accretion/merge. Built complete this fire (WebGPU-compute primary + true CPU/Canvas2D fallback, `graph.ts` doing adjacency + degree + edge-events + softened-gravity accretion; self-contained `audio.ts`; `tsc`/eslint clean). **Why banked not shipped:** its per-node chord + link chimes depend on the edge-detection thresholds (`ridgeThreshold`/`minCoverage`) actually firing, and on the GPU path the coarse (128¬≤/96¬≤) area-averaged readback can dilute thin filaments ‚Äî un-tunable without a live browser, so it risks going event-silent at the 06:30 glance; 1089's continuous degree voicing always sings. **Resurrect when:** a fire can bless a live GPU/audio tuning pass, OR as a genuine **cycle-3** that *merges* the two ‚Äî draw 1090's adjacency edges (which nodes connect) on top of 1089's truer radial degree (how many filaments), voicing shared edges as interval dyads between endpoint pitches (1089 README next-step #2). Files preserved at `/tmp/dream-losers-625/1090-web-weaver/`. Named refs carried: Jones 2010; Euclid Q1 DR XXXV (A&A 2026/07); Elek/Burchett UCSC 2020. Tags: discrete-tap-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT ¬∑ WebGPU-compute OUTPUT ¬∑ adjacency-graph-extraction + edge-events + accretion TECHNIQUE ¬∑ cosmic-web‚Üíawe VIBE.

## ¬ß624 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-07-01 (cycle 624 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ **WIDE** ‚Äî 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT target (the directest attack on the jury's render-monoculture complaint); shipped `1086-lenia-organisms` (the WebGPU-compute Lenia continuous-CA ‚Äî the today's-research‚Üíbuild path (a) chain, cashing the jury's #1 wanted output). The two non-winners below were **built complete** by parallel builders + builder-verified `tsc --noEmit` 0 + folder-eslint clean, then `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-624/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **Resurrect at fresh numbers ‚â•1089** (the working numbers 1087/1088 are now free but a fresh number avoids any confusion).)

Both are strong and one clean fire from demoable, and both hit a **non-banned OUTPUT the jury actively wants** (raw-WebGL2; audio-first/SVG). `1087-fourth-turn` is the top resurrect ‚Äî raw-WebGL2 is jury-wanted and the "hear the rotation you can't see" hook is genuinely distinct.

- **‚≠ê fourth-turn (was 1087) ‚Äî "a shape rotating in 4 dimensions your eyes can't fully follow, made legible by making the invisible rotation something you HEAR."** INTENSE DMT impossible-geometry. INPUT device **tilt** (DeviceOrientation beta/gamma bias which 4D rotation planes engage) + arrow-key/button fallback + autonomous slow tumble (all **non-pointer-drag**). OUTPUT raw **WebGL2** (`#version 300 es`; additive glowing-edge ribbons + point-sprite vertex orbs, RGBA16F ping-pong afterglow trail, tonemapped present; Canvas2D fallback). TECHNIQUE genuine **4D polytope** ‚Äî R‚Å¥ vertices/edges for the **tesseract / 16-cell / 24-cell** (computed edge lists verified 16v/32e ¬∑ 8v/24e ¬∑ 24v/96e), **six independent 4D rotation planes** (XY, XZ, XW, YZ, YW, ZW) composited each frame, R‚Å¥‚ÜíR¬≥ (w-perspective, producing the cube-in-cube nesting) then R¬≥‚ÜíR¬≤ projection. AUDIO **six just-intonation voices** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over ~110 Hz), each voice's gain/detune/brightness tracks the angular velocity of ONE rotation plane ‚Äî so the "impossible" W-planes (XW/YW/ZW) are *audible* while their 2D shadow barely moves (hue cyan=visible vs rose=invisible reinforces it); drone bed + reverb ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; auto-demo tumbles hard through the W-planes so the invisible voices bloom with zero input. Built complete this fire (files: `page.tsx` + `polytope.ts` + `gl.ts` + `audio.ts` + `README.md`); builder `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 + folder-eslint clean; polytope counts validated by direct execution. **Why banked-not-shipped:** all three cleared the floor + dodged every ban; 1086's Lenia won on being the jury's #1 wanted output (WebGPU-compute, the "template" DNA), higher ambition (4/5 vs 3/5), and the most-literal research‚Üíbuild chain. **1087's distinct value:** raw-WebGL2 is the OTHER jury-wanted output, and the cross-modal "hear the 4th dimension" mechanic is a genuinely fresh idea. **To resurrect:** rebuild from `/tmp/dream-losers-624/1087-fourth-turn/`; deepening ‚Äî the fixed-order plane compositing is one valid tumble path not a commutative rotor (consider true 4D rotors / bivector exponentials); tune tilt‚Üíplane biasing per device; add a legible chord/plane-rate readout; a live GPU verification pass; consider stereographic projection + a 120-cell. `state: DMT hyperspace / impossible non-Euclidean geometry ¬∑ pole: intense`. Ambition (honest 3/5): #1 lab-first technique (4D polytope, grep-0√ó) + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (R‚Å¥ rotor math + WebGL2 projection render + tilt/keyboard input + six-plane‚ÜíJI synth) + #3 named refs (Banchoff, *Beyond the Third Dimension* 1990; Alicia Boole Stott; QRI *Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT*).
- **‚≠ê threshold (was 1088) ‚Äî "a near-death tunnel-toward-the-light rendered almost entirely in SOUND ‚Äî you descend toward stillness by slowing your own pulse."** COSMIC-AMBIENT NDE / hypnagogic ‚Äî the jury's actively-wanted **audio-first / SVG** screen-bias breaker (only `1073` prior). INPUT discrete **slow taps as a pulse** (tap/click/Space sets your breath/heart tempo; **slowing** your taps deepens the descent; **no mic, no camera, no pointer-drag**). OUTPUT deliberately **audio-first / minimal SVG** (near-black; faint concentric tunnel rings contract toward a central luminous dot as depth rises; a soft per-tap pulse marker; readable depth/BPM text ‚Äî NO GPU spectacle; this proves the render target can be SVG). TECHNIQUE real spatial + spectral audio ‚Äî **HRTF `PannerNode`s** ring 8 JI tone-sources around the listener's head and slide inward/forward toward a point ahead as you descend (equal-power stereo fallback if HRTF absent); a **Risset/Shepard endless glissando** descends as you slow (unresolved "falling-toward"); a JI drone whose bright "light" partial emerges only at deepest stillness; a slow binaural-beat pair. AUDIO routes through shared `startShepard` (`dir:-1`) + `startDroneBank` + `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí master `DynamicsCompressor`/limiter; ~80s autonomous descend‚Üíreturn auto-demo so the arc plays headless. Built complete this fire (files: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `pulse.ts` + `README.md`); builder `tsc --noEmit` + folder-eslint clean. **Why banked-not-shipped:** it's the jury's wanted audio-first/SVG output and a lovely calm piece, BUT audio-first is the hardest to verify headless (the spatial tunnel is only truly confirmable by ear on headphones, and the stereo fallback loses front/back+elevation), so it's the natural bank when a WebGPU-compute sibling most directly discharges the jury's stated #1 demand. **Resurrection value:** the audio-first/SVG category is chronically thin (screen-bias) and the descend-by-slowing pulse mechanic is an elegant non-pointer input; resurrect on a fire that wants a mobile/headphone/eyes-closed piece OR bless an audio hand-verify pass. **To resurrect:** rebuild from `/tmp/dream-losers-624/1088-threshold/`; deepening ‚Äî a true head-tracked listener (DeviceOrientation) so turning your head moves the tunnel, and consider a real breath-mic option for the pulse. `state: near-death threshold / tunnel-to-light, hypnagogic stillness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. Ambition (honest 3/5): #1 lab-first category (audio-first/minimal-SVG, only 1073 prior) + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (tap-pace input + HRTF tunnel ring + Risset endless-descent + missing-fundamental light) + #3 named refs (Risset; Shepard; Blackmore, *Dying to Live*; Moody, *Life After Life*).

**This fire finally SHIPPED an embodied hand-tracked piece** (the jury's #3, un-cashed for four windows) by running a DEEP fire *committed* to it ‚Äî both approaches engineered so the **autonomous fallback is itself a finished electric performance**, which dissolves the "zero-permission sibling always wins the 06:30 glance" tiebreaker that had banked it every prior WIDE fire. The winner 1085 is the DBM/Laplacian-growth (physical) approach; the sibling below is the procedural fractal-bolt approach ‚Äî a worthwhile contrast to resurrect (physical grid-relaxation growth vs recursive midpoint-displacement).

- **‚≠ê tesla-hands (was 1086) ‚Äî "your two hands are Tesla coils; forked lightning leaps the gap and each bolt + its branches ring a chord you sculpt by spreading your palms."** INTENSE electric, embodied ‚Äî the *procedural* sibling of the shipped physical DBM piece. INPUT hand-tracking (MediaPipe `HandLandmarker` via jsDelivr CDN ESM `webpackIgnore`, NOT an npm dep; 2 palms ‚Üí 2 arc endpoints; **hand separation ‚Üí root/interval pitch** so you voice harmony with the gap; openness ‚Üí branch fury) with a **strong autonomous two-drifter Lissajous fallback** so it's fully headless. OUTPUT raw **WebGL2** (`#version 300 es`; persistent RGBA16F accumulation FBO w/ per-frame decay afterglow, additive **3-pass ribbon bolts** cyan-halo‚Üíviolet‚Üíarc-white core, point-sprite endpoint orbs, bloom + Reinhard tone-map + vignette present pass; Canvas2D fallback of the same bolts). TECHNIQUE **recursive midpoint-displacement fractal bolt** (Reed & Wyvill, "Visual simulation of lightning," SIGGRAPH 1994): split each segment, offset the midpoint perpendicular ‚àù segment length, recurse to depth ~6, probabilistically spawn dimmer branches; regenerate every ~4 Hz re-strike with fresh randomness so the arc writhes; a **fury slider** scales offset magnitude + branch probability (taut arc ‚Üî wild storm). AUDIO each new branch head = FM bell quantized to a JI **pentatonic** by screen height (a many-branched strike rings as a *chord/arpeggio*), gap‚Üíroot, band-passed crackle, per-strike thunder sub-boom + shimmer, over shared `startDroneBank` + `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`, capped self-cleaning polyphony; gesture-gated. Safe: thin bright bolts on stable near-black, afterglow-fade (cannot full-frame strobe) + `createSafeFlicker` (‚â§3 Hz, floor 0.72) gate on global luminance + instant Stop. Built complete this fire (files: `page.tsx` + `bolt.ts` + `gl.ts` + `audio.ts` + `hands.ts` + `README.md`); builder `tsc` project-wide 0 + scoped-eslint clean. **Why banked-not-shipped:** both approaches cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-01 ban and both have robust autonomous demos ‚Äî 1085's DBM won on being the **more rigorous / more surprising** technique (a real Laplacian-growth physics sim via grid relaxation, the literal named ¬ß622 ‚≠ê + the jury's exact phrasing), the stronger signature control (Œ∑ bushy‚Üîforked maps a real physics parameter), and better UX (an in-page design-notes modal vs 1086's `window.alert`). 1086's **distinct value:** the **gap‚Üíroot harmonic-sculpting** mechanic (voice a chord by spreading your hands) is genuinely different from 1085's pitch‚àùheight mapping, the 3-pass ribbon bolt look is gorgeous and cheaper, and the physical-vs-procedural contrast is worth a shipped pair. **To resurrect:** rebuild from `/tmp/dream-losers-623/1086-tesla-hands/`; deepening ‚Äî fix the `window.alert` design-notes into an in-page modal, add a two-hand "charge between the palms" clench gesture, tune the shader glow + branch-fury on a real GPU/webcam, and consider a chord-quality readout so the harmonic sculpting is legible. `state: tesla-arc / electric-intense ¬∑ pole: intense`. Ambition (honest 3/5): #1 lab-first technique (recursive-fractal-bolt lightning, grep-0√ó) + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (hand-tracking + fractal-bolt generator + WebGL2 accumulation renderer + FM/crackle synth + drone) + #3 named ref (Reed & Wyvill, SIGGRAPH 1994).

high Œ± jumps + stitches unplayed sequences, looser timing) ‚Äî each generated note re-fires the sound AND bursts particles; rising Œ± raises turbulence/count so orderly echoes ‚Üí churning intense field. **AUDIO** 12-voice JI pluck synth (exp-decay, detuned partials, per-voice LPF) through shared `createVoidReverb` over `startDroneBank`, both Œ±-driven ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; the rough edges the builder flagged ‚Äî replace the cheap sinusoidal pseudo-curl with true curl-noise, and tune the visual heat curve + audio-density balance at high Œ± on a real GPU. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 record-and-recombine-your-own-input (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚â•4 subsystems (onset recorder + Markov generator + WebGL2 particle sim + JI synth + drone/void) ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß619. **For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the shared/collective state, the "order emerges from a shared medium" framing; pick it when you want the two participants dissolved INTO one field (not shown as two beings), the literal Kuramoto order-parameter as the coherence signal, or a turbulent‚Üícoherent standing-wave visual. Its transition is the subtler read on a phone glance, which is exactly why it lost to the more self-evident two-beings 1077 ‚Äî resurrect with an ear pass so the beating‚Üícoherent audio arc is verified.** *"What if two people, apart, poured their separate rhythms into ONE shared field ‚Äî and a single coherent pattern crystallised out of the medium as they fell into sync?"* `state: collective trance / emergent coherence ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí collective-ecstatic`. **INPUT** discrete tapped onsets (Spacebar / click ‚Äî NOT drag) ‚Üí tempo (median IOI) + phase; **partner** via `BroadcastChannel("shared-veil")` (per-tab id, peers pruned >5 s) with a mandatory synthetic **"current"** that entrains over ~34 s (ease-in-out) so the arc plays on one tab, + idle self-pulse. **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** ‚Äî ONE field filling the frame (coupled-oscillator lattice / two-source wave-interference): incoherent = scattered/turbulent, muted violet/cyan; coherent = a single clean gold-white standing figure; the order **sweeps the frame** (deliberately NOT a center-out bloom). **THE ENGINE** the **Kuramoto order parameter** `r = |mean(e^{iŒ∏_k})|` over the participating phases is the coherence index (slewed to a felt state); light phase-coupling K so tapping near the partner's beat accelerates the lock (coherence feels earned). **AUDIO** composes shared `startDroneBank` (two layers detuned apart ‚Üí beating; ramp to unison as `r` rises) + `createVoidReverb` ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor`; 2-op FM JI tap-bells; master lowpass murky‚Üíclear with `r`; a collective JI chord rings at sustained coherence. **Why it's promising:** it's the more conceptually surprising metaphor (order self-organising out of a shared medium is a stronger "collective consciousness" image than two avatars meeting), and it uses the *literal* named order parameter, so the Kuramoto/Strogatz grounding is exact. **Why de-selected this fire:** both siblings cleared the floor + dodged every ban + carry the synthetic-partner (headless-verifiable) ‚Äî but 1077's two-beings-drifting-together makes the SOCIAL concept self-evident on a 06:30 phone glance, whereas 1078's turbulent‚Üícoherent field is the subtler transition to read, and legibility-at-a-glance is the jury's #1 standing liability. **To resurrect:** rebuild from this brief and verify the beating‚Üícoherent audio arc + the standing-figure crystallisation by ear/eye on a device; the deepening is N>2 presences (a shared *room*, true `r` over many phases) + a genuine WebRTC copy-paste-SDP cross-device path. Named refs: Y. Kuramoto (1975) "Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators" (the order parameter); Steven Strogatz, *Sync* (2003); Frontiers in Cognition (2026) interbrain-synchrony hyperscanning review. ### `1071-tremor-core` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê (the EGOCENTRIC "you are suspended at Earth's core in a black void, and every quake arrives as an HRTF strike out of the dark from its true bearing/depth" ‚Äî the purest NDE-void framing, the more *surprising* of the two siblings, and the one that nails the owed dark pole hardest)

routed through `PannerNode(panningModel:"HRTF")` ‚Üí shared `createVoidReverb` (~9 s cavern) over a very-low `startDroneBank` (root ~33), master‚Üícompressor‚Üídestination; ~14-voice cap, 120 ms spacing. **Why it's promising:** the egocentric "inside the void, surrounded" framing is the more literal NDE phenomenology (the owed dark pole), more *surprising* than a data-globe, and aligns with Karel's loved *spatial-presence* cluster (`148-spatial-palette`‚ù§Ô∏è / `107-ocean-presence`‚ù§Ô∏è). **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor + dodged every ban + are genuine spatial instruments, but `1070`'s rotating globe + rings-at-true-location give an immediately legible, moving visual at 06:30 *without headphones* (the more headless-verifiable sibling, denting the jury's #1 verification-debt liability), whereas `1071`'s intentionally near-black void + headphone-dependent HRTF bearing is the *least* legible on a phone glance. **To resurrect:** rebuild from this brief, ideally with **head-tracking** (device-orientation / WebXR) so you can physically turn toward a strike ‚Äî the device-only payoff that justified deferring it ‚Äî plus a whispered place-name from the strike's bearing and depth-banded reverb. ### `1069-entity-swarm` ‚Äî `queued` (the discrete geometric-BEINGS substrate: a `THREE.InstancedMesh` swarm instead of a point-field ‚Äî InstancedMesh is the fresher output form for the lab, only 1 prior use)
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the INTENSE / DMT-breakthrough pole; pick it when you want the body multiplied into a swarm of discrete spinning GEOMETRIC ENTITIES (polyhedra you can count as beings) rather than a luminous dust-field, OR when the lane wants a non-point-cloud three.js output.** *"You are surrounded by a crystalline swarm of geometric beings, each one made of you, tiled across more directions than there should be."* `state: DMT hyperspace / geometric entities ¬∑ pole: intense`. **INPUT** full-body MediaPipe pose (the proven runtime-CDN `new Function` loader, 13 joints ‚Üí motion/lift/spread; synthetic demo-body fallback, emerald/amber badge). **OUTPUT** one `THREE.InstancedMesh` of ~7,500 octahedra (13 joints √ó 16 symmetry copies √ó 36/cell ‚Äî NOT a point cloud, NOT a fragment shader): an 8-fold radial kaleidoscope + z-mirror around the view axis; per-frame `setMatrixAt` (+`instanceMatrix.needsUpdate`) places each instance at the eased kaleidoscopic reflection of its joint, pushed along a radial shell, with a continuous per-instance spin (own axis+rate, sped by drive) and motion-scaled size; `instanceColor` ramps indigo‚Üímagenta‚Üígold-white by depth+energy, additive over near-black indigo. **AUDIO** composes the SAME 3 shared `_shared/psych/` engines on one slewed `drive` (motion+lift+spread): `startShepard` (rising) + `startDroneBank` (drive opens lowpass+sat) + `createVoidReverb` (wet blooms) + a JI bell on limb strikes ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Camera *rolls* (accelerating with drive) instead of strobing ‚Äî ‚â§3 Hz. **Why it's promising:** discrete spinning polyhedra read more literally as "geometric beings / entity contact" (the DMT phenomenology) than a dust-field does, and `InstancedMesh` is the lab's fresher output form. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor + dodged every ban + are genuine embodied instruments, but 1068's luminous point-field sits in Karel's loved cluster (particle fields), reads as the more enveloping "more directions than there should be," and is GPU-scalable toward the ~1M-particle Osaka frontier the research cites ‚Äî whereas 1069 is CPU-`setMatrixAt`-bound at ~7,500 instances (its own README's deepening is "push onto GPU toward the million-particle frontier"). **To resurrect:** rebuild from this brief, but push the per-instance matrix+color update onto the GPU (WebGPU compute / instanced shader attributes) so it can scale to tens/hundreds of thousands of beings, AND add **emergent flocking between the symmetry copies** so the geometric beings appear to regard + respond to one another (true entity-contact) + a breakthrough threshold where the camera passes *through* the swarm. Named refs: "Waves of Connection" (Osaka Expo 2025); Graham St John, *DMT Hyperspace* (2018); Kl√ºver form-constants; Shepard / Risset. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1069-entity-swarm/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `swarm.ts` + `audio.ts` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to scratchpad `banked-611/1069-entity-swarm/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1066-membrane-veil` ‚≠ê RESURRECT ‚Äî `queued` (a genuinely different membrane substrate: the FDTD/digital-waveguide *wave field* ‚Äî resurrect with the true AudioWorklet path to make it a real lab-first "the audio IS the literal surface")
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the INTENSE / salvia membrane-reality pole; pick it when you want a membrane piece whose *visual* is propagating WAVEFRONTS (not a stretched mesh) and whose audio is the surface's own vibration. The fresh axis vs the shipped 1065 is the substrate: a 2D digital-waveguide mesh / FDTD wave-equation field instead of a mass-spring lattice.** *"The sound you hear is the skin you touch ‚Äî one 2D waveguide-mesh surface, read as both light and voice."* `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality ¬∑ pole: intense`. **INPUT** multi-touch / mouse strike-stroke-flick + a labelled tension slider (retunes the membrane). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** field of the vibrating surface ‚Äî deep indigo at rest, displacement magnitude ‚Üí iridescent cyan‚Üímagenta‚Üígold, additive `lighter` bloom rings radiating from each strike, trail wash. **TECHNIQUE** an 84√ó84 circular-masked **2D digital-waveguide mesh / FDTD** (`mesh.ts`): 5-point Laplacian leapfrog update `u_next = (Œ£4-neighbours)/2 ‚àí u_prev`, scaled by a tension‚ÜíCourant coefficient clamped to `C¬≤‚àà[0.18,0.49]` (strictly under the 2D CFL 0.5 ceiling) + a dissipative `DAMP<1` + per-sample `[‚àí4,4]` clamp + NaN-scrub ‚Üí unconditionally stable under minutes of hard striking; strike = localized Gaussian impulse, stroke = path energy injection, flick = directional traveling wave, faint autonomous breathing when idle; strike position selects which standing modes light up (timbre, not just loudness). **AUDIO** the builder chose **approach (b)** ‚Äî a modal resonator bank tuned to the membrane's Bessel-zero ratios, fundamental from the tension param (pentatonic-minor quantized), excited by `|sin(m‚ÇìœÄx)¬∑sin(m·µßœÄy)|`-weighted strikes ‚Üí master lowpass opening on surface energy ‚Üí reverb ‚Üí limiter. **Why it's promising:** the wavefront visual is distinct and gorgeous (you SEE the ripples cross and interfere), and position‚Üítimbre makes it feel like a real drumhead. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor and are fully-verifiable Canvas2D membranes, but 1065 is the literal 4-cycle-deferred ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST with the more visceral press-pull-**TEAR** gesture (rupture rims = the salvia membrane-reality the brief asks for), whereas 1066's headline novelty ‚Äî "the audio is the *literal* per-sample surface" ‚Äî collapsed when it fell back to a modal bank (approach b), making its voice similar to 1065's, and its design-notes link points at a non-served `/README.md` route. **To resurrect:** ship with the **AudioWorklet streaming path (approach a)** ‚Äî run the (decimated) wave step at audio rate, read one listening node as the output sample stream ‚Äî so the audio is genuinely the membrane's own vibration (THEN it's a real lab-first); fix the README link to an in-page notes toggle like 1065's; verify the strike‚Üíripple‚Üíring coupling by eye + ear on a device. Named refs: Scott A. Van Duyne & Julius O. Smith III, *The 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh* (IEEE WASPAA / CCRMA, 1993); Stefan Bilbao, *Numerical Sound Synthesis* (FDTD membranes/plates, 2009). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1066-membrane-veil/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `mesh.ts` + `audio.ts` + `render.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to scratchpad `banked-608/1066-membrane-veil/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1065-skin-membrane` ‚úÖ SHIPPED cycle 608 (was ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST, deferred 4 cycles) ‚Äî `demoable`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the INTENSE pole (last several ships were cosmic-ambient ‚Äî intense is owed); and the single easiest piece to hand-verify in the whole lab (mouse + Canvas2D, zero permissions, runtime-checked stable over 600 frames) ‚Äî pick it specifically to dent the jury's standing #1 verification-debt liability or to swing the pole back to intense.** *"Press, pull, and TEAR a living skin of sound with your hands."* `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality ¬∑ pole: intense`. **INPUT** multi-touch / mouse press-pull-flick (a soft-brush force with flick momentum; non-mic, active). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** mesh draw ‚Äî quads shaded by local areal strain (slack ‚Üí deep indigo, taut ‚Üí iridescent magenta/gold), glowing tension lines, hot rupture rims, pinned boundary frame. **TECHNIQUE** a pure mass-spring membrane solver (`membrane.ts`): 52√ó52 point masses with structural (4-neighbour) + shear (diagonal) + bend (2-away) springs, pinned drumhead boundary, symplectic Euler √ó 2 substeps + velocity damping, per-spring strain tracking with `TEAR_STRAIN` spring-snapping, a faint autonomous breathing field so it's alive-when-idle. Drives **physical modal synthesis** (`audio.ts`): 8 bandpass resonators on a circular drumhead's Bessel-zero modal ratios (1.000, 1.593, 2.136, 2.296, 2.653, 2.918, 3.156, 3.501); mean spring stretch (tension) ‚Üí fundamental via `setTargetAtTime` portamento; a master lowpass opens with brightness; pluck/tear energy injects noise-burst excitation; a quiet continuous excitation keeps the modes singing so tension is *audible* in the steady tone, not just on strikes; small feedback-delay reverb for body. **Why it's promising:** pitch is physical + continuous (no note-tapping), it's a real instrument (your hands bend the chord), it's the first psych-lane mass-spring sim, and it runs + sounds on literally any device with a mouse ‚Äî zero green-but-unseen risk. **Why de-selected this cycle:** all three cleared the floor, but 1064 discharges the most-cited unclaimed lever (real-piano carrier, JURY #2) with the most-visible research‚Üíbuild chain; 1065 is the perfect one-fire-away intense + verifiable counterweight. **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the tear/pluck transients + tension-glide by ear on a device; consider it the moment the lane wants an intense swing OR a guaranteed-verifiable ship. Named refs: Thomas Jakobsen, *Advanced Character Physics* (verlet/PBD, 2001); circular-membrane modal synthesis / Bessel-zero ratios. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1065-skin-membrane/` ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `membrane.ts` + `audio.ts` + `render.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-607/1065-skin-membrane/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1066-bloom-conductor` ‚Äî `queued` (brings WebGPU compute back as a played resonating body ‚Äî JURY #4)
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the INTENSE / DMT-breakthrough pole; pick it when the lane wants WebGPU compute back (jury #4) AS something you play, not a fragment-shader screensaver.** *"A breathing fractal chrysanthemum is a RESONATING BODY you sculpt with your hand ‚Äî and seeding it plays the chord."* `state: DMT chrysanthemum / breakthrough bloom ¬∑ pole: intense`. **INPUT** pointer/touch seeds + conducts (non-mic, active). **OUTPUT** **WebGPU compute** Gray‚ÄìScott reaction-diffusion (`gpu.ts`): two `array<f32>` storage buffers per chemical, ping-ponged; a **step** pass (6 sub-steps/frame at 320¬≤); an additive **seed** pass injecting V under the finger (up to 16 seeds/submit, since `writeBuffer` only overwrites); a **render** compute pass that kaleidoscope-folds V ‚Üí a neon-iridescent palette into a storage texture, blitted to canvas ‚Äî WGSL in template literals, typed via `@webgpu/types`, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`. **Canvas2D fallback** (`rd-cpu.ts`): the SAME Gray‚ÄìScott on a coarse 132¬≤ grid + `drawKaleido`, amber (readable) "using Canvas2D fallback" notice ‚Äî always shows + plays. **TECHNIQUE / AUDIO** no per-frame GPU readback (would stall the pipeline) ‚Äî audio (`audio.ts`) is driven by a CPU-side activity proxy (injected reagent + pointer velocity + the fallback field's own spatial energy): each seed plucks a note from a just-intonation chord (1¬∑5/4¬∑3/2¬∑15/8¬∑9/4¬∑5/2); a four-osc detuned drone's lowpass + saturation open as total field activity climbs toward "breakthrough"; light reverb; autonomous faint idle bloom + drone so a no-touch glance still moves + sounds. **Why it's promising:** the field is alive but YOU sculpt it and YOUR seeding plays it (the played-not-watched relationship the jury demands), it's the lab's first INTERACTIVE WebGPU-compute RD you can play, and the chrysanthemum-bloom is the literal DMT-threshold form-constant. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1064's real-piano carrier is the more-cited unclaimed lever + the build box can't verify WebGPU headlessly (the Canvas2D fallback covers it but the headline GPU path is unseen). **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the WGSL pipeline + uniform offsets on real WebGPU hardware + the seed‚Üíchord coupling feel. Named refs: Gray‚ÄìScott / Pearson, *Complex Patterns in a Simple System* (1993); Karl Sims reaction-diffusion; Kl√ºver chrysanthemum form-constant. Per-grain BufferSource + raised-cosine env + stereo panner keyed to on-screen energy ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated; full rAF+audio teardown. **Why it was promising:** fully verifiable + runs on every device (zero green-but-unseen risk), the curl-noise river is genuinely gorgeous on plain Canvas2D, and it's a real instrument (your stir audibly changes the music) ‚Äî the perfect low-risk counterweight to the WebGPU pieces. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor at 3/5, but 1059 was the literal queued ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST + the direct JURY #4 (WebGPU-compute body) discharge with the higher ambition ceiling; 1060's two best ideas (audio-RMS‚Üíflow feedback loop; vorticity-confluence ‚Üí a deliberate two-grain harmonic interval) were folded into 1059's README next-cycle notes. **To resurrect:** ship as-is; verify the stir‚Üígrain coupling feel + grain loudness vs the felt fallback on a real device; consider it specifically when the lane has had ‚â•2 consecutive GPU-unverified ships. ### `1061-piano-chladni` (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; a played *cymatic-plate* instrument re-voicing Karel's real piano. NOTE the redundancy that de-selected it: cymatics is DOUBLY lab-prior (`19-cymatics`, `165-cymatics` both already do Chladni sand-on-nodal-lines with the same `sin(nœÄx)sin(mœÄy)+sin(mœÄx)sin(nœÄy)` formula) ‚Äî so resurrect ONLY if the *played-instrument + real-piano-CataRT* angle is pushed hard enough to feel genuinely new vs those two, or fold the idea into a polish of 19/165 instead.** *"TUNE a vibrating Chladni plate's driving frequency and the sand-like grains migrate to the standing-wave nodal lines ‚Äî and the geometry of those nodal lines re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO."* `state: meditative resonance / standing-wave trance ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** pointer/touch + a labelled frequency slider "tune" (drag horizontally across the plate or use the slider; tapping injects energy at that point) + Karel's real piano grain corpus (the proven `718-duet-paths`/1059 loader, already present as `source.ts`: id `549fc519‚Ä¶`, ~4.5s AbortController, JSON-`{url}`-or-bytes, `OfflineAudioContext` felt-piano fallback w/ emerald/amber notice, + file-drop). **OUTPUT** **Canvas2D** (NOT WebGPU/fragment-shader): ~4,000 "sand" grains glow bone/gold on a deep-indigo plate, additive `lighter` so dense nodal lines bloom, per-frame semi-transparent wash for trails (never pure black). **TECHNIQUE** the square-plate field `f(x,y)=a¬∑sin(nœÄx)sin(mœÄy)+b¬∑sin(mœÄx)sin(nœÄy)` with integer modes `(n,m)` chosen from the driving frequency via an ordered ladder (low freq = simple figure, high = intricate); grains do **gradient descent on `|f|`** (step down `‚àáf¬≤=2f¬∑‚àáf` toward the `f‚âà0` nodal lines) plus an `|f|`-proportional antinode vibration that scatters them off the bellies ‚Üí they self-organize onto the nodal lines and re-form on every retune; edge-reflecting. Plate state ‚Üí **CataRT granular re-synthesis**: driving freq ‚Üí `targetMidi` register (quantized just/pentatonic so retuning audibly *transposes* the piano ‚Äî the core coupling); nodal complexity `n+m` ‚Üí brightness + grain density; tap ‚Üí onset burst at the tuned pitch; settled+sharp ‚Üí a sustained pad swell; idle ‚Üí sparse twinkle. Per-grain BufferSource + raised-cosine env + panner ‚Üí convolution/limiter master; gesture-gated; full teardown. **Why it was promising:** a genuinely *played* cymatic instrument (you tune it, it transposes the real piano) ‚Äî the tune‚Üítranspose coupling is musically legible and the sand re-forming on each retune is gorgeous + fully verifiable on Canvas2D. **Why de-selected this cycle:** both siblings cleared the floor at ~3/5 and both are fully-verifiable Canvas2D real-piano instruments, but 1060 was the literal queued ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST AND a *non-redundant* technique, whereas 1061's Chladni mechanic is doubly lab-prior (19/165) ‚Äî exactly the "too similar" redundancy to avoid; its only fresh axis (cymatics-as-a-played-instrument + real-piano CataRT) wasn't enough to beat the queued resurrect. **To resurrect:** ship only if you can make the *played + real-piano* framing decisively distinct from 19/165 (e.g. continuous mode-morphing via pinch; true free-edge eigenmodes / asymmetric figures instead of a designed ladder; map grain spatial position on the figure ‚Üí stereo azimuth so you *hear* where on the plate each grain sits), OR redirect the energy into a polish of `165-cymatics` (add the real-piano CataRT carrier + the tune-to-transpose interaction to the existing piece). Named refs: Ernst Chladni *Entdeckungen √ºber die Theorie des Klanges* (1787); Hans Jenny *Cymatics* (1967); Diemo Schwarz CataRT; MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1061-piano-chladni/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `plate.ts` + `instrument.ts` + `source.ts` + README; backed up to scratchpad `banked-605/1061-piano-chladni/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1059-piano-flock` ‚úÖ SHIPPED cycle 604 (was ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST) ‚Äî `demoable`
**CONSUMED ‚Äî built + shipped as the cycle-604 DEEP winner (live at `/dream/1059-piano-flock`). See STATE/INDEX ¬ß604. The spec below is the original ¬ß603 bank, kept for provenance.**
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; brings the jury-wanted WebGPU compute back AND uses Karel's real piano (JURY 2026-06-29 #2 + #4 in one build).** *"Conduct a luminous GPU particle flock with your hand, and the flock's living shape re-voices KAREL'S OWN PIANO into a cosmic drift."* `state: psilocybin / cosmic drift ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** pointer/touch "attractor" conducting gesture + Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano as the granular corpus (anon `GET /api/featured` ‚Üí `/api/audio/[id]` with a ~4.5s AbortController timeout, the path 327/227 use; + file-drop; + an `OfflineAudioContext` felt-piano fallback with emerald "‚ô™ Karel's piano" / amber "synth piano" notice). **OUTPUT** a **WebGPU compute** boids flock ‚Äî storage-buffer position+velocity, WGSL compute pass (cohesion/alignment/separation + attractor), ping-pong double-buffered, rendered as additive glowing points; **Canvas2D CPU-flock fallback** (spatial-hash neighbours, fewer particles, same audio mapping) when `navigator.gpu` is absent. **TECHNIQUE** the flock's emergent shape-statistics (centroid / dispersion / mean speed / order) drive **granular re-synthesis** of the corpus: tight herd ‚Üí focused notes locked to a JI scale; scattered ‚Üí detuned shimmering cloud; sudden contraction ‚Üí onset burst. (Optional: warp the render through `_shared/psych/logpolar` for a psychedelic bloom.) Master ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated; full GPU+audio teardown. **Why it was promising:** the only explorer this fire that brings back the scarce, explicitly-wanted-back **WebGPU compute** body AND discharges the real-piano-carrier directive; conducting a flock is a genuine *play* relationship. **Why de-selected this cycle:** WebGPU-compute-as-resonating-body was just shipped twice (1052 RD-bloom, 1053 wave-field) and 1052 already discharged real-piano ‚Äî so its marginal *diversity* this fire was lower than the lab-first face input; also WebGPU is unverifiable in-container. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire wanting WebGPU/particle/real-piano):** ship as-is; pair the file-drop with a known-good *Welcome Home* recording id so the carrier is real not the synth fallback; verify the WGSL pipeline + grain‚Üîflock coupling on real hardware. Named refs: Craig Reynolds *Boids* (1987); Diemo Schwarz CataRT / corpus-based concatenative synthesis; the 2026 Reactive Audio "Growth" reader-on-a-field model. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1059-piano-flock/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `flock.ts` + `granular.ts` + `source.ts` + `webgpu.ts` + README; backed up to scratchpad `banked-603/1059-piano-flock/`; rebuild from this spec.)

master ‚Üí compressor/limiter; no mic. **Why it was promising:** genuinely player-driven, phone-demoable at 06:30, clean Shepard "endless fall" coupling, Canvas2D dodges the banned output form. **Why de-selected this cycle:** conceptually adjacent to existing tunnel/void pieces the jury flagged (1041 NDE-tunnel, 1042 hyperspace-bloom, 1051 hand-hyperspace) ‚Äî the "another tunnel" redundancy outweighed it vs the lab-first face surface; tilt is also un-feel-able in-container. **To resurrect:** ship when the lane wants a steered-descent / cosmic-ambient piece; verify the beta/gamma‚Üífall/bank mapping + iOS permission flow + Shepard-loop seamlessness on a real handset. ### `1054-breath-temple` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole, the most literal answer to JURY 2026-06-29 #1's "breath-as-control (not breath-as-ambient)."** *"Breathe a psychedelic form-constant cathedral into being ‚Äî your own paced breath is the instrument."* `state: meditative-boundless ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** breath-as-ACTIVE-control via mic envelope ‚Äî NOT passive spectral analysis: a breath-phase detector (AnalyserNode RMS + low-band energy, adaptive normalization, dual-rate followers, derivative-based inhale/exhale/hold classification, hold accumulator in `breath.ts`) + a visible **pacer ring** at ~5.5 breaths/min the user follows (inhale as it grows, exhale as it shrinks); a long still **held breath** triggers the breakthrough. **OUTPUT** Canvas2D (NOT a fragment shader) ‚Äî a few hundred parametric primitives, additive `lighter` bloom, soft-white-boundless ‚Üí dusk-lilac palette, never pure black, slow luminance drift only. **TECHNIQUE** composes `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` (scene built in cortical `(log r, Œ∏)` space, warped with `cortexToScreen`; breath drives `freq` ring-density, `phase` inward come-up drift, and a morph across `FORM_CONSTANTS` tunnel‚Üíspoke‚Üíspiral‚Üíhoneycomb) + `safeFlicker.ts` (opt-in OFF-by-default Shimmer ‚â§3 Hz + Kill). **AUDIO** breath-paced generative drone bank (detuned sine/triangle JI fifths, breath gain+lowpass LFO) + offline-synthesized cathedral-IR `ConvolverNode` (held breath blooms the wet tail) + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; mic analysis-only (never to `destination`). **No-mic fallback** = manual mode (auto-pacer + press-and-hold canvas / Space to "inhale"), clear `text-rose-300` notice, never a dead screen. **Why it was promising:** the directest discharge of JURY #1's explicit breath-as-control ask; cosmic-ambient (good pole balance); Canvas2D dodges the banned output. **Why de-selected this cycle:** lost to 1056 only on (a) 06:30 mic-permission friction + (b) the mic *tag* the jury hammered (6√ó, 4 passive ‚Äî even active breath reads as "mic" to a skeptical next-jury) + (c) the breath-phase thresholds are unverified first-guesses without a live mic. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire wanting the cosmic-ambient/breath relationship):** ship as-is; verify the derivative thresholds (`¬±0.04`), the ~9 s hold-to-breakthrough and ~10.9 s pacer period on a real mic; consider a non-mic breath proxy (a guided press-and-hold-only "paced" mode promoted to primary) to fully escape the mic tag. Named refs: Bressloff‚ÄìCowan (2001); Kl√ºver form constants; pranayama (~5‚Äì6 breaths/min); Lutz‚ÄìDavidson PNAS 2004 (jhƒÅna gamma ‚Äî phenomenology, not a claim). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1054-breath-temple/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `breath.ts` + `render.ts` + `audio.ts` + README; backed up to scratchpad `banked-602/1054-breath-temple/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1055-tilt-tunnel` (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the INTENSE pole, a *played* flight (not a stare-field).** *"STEER through a DMT form-constant hyperspace by tilting your head/device ‚Äî lean to fall inward, bank to flip the spiral handedness."* `state: DMT-hyperspace ¬∑ pole: intense`. **INPUT** `DeviceOrientationEvent` tilt as active steering (iOS `requestPermission()` gated on the Start tap) with **pointer-drag + arrow-key fallbacks** (the laptop demo path); a cyan reticle/horizon rolls + pitches with your flight so steering is unmistakable; never auto-plays (no input = slow drift only). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 single-triangle fragment shader you fly through ‚Äî ‚öÝ **this is the cycle-602 banned output FORM** (full-screen fragment field), mitigated *only* by being genuinely steered; that is exactly why it was de-selected. **TECHNIQUE** composes `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` by splicing `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` into the shader and *calling* its functions ‚Äî the steerable camera offsets the cortical coordinate (`cortex.x += depth` forward-lean inward fall, `cortex.y += yaw`, bank adds a spiral twist `cortex.y += bank*cortex.x` ‚Üí handedness flip + tilts `phi`); `FORM_PHI`/`FORM_CONSTANTS` drive uniforms; `safeFlicker.ts` is the sole opt-in ‚â§3 Hz Strobe path + Kill. **AUDIO** self-sufficient generative drone (sub-bass + detuned stacked osc) with a **Shepard-tone** rising shimmer (moving Gaussian window of octave-spaced partials ‚Üí the auditory "endless fall"), bank‚ÜíStereoPanner, thrust‚Üílowpass, master‚Üícompressor/limiter; no mic. Degrades: no tilt ‚Üí pointer/keys (amber notice); no WebGL2 ‚Üí Canvas2D drifting-rings fallback that still banks/thrusts (rose notice), audio keeps playing; full GL+audio+listener teardown. **Why it was promising:** spectacular, genuinely player-driven, brings the intense pole, clean Shepard "endless fall" coupling. **Why de-selected this cycle:** lands on the banned output FORM (full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader ‚Äî the lab's 6√ó monoculture) and is conceptually adjacent to existing tunnel/hyperspace pieces (1041 NDE-tunnel, 1042 hyperspace-bloom, 1051 hand-hyperspace) ‚Äî exactly the redundancy the jury flagged. **To resurrect:** ship when the fragment-shader ban has aged out AND the lane wants a flight piece; first verify the beta/gamma‚Üíthrust/bank mapping + iOS permission flow on a real handset (neutral resting pitch ~25‚Äì80¬∞ beta needs per-device tuning); consider a Canvas2D or WebGPU-compute substrate to also dodge the banned form. Named refs: Bressloff‚ÄìCowan (2001); Kl√ºver; QRI "Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience"; Roger Shepard (Shepard tone). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1055-tilt-tunnel/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + README, self-contained; backed up to scratchpad `banked-602/1055-tilt-tunnel/`; rebuild from this spec.)

## ¬ß601 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 601 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ DEEP ‚Äî 1 non-winner explorer, built complete by a parallel builder + tsc/ESLint-clean for its folder, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1053-ripple-loom` = a played WebGPU-compute wave field warped through the new `_shared/psych/` log-polar engine)

- **`1054-cortex-paint`** ‚≠ê RESURRECT (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: hypnagogic / LSD-plateau geometric painting ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`) ‚Äî **"paint directly into your own visual cortex."** The field starts dark and near-silent; each pointer **stroke** is seeded as a localized region in **cortical (log r, Œ∏) space** with an orientation œÜ (form-mode), freq and a decaying strength, then bloomed onto screen via the shared log-polar warp into a Kl√ºver form constant (tunnel/spokes/spiral/honeycomb) AND voiced as a sustained additive partial. Strokes slowly decay (a **memory** slider) so you layer/reinforce/sculpt drifting chords over time. WebGL2 single full-screen pass that renders **only the sum of the user's strokes** (‚â§64 packed as uniform arrays) ‚Äî so idle = bare violet-black ground, strokes ARE the content (NOT a stare-field, but it IS a WebGL2 fragment pass, so on the next jury check confirm it still reads as an instrument). Audio: per-stroke just-intonation additive voices + soft pad + shared convolution reverb, with an **optional dropped audio file** (`decodeAudioData` ‚Üí granulated carrier) so it can run on **Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano** ‚Äî this is its standout reason to resurrect (discharges the real-piano directive via a *painting* interaction model, distinct from 1052's reader-probes). Composes both shared engines cleanly (`logpolar.ts` GLSL+JS twins for shader & hit-testing; `safeFlicker.ts` as the sole opt-in ‚â§3 Hz Shimmer path). **Why it was promising:** a genuinely different instrument *relationship* ‚Äî you compose by painting in cortical coordinates, which is grep-0√ó as an interaction model, plus the file-carrier path. **Why de-selected this cycle:** lost only on JURY 2026-06-29 #4 ‚Äî the winner 1053 brings **WebGPU compute** back as the resonating body (the scarce, explicitly-wanted-back capability, down to 2√ó), whereas 1054's output is a WebGL2 full-screen fragment field (the banned *form*, mitigated but not avoided), and its real-piano-carrier angle was just discharged last fire by 1052-piano-bloom. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; pair the file-drop with a known-good Welcome Home recording id so the carrier is real, not a fallback synth. Named refs: Bressloff‚ÄìCowan retina‚ÜíV1 complex-log map; Kl√ºver's four form constants. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1054-cortex-paint/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shader.ts + synth.ts + README; rebuild from this spec.)
- **Next-cycle DEEPENING of the winner `1053-ripple-loom`:** fold 1054's two best ideas in ‚Äî (a) an **optional audio-file carrier** (drop a *Welcome Home* track; granulate it at the listener probes instead of pure bells, so the ripples re-voice Karel's real piano) and (b) a **"paint a sustained ridge" mode** (hold to keep injecting along a stroke so a standing form-constant persists, not just transient rings). Both are in 1053's README as next-cycle notes.

## ¬ß597 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 597 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner intense-pole explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` = the lab's FIRST Poincar√©-disk {7,3} hyperbolic tiling)

- **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm`) ‚Äî the lab's **first psilocybin / warm-organic** psych piece. The entire psychedelic lane is neon (1038/1042/1044) / dark-void (1041) / soft-white (1043) / pastel (1047) ‚Äî **there is NO warm piece at all**; owning the warm pole is this build's whole reason to exist. Technique: a **two-level fBm domain warp** (I√±igo Qu√≠lez "warp the warp": fBm field q offsets coords, a second field r is fed by q, the final fBm is sampled with both offsets stacked) ‚Üí breathing foliage/bark/mycelium structure, ridge-emphasized into luminous **gold filaments**; folded through an **N-fold kaleidoscope** whose fold-count **blooms 2‚Üí~12‚Üísettles** over the arc (chrysanthemum opening), mixed ~60/40 with the unfolded plane so it stays mycelial, never a rigid mandala. **Warm-organic palette** (deep brown ‚Üí rust ‚Üí amber ‚Üí ochre ‚Üí moss ‚Üí luminous gold, floored on a deep-brown ember so it never goes cold). WebGL2 fragment shader + **real Canvas2D fallback** (a simpler warm one-level warp, bilinear-upscaled); **analysis-only mic** (FFT: bass‚Üíflow+warp amp, mids‚Üíbloom/N, highs‚Üífine filament detail, loudness‚Üísaturation ‚Äî never to `destination`) + a self-sufficient warm breathing drone fallback (detuned A-chord pads + opening lowpass + feedback-delay bloom tail). ~240 s non-looping arc (onset‚Üícome-up‚Üípeak-bloom 35‚Äì60%‚Üíplateau‚Üíreturn). Slow luminance drift only (no strobe). **Why it was promising:** brings the warm pole + the intense-warm psilocybin state the lane lacks ‚Äî the single biggest remaining diversity gap; faithful, beautiful organic look; full Canvas2D fallback. **Why de-selected this cycle:** its core technique (domain-warp + kaleidoscope) is the least lab-first of the cycle-597 three (1044's hyperbolic tiling won on never-used-technique + the QRI research chain). **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; strongly consider FFT-driving from Karel's real **Welcome Home** Path piano (`/api/audio/[id]`) as the carrier ‚Äî that would also make it the lane's **first psych build on real music**. Named refs: I√±igo Qu√≠lez "domain warping"; Manolo Gamboa Naon (warm flowing organic fields); psilocybin "open-eye fractal enhancement" phenomenology. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1046-mycelial-bloom/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shader.ts + audio.ts + arc.ts + fallback.ts + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

- **`1049-salvia-membrane`** (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: salvia ¬∑ pole: intense (eerie/uncanny)`) ‚Äî the lab's **first salvia / uncanny** piece (grep-0√ó `salvia`/`membrane`), and the lab's first deliberately *not-pretty* register. Realizes the salvia phenomenology ‚Äî the felt sense of being unzipped from 3D and **pressed flat into a surface, "becoming an object,"** reality revealed as a tiling sheet/**membrane** pulled sideways by mechanical "gears." WebGL2 fragment shader: a quilted `mod`-tiled lattice (soft dome shading = the "skin of reality") **dragged laterally** at a constant uncanny rate, torn at a smooth **advancing seam/zipper** (a steep shear-gradient front sweeping across, cells reorienting), with a **cylindrical fold** curling the periphery edge-wise so the viewer is pressed flat into the plane + a slow whole-sheet rotation; faint moir√© beat, **hard-ish edges (mechanical, not flowing)**. **Sallow/uncanny palette** (desaturated ochre-green / bone / oxide-red, dim). Audio: a deliberately **dissonant metallic drone** (detuned saw pad + sour fifth + tritone-ish high partial + ~0.45 Hz mechanical amplitude pulse + breathing resonant lowpass) ‚Äî NOT consonant/pretty; analysis-only mic (bass‚Üídrag, mids‚Üífold, highs‚Üíseam, loudness‚Üícontrast, never to `destination`). ~3.5-min non-looping arc (onset‚Üícome-up‚Üípeak ~45%‚Üíplateau‚Üíreturn). **Safety:** the seam is a smoothstep gradient sweep (not a strobing edge); all motion slow + smooth; no >3 Hz luminance pulsing. **Why it was promising:** never-built state, genuinely different mechanic (2D membrane drag/fold, not fractal/raymarch), and it owns the *uncanny/eerie* register the lab has never touched ‚Äî high surprise. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1044's lab-first hyperbolic technique + the QRI research chain edged it; this is "different register" more than "biggest ambition." **To resurrect:** ship when the lane wants the uncanny pole or a non-fractal mechanic; consider pushing the membrane to a WebGPU compute field for a denser quilt. Named refs: salvia "becoming an object" / "gears of reality" / 2D-sheet trip-report phenomenology (PsychonautWiki "Geometry"); contrast with the DMT saddle/hyperbolic geometry of sibling 1044. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1049-salvia-membrane/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shader.ts + audio.ts + arc.ts + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)
