## ¬ß596 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 596 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1047-tracer-drift` = the lab's FIRST ping-pong feedback-trail accumulator)

- **`1048-threshold`** ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: hypnagogia / lucid-dream ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`) ‚Äî the lab's **first hypnagogia / dream-logic piece** (grep-0√ó `hypnagogia`). Nothing is drawn explicitly: **five scenes** are different ways of **thresholding layered fBm/value-noise** so forms *suggest* themselves out of darkness (pareidolia) ‚Äî `lattice` (domain-warped half-formed mesh), `face-in-noise` (radial-mirrored fBm whose threshold ridges read as eyes/brow/mouth without ever being a real face), `landscape` (horizon-banded silhouettes + dim ember dusk), `geometric-bloom` (noise-modulated petals + concentric rings), `void-drift` (sparse drifting phosphenes). A **deterministic jittered teleport scheduler** cross-dissolves two scene fields and **snaps** the pair at irregular cuts, with a hard **‚â•4.5 s anti-strobe spacing floor** + a shallow (~30%) eased luminance dip cushioning each snap so it reads as a dream-jump, never a flash; a **per-cut seed** re-grows the forms differently every window so nothing repeats. Audio: low detuned drone under a breathing low-pass + pink-ish noise wash + sparse half-heard bell tones, with a `cut()` filter-sweep/swell on each teleport so the jumps feel motivated (master ~0.12, click-free). Input: **autonomous Lissajous drift + optional iOS-gated gyro** untethered float (no fixed up-vector; pointer NOT primary). ~3‚Äì5 min arc (onset near-dark ‚Üí drift coalesce ‚Üí deep-threshold most-vivid + frequent jumps ‚Üí settle). Dim-warped palette (deep indigo/slate/dim violet/faint ember). **Why it was promising:** the most *surprising concept* of the cycle-596 triple ("did I just see a face?"), a genuinely novel mechanic (dream-logic teleport, not smooth morph), untapped state, ~3-4/5 ambition. **Why de-selected this cycle:** 1047's lab-first ping-pong feedback infra (a named-but-unbuilt `_shared/` target) + the temporal-diversity argument (the lane's missing *plateau* shape) edged it. **To resurrect (next adult psych fire):** ship as-is; consider adding a faint MIT-Dormio-style "dream-incubation" word/seed that biases which scenes appear; push to WebGPU for richer noise fields. Named refs: MIT Media Lab **Dormio** / targeted dream incubation (Adam Haar Horowitz); hypnagogia "Tetris effect" / threshold-imagery phenomenology. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1048-threshold/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shaders.ts [5 thresholded-noise scenes] + audio.ts + arc.ts [teleport scheduler] + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

- **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm`) ‚Äî the lab's **first psilocybin / warm-organic** psych piece (the lane is entirely neon/dark-void/soft-white ‚Äî **no warm pole at all**). Technique: a **two-level fBm domain warp** ("warp the warp", the I√±igo Qu√≠lez recipe ‚Äî fBm field q offsets coords, a second field r is fed by q, the final fBm is sampled with both offsets stacked) ‚Üí breathing foliage/bark/mycelium structure, ridge-emphasized into luminous gold filaments; folded through an **N-fold kaleidoscope** whose fold-count **blooms 2‚Üí~12‚Üísettles** over the arc (chrysanthemum opening), the fold mixed with the unfolded plane so it stays mycelial, never a rigid mandala. **Warm-organic palette** (deep brown ‚Üí rust ‚Üí amber ‚Üí ochre ‚Üí moss ‚Üí luminous gold). WebGL2 fragment shader + real Canvas2D fallback; **analysis-only mic** (FFT: bass‚Üíflow+warp amp, mids‚Üíbloom, highs‚Üífine detail, loudness‚Üísaturation) + a self-sufficient warm breathing drone fallback (detuned pad + opening lowpass + feedback-delay bloom). ~240 s arc (onset‚Üícome-up‚Üípeak-bloom‚Üíplateau‚Üíreturn). Slow luminance drift only (no strobe). **Why it was promising:** brings the warm pole + the intense-warm psilocybin state the lane lacks; faithful, beautiful organic look. **Why de-selected this cycle:** its core technique (domain-warp + kaleidoscope) is the least lab-first of the three, and the lane was already 2√ó intense (1038/1042) so a cosmic-ambient winner rebalanced better. **To resurrect:** pick on a cycle wanting the warm/intense pole; consider FFT-driving from Karel's real Welcome Home Path piano as the carrier (would also make it the first psych build on real music). Named refs: Manolo Gamboa Naon (warm flowing organic fields); psilocybin "open-eye fractal enhancement" phenomenology; mycelial/Inocybe growth metaphor. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1046-mycelial-bloom/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shader.ts + audio.ts + arc.ts + fallback.ts + README; rebuild from this spec or the scratchpad backup.)

## ¬ß595 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 595 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete by a parallel builder + builder-audited TS/ESLint-clean, then de-selected & `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1043-dreamachine` = the lab's FIRST gated safe-flicker / Ganzfeld engine)

- **`1044-hyperbolic-bloom`** ‚≠ê (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: DMT/LSD hyperbolic ¬∑ pole: INTENSE`) ‚Äî the lab's **first Poincar√©-disk hyperbolic {7,3} tiling**, rendered entirely in a WebGL2 fragment shader: each pixel is a complex point in the unit disk, inverse-M√∂bius'd by the viewer transform, then **folded into the {7,3} fundamental domain** (Schwarz triangle œÄ/2,œÄ/3,œÄ/7) by iterated reflections ‚Äî straight dihedral mirrors + a geodesic **circle inversion** (`z‚Üíc+(z‚àíc)r¬≤/|z‚àíc|¬≤`, circle orthogonal to the disk: `|c|¬≤‚àír¬≤=1`); fold-count ‚Üí palette-cycled jeweled hue with dark grout; a continuous **M√∂bius translation along a geodesic** makes heptagons stream out toward the rim forever (the perpetual hyperbolic fall). Layered: a breathing fBm domain warp ("melting surfaces"), chromatic aberration, thin-film iridescence, a traveling cortical-wave phase, and a **3-pass ping-pong feedback buffer** for positive-afterimage tracers. ~5-min INTENSE arc (onset‚Üícome-up‚Üíbreakthrough peak‚Üíplateau‚Üíreturn) ramps recursion depth / fall speed / warp / CA / trail decay; drone fallback (sub-bass + detuning stacked oscillators) or optional mic, FFT‚Üíuniforms (bass‚Üífall speed, mids‚Üíwarp, highs‚Üíiridescence, loudness‚Üísaturation). **Why it was promising:** a genuine lab-first technique (grep-0√ó `hyperbolic tiling`), the directest translation of DMT "negatively-curved, more-axes-than-reality" reports, and visually the most spectacular of the three. **Why de-selected this cycle:** it's the **intense** pole (would make 3√ó in a lane already 2√ó intense, 1038/1042) and thematically adjacent to last cycle's DMT `1042`; also the highest build-risk (3-pass FBO pipeline + a geodesic-circle *orthogonality proxy* rather than the exact Schwarz-triangle solution ‚Üí tiles are convincing but not geometrically exact {7,3}). **To resurrect:** pick it on a cycle that *wants* the intense pole; first solve the exact {p,q} Schwarz-triangle circle analytically; consider a WebGPU-compute field pass for deeper recursion; blend {7,3}‚Üî{8,3}‚Üî{6,4} for variety. Named refs: QRI "The Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience" (G√≥mez-Emilsson); Bressloff‚ÄìCowan; Escher *Circle Limit* I‚ÄìIV. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom/` this cycle ‚Äî page.tsx + shader.ts [4 GLSL programs] + audio.ts + arc.ts + README; rebuild from this spec.)

- **`1045-k-hole`** (status `queued` ¬∑ `state: ketamine (K-hole) ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`) ‚Äî the lab's **first dedicated ketamine / dissociative** piece (grep-0√ó `k-hole`): float untethered into a vast near-black void where ~2600 faint cold-glowing shards drift *past* you and recede into exponential fog. Four subsystems: (1) sparse **parallax point-field** with manual perspective projection (shards stream +Z and wrap into the far depth) + exp fog, additive radial-glow sprites; (2) a global **`timeScale`** time-dilation uniform driving *everything* (drift, camera, fog, audio LFOs, body-melt), dipping to ~0.12 at the deepest K-hole so time literally stretches; (3) a **convolution-reverb void** (sustained detuned drone through a synthesized multi-second cistern IR `ConvolverNode`, low-pass that closes on descent then re-opens into "cold clarity" at the bottom); (4) a depth-driven **body-schema-melt** vertex domain-warp/shear that dissolves coherent structure into drifting particles then re-coheres. Input: **device-tilt / gyro untethered float** (no fixed up-vector; iOS `requestPermission` wired to the Start tap) with auto-drift + arrow/scroll fallback ‚Äî pointer deliberately NOT primary. ~5.5-min arc (onset‚Üícome-up‚Üídeepest void‚Üíre-coherence‚Üíreturn), smoothstep-blended, + a lighter‚Üîdeeper bias slider. **Why it was promising:** never-built state, clean ‚â•3-subsystem ambition, cosmic-ambient (rebalances the lane), tilt input dodges the jury-banned pointer. **Why de-selected this cycle:** strong but risks *aesthetic* overlap with the existing dark-void sibling `1041-nde-tunnel` (the README differentiates it well *conceptually* ‚Äî no tunnel, no destination, dissociation-not-transcendence ‚Äî but on a real display the dark sparse field could read similar); `1043`'s research-chain + safety-infra value won. **To resurrect:** ship when the lane is light on void pieces, or extract `timeScale` + the convolution-void IR into `_shared/` as reusable ambient infra; add the banked "sensory un-binding" audio‚Üîvisual lag at the deepest point; push shards to 10k+ via transform feedback. Named ref: ketamine ego-dissolution literature (*Frontiers in Human Neuroscience*, 2017). (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1045-k-hole/` this cycle; rebuild from this spec.)

## ¬ß594 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 594 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner altered-states explorers, each built complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `1042-hyperspace-bloom` = the lab's FIRST 4D/hyperdimensional raymarch)

PSYCHEDELIC WIDE fire covering three untapped altered states across the spectrum (the lane was only 2 builds deep ‚Äî `1038` intense form-constant, `1041` cosmic-ambient NDE-void ‚Äî so spreading fast directly attacks "too similar"). Three orthogonal briefs: DMT-breakthrough 4D-raymarch (shipped), jhƒÅna soft-white-boundless, psilocybin warm-organic. None banned (no pointer-as-instrument, no sim-as-body, no Gray-Scott, no cathedral). Shipped **`1042-hyperspace-bloom`** ‚Äî the biggest ambition swing (first-ever 4D polytope rotation+stereographic-projection raymarch, grep-0√ó) and the highest "huh, we can do that?" The two below returned complete + builder-audited tsc/eslint-clean; **removed un-committed** (`rm -rf`) before the authoritative winner-only build per the non-winner rule ‚Äî rebuild from these briefs. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **1042**; banked text-seed names reach 1044 ‚Üí resurrect as ‚â•**1045**).

### `1043-clear-light` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult ¬∑ cosmic-ambient) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole, soft-white/boundless palette (the deliberate opposite of 1041's dark NDE void).** *"Drift toward the meditative 'clear light' ‚Äî Oceanic Boundlessness, self dissolving into luminous spacious emptiness, with no drug and no effort."* `state: jhƒÅna/meditative-boundlessness ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient`. **INPUT** auto-journey + optional iOS-gated DeviceOrientation gaze-drift (NO mic, NO pointer-as-instrument). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 two-pass: opaque inverse-vignette background bloom (bright warm-white center, dusk-lilac edges ‚Äî never black) + additive `gl.POINTS` particle field (tens of thousands), GPU value-noise curl drift, radial breath swell, size/alpha by breath, saturation washing to pure white as figure/ground MERGE over ~2.5min. **TECHNIQUE** breath-paced ~0.1 Hz (~5.5 breaths/min) particle dissolution-into-light + a global TIME_SCALE dilation; Canvas2D fallback. **AUDIO** generative drone bank (detuned sine/triangle in stacked just fifths, long cross-fades) + a procedural OfflineAudioContext cathedral-IR ConvolverNode (~4-6s tail) + breath-paced LFO on amplitude+lowpass; compressor/limiter; Analyser drives bloom. **VIBE** soft-white-boundless / luminous. Named refs: **Lutz & Davidson PNAS 2004** (long-term meditators self-induce gamma synchrony), the **"Oceanic Boundlessness"** ASC dimension, **La Monte Young / Pauline Oliveros "Deep Listening" / Brian Eno** drone lineage. (Builder caught + fixed a real bug: two draw passes shared attribute location 0 ‚Üí gave each its own VAO.) Files were at `src/app/dream/1043-clear-light/` (`page.tsx`, `shaders.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [particle field + breath driver + drone bank + convolution reverb + FFT coupling] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß594). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1042` was the bigger ambition (never-used 4D technique) + higher surprise; **`1043` is the strongest resurrect** ‚Äî it's the cosmic-ambient soft-white counterweight the lane still lacks (1041 is dark-void; this is light-boundless), and entrainment science is honestly framed as atmosphere not effect. Builder warts (honest): the *felt* boundlessness + the merge-to-white timing are reasoned, not yet heard/seen on a real device; safety is solid (all luminance drift at breath rate, zero flicker).

### `1044-mycelial-bloom` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the warm-organic serotonergic pole (distinct from neon-DMT and dark-void).** *"Your own voice makes the room breathe the way psilocybin makes bark and foliage come alive ‚Äî organic fractal structure blooming and reorganizing with your affect."* `state: psilocybin ¬∑ pole: intense-warm`. **INPUT** microphone, ANALYSIS-ONLY (RMS loudness + spectral-centroid brightness; mic NEVER routed to output ‚Äî wired to an AnalyserNode only, no feedback). **OUTPUT** WebGL2 fullscreen fragment shader. **TECHNIQUE** fBm (up to 7 fractional octaves) with two-level **Inigo-Quilez domain warping** (breathing fractals) + N-fold **kaleidoscope** UV folds (chrysanthemum bloom) ‚Äî **NOT Gray-Scott** (banned). Louder/brighter voice raises octaves, flow speed, fold count, reorganization rate, warp amplitude, saturation together (entropic-brain affect-coupling); all luminance params slowly eased per frame to stay out of the 3‚Äì30 Hz flicker band. amber‚Üírose‚Üímoss‚Üíember cosine palette + filmic curve (no hard-white clip) + mycelial veins + chromatic aberration. Canvas2D fallback. **AUDIO** warm generative drone (detuned saw/triangle modal stack, slow filter LFO, convolution reverb, master limiter); mic loudness gently swells the pad's brightness/gain so you feel your voice in image AND sound. Mic-denied ‚Üí rose notice + 2s-idle auto-demo LFO + always-live "Bloom" slider (never dead). **VIBE** warm-organic / ember. Named refs: **Carhart-Harris & Friston "entropic brain" / REBUS**, **Kl√ºver / Bressloff‚ÄìCowan** form-constants. Files were at `src/app/dream/1044-mycelial-bloom/` (`page.tsx`, `shaders.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic analysis + fBm-domain-warp shader + kaleidoscope + warm drone + FFT] ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß594). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1042`/`1043` were the bigger swings; **but it's the lab's warm-organic psychedelic entry** (the lane has neon-DMT + dark-void but no warm-serotonergic pole) and the voice-affect-coupling is a fresh, legible relationship. Builder warts (honest): the *felt* warmth + the affect-coupling tuning are reasoned, not yet heard on a real device; mic permission is the usual 06:30 friction (auto-demo + slider cover it).

## ¬ß591 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-29 (cycle 591 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner *relationship*-explorers, each built complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean + a passing headless test, then de-selected; shipped `1035-living-album`)

ADULT WIDE fire whose thesis was **vary the human‚Üîsound RELATIONSHIP, not the algorithm** (JURY 2026-06-28 #1) ‚Äî after a grep *falsified* the jury's named "0√ó COLD" gaps (WebRTC built in `508`/`729`; seismic 7√ó), proving the ambition floor's "never-used technique" is nearly exhausted at 591 cycles. Three orthogonal *relationships*, none banned (no pointer-as-instrument, no sim-as-body, no Gray-Scott, no WebGL2-flat, no cathedral). Shipped **`1035-living-album`** (gardener-of-an-evolving-system) on JURY-#1-direct + strongest verification (proves the memory claim) + solo-bulletproof at 06:30. The two below returned complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean + passing tests; **removed un-committed** (`rm -rf`) before the authoritative winner-only build per the non-winner rule ‚Äî rebuild from these briefs. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **1035**; banked text-seed names reach 1037 ‚Üí resurrect as ‚â•1038).

### `1036-piano-mosaic` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** *"Sing ‚Äî and hear your voice re-built, grain by grain, out of KAREL'S OWN PIANO."* Real-time **audio mosaicing / corpus-based concatenative synthesis**: build a corpus of ~80ms Hann grains (50% overlap) from a piano recording, each tagged with 3 cheap descriptors (RMS loudness ¬∑ spectral-centroid brightness ¬∑ autocorrelation pitch), normalized across the corpus; analyze the live mic every ~45ms into the SAME descriptor space; for each target frame play the **nearest** corpus grain (weighted Euclidean) via granular overlap-add, with a repeat-penalty/hysteresis so it doesn't machine-gun ‚Üí **your voice's contour drives a stream of his piano grains**. **Uniquely discharges the under-served "incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths" directive** + is the fire's highest-surprise piece. **INPUT** mic (analysis-only, NEVER routed to output ‚Äî only its *shape* selects grains) + **Karel's real recording** as corpus (`GET /api/featured` ‚Üí `/api/audio/[id]`, the anon path `327`/`227` use, 4.5s abort timeout; ALWAYS falls back to an OfflineAudioContext synth-piano corpus [hammer transient + inharmonic partials over a 2-octave scale] with emerald "‚ô™ Karel's piano" / amber "synth piano" notice). **OUTPUT** Canvas2D **descriptor-space map** (corpus grains as dots by brightness√ópitch, violet voice-trail, lit selected grain) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** real-time concatenative unit-selection ¬∑ **VIBE** intimate / his-piano / warm-analytic. No-mic fallback: a gliding-formant **auto-demo target** runs through the identical pipeline + a "play demo target" button. Pure `mosaic.ts` (descriptor math + selection) is DOM/audio-free + headless-verified ‚Äî **`mosaic.test.ts` 20/20 PASS** (nearest-grain correctness, symmetric/non-negative distance, weight-flips-winner, repeat-penalty caps consecutive runs, empty-corpus safety, normalization edges). Files were at `src/app/dream/1036-piano-mosaic/` (`mosaic.ts`, `mosaic.test.ts`, `corpus.ts`, `engine.ts`, `page.tsx`, `README.md`) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [corpus build/decode + descriptor analysis + unit-selection + granular synth + Canvas2D map] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Diemo Schwarz CataRT**; **The Concatenator arXiv:2411.04366**; **MACataRT arXiv:2502.00023**] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß591 ¬∑ the his-music directive). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the WIDE winner `1035` was solo-bulletproof + had the strongest verification (proves its core claim) + directly answered JURY #1; **`1036` carries the most 06:30 risk** (mic permission + the mosaic *quality* is unheard/reasoned + the live `/api/featured` response shape is untested in-box, though it mirrors `327`/`227` and handles both direct-audio and `{url}`-JSON). **`1036` is the strongest adult resurrect** ‚Äî resurrect on a cycle with a real mic + audio device to verify, and it's the only piece in the queue that discharges the his-music directive. Builder warts (honest): grain size / descriptor weights / trigger gating are educated guesses wanting an ear-tune; the synth-piano fallback covers the untested real-API path.

### `1037-presence-song` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult (conceptual/critical).** *"A song that lives only while you are PRESENT for it ‚Äî and audibly withers the instant you look away."* The lab's thin **conceptual/critical** menu category, and a genuinely fresh *relationship* (**be-present-for-it**, not play-it). Three **zero-permission** browser signals fold into one continuous `attention` ‚àà [0,1]: **Page Visibility** (`document.hidden`), **window focus/blur**, **pointer/touch presence** (cursor recency over the canvas ‚Äî a *presence sensor*, NOT a pitch-picker), + a time-since-interaction decay term. `attention` ‚Üí synth + visual params, all **monotone** + **clamped**: high = warm in-tune diatonic chord-cycle + bright breathing light-field; low = voices thin & detune (¬±38¬¢), lowpass closes (5.2kHz‚Üí180Hz), an empty reverb swells (wet 0.18‚Üí0.92), image desaturates/fragments toward a held fragile near-silence (gain floor 0.04, never absolute zero, ‚â•1 voice always holds). **Asymmetric smoothing** ‚Äî it revives faster (~0.9s) than it withers (~2.6s), "as if it leans toward you." A visible meter makes the causality legible. **INPUT** attention/presence (no mic, no camera) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D breathing/withering organism ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** presence-gated synthesis over functional harmony (Am¬∑F¬∑C¬∑G) ¬∑ **VIBE** intimate / fragile / conceptual, tender not clinical. Always-sounding (auto-demo breathes it for a passing glance; gesture-gated; full teardown). Pure `attention.ts` is DOM-free + headless-verified ‚Äî **`attention.test.ts` 35/35 PASS** (decays‚Üí0 absent / rises‚Üí1 present; smoothing monotone, bounded, no overshoot; revive>wither; dt=0/NaN/huge-dt safe; param map monotone + clamped; ‚â•1 voice always holds). Files were at `src/app/dream/1037-presence-song/` (`attention.ts`, `attention.test.ts`, `page.tsx`, `README.md`) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. Named ref: **Tino Sehgal's "constructed situations"** (art that exists only in the live encounter, leaves no object) + Daniel Rozin presence-mirrors. **Ambition ~2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [multi-signal presence sensing + presence-gated synth + functional harmony + Canvas2D organism] ¬∑ #3 named ref [Sehgal/Rozin] ¬∑ arguably the *be-present* relationship is a fresh coupling). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** lower ambition ceiling (it's a mood/presence piece more than an instrument) and `1035`/`1036` were bigger swings; **but it's a lovely, surprising, solo-bulletproof conceptual piece** ‚Äî resurrect when the lab wants a quiet critical/conceptual entry (the menu category is thin). Builder warts (honest): the *felt* emotional weight + the specific timbre/tau tuning are reasoned, not yet heard in a live browser.

## ¬ß583 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-28 (cycle 583 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner pure-timbre explorers, each built complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `1011-fm-aurora`)

### `1013-mantra-glass` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** **Karel's own piano recording, ring-modulated the way Stockhausen scored it in *Mantra* (1970)** ‚Äî a swept sine carrier turns his piano into shimmering metallic glass; the sum/difference sidebands bloom symmetrically around the carrier as it slowly sweeps. **Uniquely discharges the standing "incorporate Karel's actual music from the Paths" directive** (under-served) in a pianist-personal, genuinely surprising form, and ring-modulation is ‚âà0√ó as an adult timbre engine (only two kids toys: `603`/`705`). **INPUT** his real recording ‚Äî `GET /api/featured` ‚Üí `/api/audio/[id]` (the anon, no-auth path `327`/`227` use), `decodeAudioData`, under a 4.5s abort timeout, ALWAYS falling back to an `OfflineAudioContext` synth piano (decaying D-Dorian partial-stacks + hammer transients) with an honest emerald "‚ô™ Karel's recording" / amber "synth piano" notice ‚Äî **non-pointer, non-keyboard, bulletproof at 06:30** ¬∑ **OUTPUT** hand-written **WebGL2** crystalline spectrum-lattice (glassy bars + mirrored reflection + sparse austere grid + a sweeping gold carrier plumb-line with symmetric sideband glows; Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** ring modulation = a `GainNode` whose `.gain` is driven by a sine carrier oscillator (`carrier ‚Üí ringGain.gain`, `source ‚Üí ringGain ‚Üí out`) ‚Üí sum/difference sidebands; dual swept carriers, ~70s `Mantra`-style auto-sweep, dry/wet blend, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (ring-mod can get loud ‚Äî conservative gain) ¬∑ **VIBE** Stockhausen austere-luminous / metallic glass (steel-blue/cool-white/gold ‚Äî NOT forge/parchment/cosmic). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-583/1013-mantra-glass/` (`page.tsx`, `source.ts`, `ringmod.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [his-recording fetch/decode + ring-mod instrument + dual-carrier sweep + WebGL2 spectrum render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Stockhausen *Mantra* (1970) for two ring-modulated pianos; *Mixtur*] ¬∑ arguably #1 [ring-mod-as-adult-timbre-engine, ‚âà0√ó]). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** `1011` led with a *more* novel technique (first FM ever) + shipped a passing headless test suite (verification debt = jury #1) + lush FM timbre is lower "sounds harsh" risk than ring-mod. **`1013` is the strongest adult resurrect** ‚Äî it's the only one that discharges the his-music directive and the *Mantra* reference is a real "huh, we can do that?" for a pianist. Builder warts (honest): the real `/api/featured`+`/api/audio` path is untested in-box (synth fallback covers it); ring-mod loudness wants a real-device listen.

### `1012-fold-tide` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** **Your VOICE drives a West-Coast wavefolder** ‚Äî sing soft and you get a pure sine, sing louder and the wave folds into blooming harmonics you both see (a live glowing oscilloscope of the post-fold cycle creasing into spikes) and hear. **Wavefolding / West-Coast (Buchla/Serge) synthesis is grep-0√ó in the lab** ‚Äî a genuine never-used technique. **INPUT** microphone (`echoCancellation/noiseSuppression/autoGainControl:false` so a real soft/loud dynamic isn't gated; analysis-only, never routed to output; RMS loudness ‚Üí fold depth, rough autocorrelation pitch ‚Üí fundamental snapped to scale) ‚Äî non-pointer, non-keyboard, but **mic permission is the worst 06:30 friction** (the lab's recurring de-select reason) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** hand-written **WebGL2** oscilloscope of one folded cycle + a harmonic spectrum ribbon (amber/teal/violet tidal palette; Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** wavefolding: an `AudioWorkletNode` per-sample folder (`fold(x)` rail-reflection + sin-rounding, fold count rises with loudness) loaded from an inline Blob URL, with a robust `WaveShaperNode` dynamically-updated fold-curve fallback; a West-Coast low-pass-gate `BiquadFilter` whose cutoff also opens with loudness; always-on soft drone ¬∑ **VIBE** Buchla-organic / warm-electric / tidal (NOT forge/parchment/cosmic). Pure `fold.ts` math is DOM/audio-free + headless-verified (zero-crossings/cycle 1‚Üí13 as fold depth rises, output bounded [-1,1], scale-snap correct). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-583/1012-fold-tide/` (`page.tsx`, `fold.ts`, `render.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~3/5** (#1 never-used technique [West-Coast wavefolding, grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic RMS/pitch + wavefolder + low-pass-gate + WebGL2 scope/spectrum = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Don Buchla 259 complex osc + 292 low-pass gate; Serge Tcherepnin wave multipliers; East-vs-West-Coast synthesis]). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** mic permission + the unverified AudioWorklet/Blob-URL `addModule` path are two layers of 06:30 risk; `1011`'s tilt + `1013`'s synth-fallback are more robust unattended. **Strong resurrect** ‚Äî the only mic explorer of the fire and a clean grep-0√ó technique; the WaveShaper fallback + slider + idle auto-demo keep it sounding if the worklet/mic fail. Builder warts: the AudioWorklet real-time audio + mic feel are unverified headless.

### `1009-kids-balloon-breath` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *"What if a 4-year-old could BLOW and HUM into the tablet to fill, float, and tune singing balloons?"* Blow into the mic ‚Üí a balloon swells and lifts off into a sunny picnic sky, singing a soft warm note; hum a pitch ‚Üí the highest rising balloon retunes and recolours to match; balloons drift up, bob, gently bump, and pop with a happy bell chime at the top. **INPUT** microphone breath+voice (`getUserMedia({audio})` w/ echo-cancel/noise-suppress/AGC **off** so a real breath isn't gated; AnalyserNode RMS = blow strength ‚Üí inflate‚Üílaunch; small time-domain autocorrelation = hum pitch, clarity-gated, snapped to scale so it's never wrong) ‚Äî **fresh input (mic 0√ó in the last-10 window)** ¬∑ **OUTPUT** **SVG/DOM** (the lab's SCARCEST render surface ‚Äî crisp scalable vector balloons/strings/sky/sparkles animated by rAF mutating cached-node attributes; NOT canvas/WebGL) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** lightweight **Verlet buoyancy** (balloons as point masses w/ upward buoyancy, light damping, sway, damped wall bounds, soft pairwise separation, pop-at-top) ‚Äî **pure, headless-testable** (`physics.ts` + `notes.ts` have no DOM/audio imports) ¬∑ **VIBE** sunny picnic sky, pastel, cheerful. C-major-pentatonic sine+triangle "ahh" voices (volume tied to balloon size, vibrato, fade-in), octave-up bell pop, always-on root+fifth pad; kids-safe `gain ‚â§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6500 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20)`. **Degrade:** mic denied ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + a "Puff" button / Spacebar / blow-slider + a ~2s-idle auto-demo that blows balloons on its own, so it still floats and sings. Files at scratchpad `dream-losers-582/1009-kids-balloon-breath/` (`page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `notes.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition ~2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic + breath/pitch detection + Verlet physics + SVG render + synth] ¬∑ #3 named refs [**Google Blob Opera** voice‚Üísinging-characters; Toca Boca]; fresh input + fresh surface). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the WIDE winner `1008` was the bigger ambition (WebGPU compute) + the only finalist answering JURY #3's GPU-compute ask + love-aligned; **`1009` is the strongest kids resurrect-first** for a cycle that prioritises a **provable, GPU-free, instantly-graspable** artifact ‚Äî it directly pays the jury's #1 verification debt (deterministic physics, hand-testable) AND lights up the scarce SVG/DOM surface. Builder warts (honest): the lightweight autocorrelation can wobble on breathy/sliding hums (scale-snap masks most of it); hum always retunes the *highest* balloon rather than a chosen one; physics constants assume ~60fps.

### `1010-kids-tide-pool` ‚Äî banked as the **WebGPU-`@compute` deepening of `931-kids-tide-pool`** (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** *Tilt the tablet to slosh a pool of glowing water; every wave that crests over a glowing stone rings a soft pentatonic bell.* **‚öÝÔ∏è Not a fresh idea ‚Äî a near-clone of the shipped `931-kids-tide-pool`** ("Moonlit Tide Pool": same name, same tilt‚Üíshallow-water‚Üípentatonic-bells‚Üíbedtime concept). 931 ran its shallow-water sim as **WebGL2 fragment-shader textures**; this explorer's only genuine advance is running the SAME sim as a real **WebGPU `@compute @workgroup_size(8,8)` shallow-water height-field** (192√ó192, ping-pong storage buffers, tilt-uniform gravity, per-frame dispatch + height readback; identical 64√ó64 CPU integrator fallback). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): a test of the pure `cpu.ts` integrator confirmed it stays finite/bounded (max|h|<2 over 400 sustained-tilt steps) and that waves propagate from a centre splash to the far corner ‚Äî exactly the verification-debt template the jury asked for. **So: do NOT ship this as a standalone (it would be the redundant pair Karel flags as "too similar")** ‚Äî instead resurrect it as **931's cycle-2 GPU upgrade**: swap 931's fragment-shader sim for this `@compute` pipeline (the jury-encouraged compute rebuild) while keeping 931's render, and credit it as a deepening, not a new prototype. Files at scratchpad `dream-losers-582/1010-kids-tide-pool/` (`page.tsx`, `gpu.ts`, `cpu.ts`, `tilt.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`). Named refs: shallow-water equations; Jos Stam *Real-Time Fluid Dynamics for Games*; Jerry Tessendorf *Simulating Ocean Water*. Builder warts: GPU height readback is one frame latent; GPU-path "energy" is height-only (velocity buffer not read back ‚Äî CPU uses true |h|+|v|); device-axis feel isn't orientation-corrected (pad/keys are the reliable fallback).

### `1007-modal-anvil-modal` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** The deterministic, **headless-VERIFIABLE** twin of `1006-modal-anvil` ‚Äî same dark-forge struck-metal-plate concept, but the body is a **non-linear modal-synthesis bank** instead of an FD sim, and it ships a live **Chladni nodal-line** visualisation so *the picture literally is the sound*. **The directest verification-debt payer (the jury's #1 standing liability across 5+ verdicts)** ‚Äî ship it on a cycle that prioritises a provable engine over the bigger GPU swing. **INPUT** pointer/touch strike (velocity = force; strike position ‚Üí timbre) + ~2s-idle ghost-hammer auto-demo ¬∑ **OUTPUT** WebGL2 fragment-shader Chladni field (loudest 28 modes as a uniform array, `fwidth()` AA nodal lines, steel‚Üíhot colouring; Canvas2D 96√ó96 fallback) ‚Äî **NOTE for revival:** the brief's most-wanted path is WebGPU `@compute`; this build shipped WebGL2 fragment (an honest deviation) ‚Äî on revival, swap `makeRenderer` to a WebGPU compute field to ALSO clear jury #3 ¬∑ **TECH** non-linear modal synthesis: rectangular simply-supported Kirchhoff plate eigenfreqs `œâ(m,n)=K¬∑((m/Lx)¬≤+(n/Ly)¬≤)` (inharmonic = metal), strike at (x,y) ‚Üí modal gains ‚àù `sin(mœÄx)¬∑sin(nœÄy)¬∑force` (nodal-line strikes don't excite that mode ‚Üí strike position is real timbral control), per-mode frequency-dependent decay `œÑ(œâ)`, and the headline non-linearity `f_i(t)=f_i¬∑(1+Œ≤_i¬∑a_i(t))` so loud=sharp and pitch glides down as the mode decays ¬∑ **VIBE** dark molten-forge (NOT parchment/cosmic). **Engine purity:** all physics in a pure dependency-free `modes.ts` (no audio/DOM) ‚Üí unit-testable; the AudioWorklet does per-sample modal summation (osc-bank fallback), `gain 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7kHz ‚Üí comp(‚àí12/16:1)`, soft-clip. **Verified numbers (computed from `modes.ts`):** Anvil I (Lx=1.0, Ly=0.72, K=471.93) ‚Üí inharmonic 220/445.3/654.7/820.9/880.0 Hz; a force-1.0 centre strike droops the (1,1) fundamental ~232.5 Hz ‚Üí 225.5 Hz over 3s (most of the bend in the first ~1.2s). Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-581/1007-modal-anvil-modal/` (`modes.ts`, `audio.ts` [inlined Blob-URL worklet + osc fallback], `render.ts` [WebGL2 Chladni + Canvas2D], `page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [pointer-strike + non-linear modal bank + Chladni field render + audio-amplitude‚Üíviz coupling] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Bilbao; **Chladni 1787**; Kirchhoff‚ÄìLove / von K√°rm√°n; arXiv:2603.10240; arXiv:2505.05940] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß581). #1 NOT cleanly claimed (modal synth has priors ‚Äî 970-tension-gong did non-linear modal on a single gong; the fresh axis is a full multi-mode plate + the matched Chladni render). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 1006 won on answering jury #3 (the scarce GPU-compute surface, retreated-from 4 cycles running) + being the bigger concept (GPU sim AS the body); 1007 renders WebGL2 fragment (no compute) so it doesn't move the GPU-compute needle, but it is the *stronger verification-debt answer* and a genuinely beautiful "see-the-sound" piece. **Cycle-2 graft (strongest path):** fuse 1007's Chladni nodal-line render onto 1006's GPU FD field (read the GPU displacement ‚Üí draw zero-crossings) so the GPU plate ALSO shows its live standing-wave pattern ‚Äî best of both. Builder warts (honest): no audio/GPU run in-box ‚Äî the worklet pitch-glide smoothness + WebGL2 render are reasoned + math-checked, not heard/seen; the non-linearity is a per-mode `f¬∑(1+Œ≤¬∑a)` approximation, not a full coupled von K√°rm√°n solver.

### `1001-modal-anvil` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** Strike and bow a **dark luminous metal plate that is a real GPU-simulated resonating body** ‚Äî tap to strike, press-drag to bow; the plate's transverse vibration is a genuine `@compute @workgroup_size(8,8,1)` WGSL **explicit finite-difference leapfrog wave step on a 256√ó256 grid** (three double-buffered storage buffers `prev`/`curr`/`next`, rotated per frame; a second WGSL render pipeline samples the field into a glowing Chladni surface ‚Äî antinode glow + thin nodal seams). The sound is **non-linear modal synthesis**: a 16-voice Web Audio bank tuned to inharmonic rectangular-plate ratios `(m¬≤+n¬≤/1.41¬≤)`, where each strike starts the partials **sharp and ramps them DOWN to rest pitch** (amplitude‚Üípitch tension-modulation, higher modes bend more ‚Äî the signature "bloom" of struck bronze/metal), with strike-point mode-shape weighting `|sin(mœÄu)¬∑sin(nœÄv)|`, velocity-driven loudness, faster high-mode decay, and an always-on detuned shimmer drone. Three-tier fallback WebGPU ‚Üí CPU 96¬≤ finite-difference + WebGL2 (R32F) ‚Üí Canvas2D (`text-amber-300/95` notice); audio works on every path; a ghost-mallet auto-demo strikes drifting points after ~2.5s idle. **INPUT** touch/pointer strike+bow ¬∑ **OUTPUT** WebGPU compute + WebGPU/WebGL2 render (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECH** explicit FD plate sim (GPU compute) + non-linear modal synthesis ¬∑ **VIBE** dark metal / Chladni. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-579/1001-modal-anvil/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [touch + GPU-compute plate sim + non-linear modal synth + GPU render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [nlm arXiv:2603.10240; Chladni; the lab's praised `970-tension-gong` non-linear-modal lineage] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß579). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚Äî modal synthesis has lab priors (`970`); the win is the WebGPU-compute realization + GPU-plate scale. **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3 (scarce WebGPU-compute, sim-as-resonating-body) and the boldest technical swing, but `1002` won on verification ease (the live data is *proven*, no permission, no WGSL-compile risk on Karel's phone) ‚Äî and WebGPU-compute is no longer scarce (988+992 shipped it within 5 cycles). **Ship on a GPU-verifiable cycle.** **Honest wart (builder):** the audio is **decoupled from the GPU field** ‚Äî an analytic modal bank sharing the same mode formula + strike-point weighting, not a literal GPU‚ÜíCPU readback (a documented performance tradeoff; faithful in spirit + spatial response, not literally the sim's output). **Cycle-2 fix on revival:** close that loop with a periodic GPU‚ÜíCPU displacement readback at a few pickup points to *excite* the modal bank from the real field (the 988/995 sim-drives-audio pattern), and hand-verify the WGSL on real WebGPU hardware (adapter quirks, storage-buffer limits, the interleaved u32/f32 params layout reasoned-not-observed).

### `1003-voice-nebula` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult / meditative.** Sing/speak/hum and your **voice is scattered into a living nebula** ‚Äî a live 2048-pt FFT (`getFloatFrequencyData`) drives spectral particle emission (loud bins burst more particles, bin frequency ‚Üí hue, spectral centroid ‚Üí vertical drift) into a raw WebGL2 instanced point-sprite cloud (up to **24k** particles, ~6.2s lifetimes, swirl + buoyancy; Canvas2D `lighter` fallback), so a bright vowel scatters differently than a dark hum and the nebula is a slowly-accreting memory of what you sang. In parallel a time-domain tap fills a ~1.6s ring buffer; a look-ahead scheduler cuts ~160ms Hann-windowed grains every ~85ms and replays them through a **4-voice consonant granular re-pitch choir** (unison/fifth/octave/octave+fifth) with long fades ‚Äî a lingering self-harmonized choir that hangs after you stop. **Mic-safe:** raw mic ‚Üí `inGain ‚Üí analyser + grain tap` only (never to `destination`); the sole speaker connection is `limiter ‚Üê choirBus` (buffered grains only). No-mic falls back to a built-in formant vocal-pad driving the identical pipeline (`text-rose-300` notice); ~2.5s-idle auto-demo sings a phrase. **INPUT** mic voice ¬∑ **OUTPUT** raw WebGL2 particle nebula (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECH** live FFT-driven granular synthesis + spectral particle emission ¬∑ **VIBE** cosmic nebula, incense, spectral, meditative. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-579/1003-voice-nebula/` (`page.tsx` ~720 lines, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic FFT + granular re-pitch choir + spectral particle emission + WebGL2 nebula = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Roads *Microsound*; Xenakis grains; Barry Truax real-time granulation] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß579). **#1 NOT claimed** ‚Äî granular + audio-reactive particles have lab priors (`227-paths-granular`). **Why de-selected:** mic permission is the most awkward 06:30 phone check, and *every* gain/threshold/mapping is tuned-by-reasoning-only (highest verification risk of the three); mic is also the most-mined adult input historically. **Honest wart (builder):** the grain ring buffer is filled once per animation frame from the analyser (not an AudioWorklet) ‚Üí not sample-accurate, can smear on fast speech. **On revival:** move grain capture to an AudioWorklet for sample-accurate buffering, and hand-tune loudness/density on a real device.

### `998-kids-firefly-hum` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** HUM into the mic and a swarm of ~24k GPU-simulated fireflies GATHERS to your voice ‚Äî and the swarm's own *coordination* IS the chord (scattered = a single soft tone; locked-together = a full warm bloom). **The research-chained build of this fire** (RESEARCH ¬ß578 ‚Äî the hum is the SIES "task cue" that steers emergence; the flock's cohesion is a continuous, legible harmony control surface) and **the bigger WebGPU-compute swing** the jury keeps encouraging. **INPUT** mic (live RMS ‚Üí smoothed gather cue ‚âà120ms attack/220ms release; optional autocorrelation pitch bias; analysis-only, never stored/transmitted; ghost-hum auto-demo sweeps the cue if denied/idle) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** genuine WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` Reynolds boids (separation/alignment/cohesion + voice-gather force over double-buffered storage buffers; centroid+spread reduced in-shader as fixed-point atomics, async one-frame-behind readback so the GPU never stalls) ‚Üí ~2.5k CPU-boids raw-WebGL2 ‚Üí ~320 Canvas2D, identical audio mapping on all three tiers ¬∑ **TECH** flock coordination (1‚àíspread) ‚Üí 5-voice **D-Lydian** choir lushness, swarm mean-height ‚Üí scale degree, over an always-on D+A drone; kids-safe `gain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6500 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20)` ¬∑ **VIBE** dusk meadow, green-gold twilight. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-578/998-kids-firefly-hum/` (`page.tsx` ~1220 lines, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic pitch/RMS + WebGPU boids compute sim + flock‚Üíchoir synth + instanced GPU render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools," SIGGRAPH 1987; SIES arXiv:2606.24958 2026; sonicviz "Birds Music" WebGPU] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß578 today). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** mic-hum is the most awkward of the three for a 06:30 desk phone-check (the exact reason its twin `990-kids-firefly-flock` was de-selected in ¬ß574), AND the WGSL atomic-readback timing + RMS gain constant are unverifiable-in-box (builder-flagged) ‚Üí highest risk of a broken-on-phone morning artifact, and verification debt is the jury's #1 liability. **But it's the research-chained, biggest-ambition swing** ‚Äî ship it on a cycle that can device-verify a real GPU+mic, or as the next even/kids GPU fire. **Cycle-2 graft:** float the firefly swarm ABOVE another kids scene; let two children hum two flocks for two-voice harmony.

### `999-kids-shadow-zoo` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** Your own SHADOW becomes a glowing singing creature ‚Äî move your body and the silhouette dances and sings (whole-body, off-glass, "do something a touchscreen can't"). **INPUT** front-camera **frame-differencing / background-subtraction silhouette** (NO MediaPipe/CDN model ‚Äî robust + dependency-free: camera ‚Üí 160√ó120 offscreen canvas ‚Üí running background model + temporal diff ‚Üí binary motion mask; derive motion energy [active-pixel fraction], head height [topmost active row], horizontal centroid; frames analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** hand-written raw-WebGL2 additive-glow shader (mask as texture ‚Üí warm amber‚Üírose‚Üíindigo bloom, glowing eyes + embers + lantern backdrop, mirrored; multi-pass-blur Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECH** head height ‚Üí 11-note C-major pentatonic (no wrong notes), energy ‚Üí loudness/brightness/shimmer, centroid ‚Üí stereo pan, always-on detuned drone pad ¬∑ **VIBE** warm storybook shadow-puppet theater, indigo night + paper-lantern glow. Camera-free **ghost auto-demo** (`drawGhostFrame` synthesizes a bobbing blob through the EXACT same mask‚Üífeature‚Üírender‚Üíaudio pipeline) so an unattended phone sees a dancing creature + hears it sing within ~1s. Files banked at scratchpad `dream-losers-578/999-kids-shadow-zoo/` (`page.tsx` ~31KB, `README.md`). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [frame-diff silhouette CV + body-motion‚Üípitch/pan mapping + harmony synth + WebGL2 glow render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [Myron Krueger *Videoplace* 1975; wayang-kulit shadow puppetry]). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** camera-permission friction at 06:30 + the frame-diff threshold (26) / energy scale (√ó7) need per-room tuning (builder-flagged). **Strong resurrect** ‚Äî the only embodied whole-body build of the fire, the dependency-free frame-diff silhouette is a clean reusable asset, and the ghost auto-demo makes it demoable with zero hardware.

### `991-dream-rooms` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult / composers.** A song as a BUILDING you walk through: a **3√ó3 grid of 9 keyed chambers** laid out by circle-of-fifths (horizontal = a fifth apart, sharing 6/7 tones) + relative-minor (vertical, sharing all tones), so ordinary walking produces musically sensible **modulations** ‚Äî crossing a doorway changes the key and a drone pad crossfades old-tonic‚Üínew-tonic, the crossfade time scaling with shared pivot-tone count, a lowpass bloom marking the modulation. Inside a chamber, fine position picks a real functional triad/7th (major I¬∑vi¬∑IV¬∑ii¬∑V¬∑iii / minor i¬∑VI¬∑iv¬∑ii¬∞¬∑V¬∑III). **INPUT** body-pose (MediaPipe torso centroid) + pointer/touch fallback + ~1.5s-idle auto-demo (a wanderer crosses rooms, audibly modulating, recording a couple of ghosts) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** WebGPU particle field (WGSL‚ÜíWebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D) + an always-visible Canvas2D **operator floor-plan map** (all 9 chambers + key labels + every ghost dot + you ‚Äî the installation/Tauri view) ¬∑ **TECH** modulation-by-walking + per-chamber functional harmony + a 6-ghost HRTF looper where each ghost lives in its home chamber and is muffled "through the walls" (per-voice lowpass ~520 Hz + lower gain) until you enter, then blooms ¬∑ **VIBE** warm chamber-glow per key (not parchment, not cosmic). Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-575/991-dream-rooms/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 4/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [pose/pointer + per-room functional harmony + HRTF ghost looper + WebGPU render + operator map = 5] ¬∑ #3 [La Monte Young _Dream House_ / Cardiff _Forty Part Motet_] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle [977 thread] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß575). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 992 won on the purest-timbre fit to JURY #1 + lowest unheard-risk; **991 is the strongest *operator-map / discrete-rooms* swing** and the most literal "extend 977 into a room you walk between." **Cycle-2 fix on revival:** replace the simplified tonic-drone crossfade with true **voice-led pivot-chord re-spelling** (carry the shared chord, re-voice the rest) for a real modulation engine; merge as 992's discrete-rooms layer.

### `993-resonant-halls` ‚Äî `queued`
**For: adult.** The ROOM ITSELF as the instrument: a **cruciform cathedral** (apse ¬∑ nave ¬∑ 2 side chapels ¬∑ crypt) where each hall has its own **acoustics** ‚Äî a per-hall `ConvolverNode` whose impulse response is *procedurally synthesised in code* (exp-decay noise shaped by a spectral tilt + discrete early reflections, peak-normalised, `normalize=false`; ~5.8s dark apse ‚Üí ~1.1s tight crypt) plus a parallel bank of 3‚Äì4 peaking-biquad **room modes** tuned to each hall's eigenfrequencies ‚Äî so the same sung voice becomes a totally different sound as you cross a doorway (Gaussian-proximity acoustic crossfade). A 6-ghost HRTF looper sings from each ghost's home hall through *that hall's* reverb, muffled at distance, blooming when you enter. **INPUT** body-pose + pointer + auto-demo ¬∑ **OUTPUT** WebGPU particle field (‚ÜíWebGL2‚ÜíCanvas2D) + Canvas2D floor-plan operator map (halls + ghosts + live acoustic readout: decay time, modes) ¬∑ **TECH** procedural convolution-IR + modal room coloration as the playable substance ‚Äî the lab's **first room-acoustics-as-instrument** (a globally novel technique here) ¬∑ **VIBE** candlelit stone cathedral. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-575/993-resonant-halls/` (`page.tsx`, `README.md`). **Ambition 4/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [pose/pointer + procedural-IR convolution + modal banks + HRTF ghost looper + WebGPU render = 5] ¬∑ #3 [acoustic-digital-twin; Cardiff _Forty Part Motet_; Young _Dream House_] ¬∑ #4 multi-cycle ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß575). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** the most novel technique of the three, but the **heaviest/riskiest unheard build** ‚Äî 5 parallel convolvers on the live voice (builder-flagged perf/balance risk) made it the wrong pick for a 06:30 first-listen given the standing verification debt. **On revival:** trim to lazy per-hall convolvers (only instantiate the active hall + neighbours), hand-verify the reverb balance on a real device; reusable as 992's per-room-acoustics layer.

### `990-kids-firefly-flock` ‚Äî `queued`

Largest GPU-compute count of the fire (~30k boids) with the cleanest design (async one-frame-behind readback so the GPU never stalls); freshest sensor (mic, 1√ó). **INPUT** mic (live autocorrelation pitch + RMS, analysis-only, never stored/transmitted; ghost-hum auto-demo sweeps a pitch through the same pipeline if mic denied/idle) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** **WebGPU compute boids** (WGSL `@compute` Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion over double-buffered storage buffers + a voice-pitch gather force; instanced additive gold-green render; ~3.5k CPU-boids WebGL2 fallback) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** Reynolds boids ‚Üí swarm mean-height = scale degree (C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), swarm cohesion = choir lushness (tight=full chord, scattered=single tone), voice RMS = brightness/energy ¬∑ **VIBE** dusk meadow, green-blue twilight, warm gold-green firefly glints. Kids-safe `gain 0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 6.5k ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`, ‚â•30ms ramps, always-on drone, never silent. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-574/990-kids-firefly-flock/` (`page.tsx`, `boids-gpu.ts`, `gl-fallback.ts`, `pitch.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic pitch/RMS + WebGPU boids sim + flock‚Üíchoir synth + instanced GPU render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named ref [Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools," SIGGRAPH 1987] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß574). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** mic-hum is the most awkward of the three for a 06:30 phone check (humming at a desk) though the ghost-hum auto-demo guarantees a sounding glance; 988's touch is the cleaner verification dent. **Strong resurrect** ‚Äî encourages vocalization (great for 4yo development) and the 30k-boid swarm is a reusable GPU asset (see 989's cycle-2 graft).

## ¬ß572 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-06-27 (cycle 572 ¬∑ KIDS ¬∑ DEEP ‚Äî 1 non-winner approach, built complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `984-kids-shake-bells`)

DEEP kids fire: ONE concept ‚Äî *SHAKE the tablet like a tray of magic handbells ‚Üí real physically-modeled modal bells ring on a G-Mixolydian ladder* (resurrects the ¬ß570 ‚≠ê banked `kids-shake-bells` seed; clears JURY 2026-06-26 #1 "no pentatonic crutch ‚Äî real mode/tension" via Mixolydian + #3 "force a non-pointer input" via off-glass accelerometer; dodges the at-cap diversity tags keyboard/MIDI-input and Canvas2D-output). Built via 2 interaction models. Shipped **`984-kids-shake-bells`** (discrete shake-ONSET ‚Üí ladder climbs/descends, one shake = one clear bell ‚Äî the kid-legible, robust, easiest-to-verify version). The continuous-physics sibling below returned complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-572/`, then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **984**, so resurrect as ‚â•985).

### `985-kids-shake-mobile` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The **continuous-physics** sibling of `984-kids-shake-bells`: instead of a discrete shake-onset triggering the next bell, the shake feeds ENERGY into a small **Verlet/simple-pendulum sim of ~8 hanging handbells on strings** ‚Äî the bells SWAY, and a bell rings when its **angular swing velocity peaks past a clapper threshold** near the bottom of its arc (or it **knock-collides** with a neighbor). So the music is *born from the simulated swing the child caused*, not from an input threshold ‚Äî a sweeping shake propagates a rising/falling **modal shimmer** as the swing travels down the mobile. **INPUT** device SHAKE (`DeviceMotionEvent`, gravity high-passed to linear accel ‚Üí angular impulse; iOS `requestPermission()` in Start; ‚â•176px SHAKE! button + pointer-drag + spacebar + ~3s-idle ghost auto-swayer fallbacks) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 instanced additive-glow bells on faint swaying strings over a breathing blue-violet night (Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** shake‚Üíenergy‚Üípendulum swing sim ‚Üí ring-on-clapper-velocity-peak / neighbor-collision ‚Üí real **modal bell synthesis** (inharmonic partials ~1/2/2.4/3/4.5, per-partial decays + detune beating; strike loudness=swing velocity) ¬∑ **VIBE** warm gold handbell mobile, calm night (off cosmic-glow). **Mode = G Mixolydian** (flat-7 F‚ôÆ color, NOT pentatonic, NOT a functional cadence). Kids-safe `gain ‚â§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 6500 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`, always-on G2+D3 drone, ‚àö-voice norm, ~12-min goodnight fade. Files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-572/985-kids-shake-mobile/` (`page.tsx`, `audio.ts`, `physics.ts`, `motion.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`); exposed tuning constants `SHAKE_ENERGY_GAIN`/`CLAPPER_THRESHOLD`/`COLLISION_GAP`. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [shake-reader + pendulum physics sim + modal bell synth + WebGL2 mobile render = 4] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Orff Schulwerk; simple-pendulum `Œ±=-(g/L)sinŒ∏`; Mixolydian modal color; Moving Mandala 2025] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß572). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 984 won on the KIDS bar ‚Äî discrete shake‚Üíring‚Üíclimb gives a 4yo crisp *repeatable* cause‚Üíeffect and is the most robust unheard ship (one shake = one clear bell), whereas 985's emergent clapper-ring timing is exactly what needs real-device tuning (builder flagged the velocity-peak debounce) and verification debt is the jury's #1 liability. **But 985 is the braver/bigger concept and the purer "the sound is born from your motion" embodiment.** **Cycle-2 graft (the strongest path):** fold 985's swing-physics BETWEEN 984's discrete bells ‚Äî the bells visibly SWAY between strikes and a hard shake sends a swing-wave down the ladder, marrying 984's legible onset with 985's emergent shimmer. Honest warts (builder): physics constants reasoned-not-device-measured; bell timbre not ear-verified; clapper velocity-peak heuristic is a stand-in for true clapper geometry.

## ¬ß571 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-06-27 (cycle 571 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ DEEP ‚Äî 1 non-winner approach, built complete + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected; shipped `983-tension-journey`)

Built to demoable this fire, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-571/`, then `rm -rf`'d un-committed per the orchestration no-half-built-folders rule. Clears the ambition floor (3/5), is sound-as-object + non-pointer (keyboard/Web-MIDI), and is the real-time *played* twin of the shipped autonomous engine. Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **983**, so resurrect as ‚â•984).

- **982-tension-ribbon ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** ‚Äî the real-time *played* tonal-tension instrument. Play chords on the computer keyboard or a **Web-MIDI keyboard**; for each chord the engine computes Elaine Chew's three Spiral-Array tension measures (cloud diameter / cloud momentum / tensile strain on a real 3D helix) live and renders them as a flowing **raw-WebGL2 3D tension ribbon** (width=diameter, twist/displacement=momentum, heat-color indigo‚Üíamber‚Üírose=strain) with labeled numeric meters; the synth foregrounds tension audibly (lowpass opens + triangle‚Üísawtooth partials + detune-cents roughness as tension climbs; warm/narrow on resolution). Chord palette includes a tense chromatic set (N6, Ger+6, Aug, dim7, tritone-sub, cluster) so you can build tension and slam it home; ~1s auto-demo rises and resolves; Canvas2D fallback. Builder-complete + tsc/eslint-clean. **Honest warts to fix on revival:** (1) **fixed C-major key ‚Üí static tensile-strain anchor** (no key tracking) ‚Äî add a decaying running-CE key estimate so strain re-homes on modulation (the same fix 983 wants); (2) normalization divisors heuristic, not corpus-fitted; (3) pitch-class collapse (register/voice-leading ignored). **Cycle-2 graft (the strongest path):** fold 982's live 3D spiral-helix viz + Web-MIDI-played perturbation INTO the shipped **983-tension-journey** so you can *watch the engine compose AND grab the keyboard to bend the live tension target by hand* ‚Äî the autonomous journey and the played instrument become one piece. Refs: Chew *The Spiral Array* (2014); Herremans & Chew "Tension ribbons" (TENOR 2016); MorpheuS (IEEE TAC). RESEARCH ¬ß571.

## ¬ß570 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-27 (cycle 570 ¬∑ KIDS ¬∑ WIDE ‚Äî 2 non-winner explorers, built complete + builder-reported tsc-clean, then de-selected; shipped `981-kids-happy-sad-tree`)

Both built to demoable in this fire, `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-570/`, then `rm -rf`'d un-committed per the orchestration no-half-built-folders rule. Each clears the ambition floor, uses **real (non-pentatonic) harmony**, and is a **non-pointer input** ‚Üí all three explorers answered the same JURY #1+#3 pair three different ways (tap / shake / breath). Renumber on revival (max committed folder after this fire = **981**, so resurrect as ‚â•982).

### `982-kids-shake-bells` ‚Äî `queued` (off-glass accelerometer; modal bell ladder)
**SHAKE the phone/tablet like a tambourine of magic handbells (accelerometer, fully off-glass) to ring bells tuned to a real G-Mixolydian ladder that climbs then descends with successive shakes.** Shake **intensity** ‚Üí how many bells ring + burst brightness (gentle = 1‚Äì2 soft tones; big = a full sparkling arpeggio). The mode is **G Mixolydian (G A B C D E F‚ôÆ)** ‚Äî the lowered-7th F‚ôÆ is the bright modal flavor; **NOT a I‚ÄìIV‚ÄìV‚ÄìI cadence** (deliberately swapped off the cadence to dodge the rhyme with 957 V‚ÜíI / 974 V7‚ÜíI) and **NOT pentatonic**. Always-on soft G drone + fifth grounds it. INPUT `devicemotion` shake-onset: high-pass `accelerationIncludingGravity` (subtract a slow gravity LPF), jerk-magnitude threshold crossing w/ ~150ms refractory, peak‚Üíintensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; 176px round SHAKE! button + spacebar fallback + `text-rose-300` sensor-denied notice + ghost auto-shaker after ~3s idle. OUTPUT **raw WebGL2** point-sprite radial-glow bell field (warm gold over breathing blue-violet night) + Canvas2D fallback ‚Äî **NOT WebGPU** (shows fallback on most phones + unverifiable headless). Kids-safe `gain ‚â§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ~6500 ‚Üí comp`, ~15-min fade. Named refs: **Orff Schulwerk** body-percussion/handbell pedagogy + modal (Mixolydian) color vs functional cadence + 2026 embodied-music-education research. Files: `page.tsx` `audio.ts` (`BellEngine`) `motion.ts` (`ShakeOnset`) `gl.ts` (`BellFieldGL`/`BellField2D`) `README.md`. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 device-SHAKE is a lab-rare input ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems [shake-onset detector + modal walker + bell synth + WebGL2 field] ¬∑ #3 named ref). **Why banked (close):** the most embodied/off-glass of the three (directest JURY #3), but accelerometer **needs real-iPad threshold calibration** (builder: "reasoned-not-measured") + iOS permission, so it's **less self-verifiable on Karel's morning phone** than the winner ‚Äî and the jury's #1 liability this fortnight is verification debt. **Resurrect** on a kids fire where the recent ships are NOT camera/permission-heavy; the shake-onset + modal-walker are a clean reusable pair.

### `983-kids-breath-meadow` ‚Äî `queued` (mic breath-ENERGY, not pitch; Canvas2D)
**Blow / breathe into the mic to grow a singing meadow ‚Äî where breath ENERGY (a smoothed RMS envelope, explicitly NOT pitch) swells a real voice-led chord, and each new breath walks a functional progression forward.** The design point that separates it from the lab's many sing/hum pieces (969/972/924/891): **no pitch detection at all** ‚Äî sustained breath = a sustained chord that swells (more voices smoothstep in the harder you blow), and a **fresh onset after a >250ms quiet gap** steps a genuine diatonic **D-Lydian I‚ÄìII‚Äìvi‚ÄìIV** progression with portamento voice-leading. A flower blooms per breath (size = peak breath energy, color = chord root). INPUT `getUserMedia` ‚Üí Analyser ‚Üí time-domain RMS, one-pole smoothed to a 0..1 envelope; onset = rise above threshold after the quiet gate; mic gesture-gated, **analysed only (never routed to speakers ‚Äî no feedback)**; big "BREATHE" hold-button + spacebar-hold fallback + `text-rose-300` deny notice + ghost auto-breather after ~3s idle. OUTPUT **Canvas2D** organic daylight meadow (blooming flowers, swaying grass, pollen) ‚Äî deliberately off the over-used GPU-shader lane. Kids-safe chain + always-on pad + ~15-min fade. Named refs: breath-controlled wind instruments (EWI/shakuhachi: breath energy ‚Üí dynamics) + Lydian "bright/dreamy" affect + breath/vocalization for 4yo language+music development. Files: `page.tsx` `audio.ts` `mic.ts` `README.md`. **Ambition 2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [breath-energy RMS detector + swelling voice-led chord engine + functional-progression walker + Canvas2D meadow] ¬∑ #3 named refs). **Why banked:** the freshest *concept* (breath-energy, not pitch ‚Äî a genuinely under-mined input channel) but mic permission + breath-onset thresholding is the **least reliable on first try** (builder flagged the companding is ear-tuned against synthetic input), and a minor wart (only the newest flower sizes to the live peak, so a rapid double-onset under-sizes the prior bloom). **Resurrect** on a fire that wants a calm mic piece; fix the per-flower peak-latching first, and consider a visible breath-meter so a child sees the swell building.

## ¬ß569 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-06-27 (cycle 569 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ DEEP non-winner, fully built + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, then de-selected)

### `980-counterpoint-loom` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (adult) ‚Äî `queued`
*"What if, the moment I play a melody, the lab wove 1‚Äì3 more voices around it LIVE ‚Äî by the actual enforced rules of species counterpoint ‚Äî and I could watch each rule fire as it happens?"* A **real-time, deterministic, explainable contrapuntal accompanist** (the sibling to this cycle's winner `979-cantus-engine`; same "explainable inverse of the neural Bach-imitators" thesis, RESEARCH ¬ß569 / arXiv 2606.13626, opposite interaction model ‚Äî *live accompanist* vs `979`'s *autonomous developer*). You play the cantus firmus (Web MIDI **or** computer keyboard `A‚ÄìK`/`Q‚ÄìU`, two diatonic octaves; notes quantized to a selectable key/mode); a per-beat **beam search (width ~6)** weaves 1‚Äì3 companion voices under **enforced Fux constraints ‚Äî 0 violations:** strong-beat consonance (P4 between upper voices = dissonant), no parallel/direct/hidden perfect fifths-octaves (perfects only by contrary/oblique motion), no voice crossing below the CF, 4th-species suspensions prepared‚Üítied‚Üíresolved-down-by-step. *Rewarded:* 3rds/6ths, contrary motion, stepwise lines, one climax/phrase, register-center. **True multi-part counterpoint ‚Äî joint scoring:** each new voice is scored against the CF **and** the companions already chosen for the same beat (full vertical sonority), not N independent duets. Species **1st** (solid), **2nd** (weak-beat passing), **4th** (suspensions) selectable. **INPUT** Web-MIDI+keyboard (non-pointer; revives the 1√ó MIDI sensor per JURY 2026-06-26 #3) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** raw-WebGL2 woven-score on parchment-dark (amber CF + violet/sage/slate companions in register tiers, interval labels at the leading edge, thickened suspension links, **rose `‚à•5 ‚úó / ‚Üí8 ‚úó / P4 ‚úó / TT ‚úó / cross ‚úó / diss ‚úó` reject-flashes so the rules read sound-off**; Canvas2D fallback) ¬∑ **TECH** real-time enforced species-counterpoint beam search ¬∑ **VIBE** woven manuscript/loom. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [MIDI/keyboard input + beam-search counterpoint engine + FM-triangle synth + WebGL2 loom render] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* 1725, Palestrina, Bach two-part inventions, arXiv 2606.13626] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß569). Self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; files banked at `/tmp/dream-losers-569/980-counterpoint-loom/` (`page.tsx`, `counterpoint.ts`, `audio.ts`, `gl.ts`, `README.md`). **Why banked (close):** both clear ambition + dodge every ban + are pure-music sound-as-object; `979` won on the "massively bigger" mandate ‚Äî a 5-min *self-developing* fugue with state/memory (minute 5 ‚âÝ minute 1) lands the lab's thin **long-form-with-memory** menu category and is the ‚≠ê ¬ß568-queued resurrect-first seed, whereas `980` is a per-beat reactive accompanist conceptually nearer the lab's existing call-and-response/canon pieces. **Why ‚≠ê resurrect-first AND the cycle-2 graft for 979:** `980`'s **enforced beam search + visible rule-rejection overlay directly fixes `979`'s #1 honest wart** (greedy, no-lookahead voice-leading). The clean cycle-2 deepening of the counterpoint thread = fold `980`'s enforced beam-search scorer + the `‚à•5/8 ‚úó` reject-flash overlay INTO `979`, so a composer can seed a subject live AND watch the development engine *reject* parallel-5/8 candidates as it scores ‚Äî turning `979`'s greedy scorer into `980`'s enforced search. Honest warts (builder): fixed-grid beat (not yet rhythm-/onset-aware); 2nd-species doesn't yet verify genuine passing tones; beam is per-voice-sequential not joint-all-voices; no melodic-leap-recovery / cadence formulas; WebGL2 path omits numeric interval labels (needs a glyph atlas ‚Äî present only in the Canvas2D path).

Built via 2 interaction models. Shipped **`974-kids-tilt-cadence`** (discrete T/S/D **wells** + marble physics ‚Äî the kid-legible, bold color-coded version: gold I / green IV / orange V7, roll orange‚Üígold = cadence, every time). The continuous-gradient sibling below returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc/eslint-clean (README written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief.

### `975-kids-tilt-hill` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**For: kids (4+).** The **continuous tension-gradient** sibling of `974-kids-tilt-cadence`: instead of three discrete wells, ONE smooth glowing sunset hill where **harmonic tension = altitude**. The valley floor is Home (Tonic I); tilt makes a single warm orb CLIMB toward the Dominant 7th (the leading tone E + chordal 7th B‚ô≠ audibly swell, detune, and beat harder as you climb), and releasing the tilt lets gravity slide the orb home ‚Äî the dominant tension resolving continuously on the way down (E‚ÜëF, B‚ô≠‚ÜìA) as one exhaled breath, with a warm bloom + chime on arrival. **INPUT** device TILT (`DeviceOrientation gamma` ‚Üí sideways gravity drive; iOS `requestPermission()` in Start) ¬∑ **OUTPUT** Canvas2D additive warm-glow (amber/rose/gold sunset hill; orb core warm-amber at home ‚Üí bright rose-white at V7) ¬∑ **TECHNIQUE** continuous 1-D harmonic-tension field ‚Äî tilt‚Üíaltitude‚Üía tension scalar `t‚àà[0,1]` cross-fades I‚Üíii/IV‚ÜíV7 AND swells the two tension-defining tones in proportion to `t` (real voice-leading, NOT a chord swap; NOT pentatonic) ¬∑ **VIBE** warm sunset, calm, kids-safe (always-on tonic drone, ramped gains, low-pass, no sudden transients). **Degrade:** no sensor ‚Üí horizontal slider + drag-the-orb + ‚Üê‚Üí‚Üë‚Üì/space all set the same `t`; ~3s-idle hands-free auto-demo runs a slow climb-to-V7-then-release arc; rose-300 sensor note. **Named refs:** Riemann functional harmony ¬∑ tonal-gravity / tension-as-altitude models ¬∑ BeSound ¬∑ CHI 2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back" (movement-based sonification). **Ambition 2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [tilt physics + continuous functional-harmony field + synth + Canvas2D render] ¬∑ #3 named refs; #5 RESEARCH ¬ß566). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 974 won on KIDS *legibility* ‚Äî three bold color-coded wells give a 4yo a clear target and a crisp repeatable magic moment (color is the kids language). **But 975 is the purer embodiment of this cycle's research dive** (CHI 2026 "movement carries a *quality*, not just a trigger") ‚Äî tilt here carries continuous tension, not a chord selection ‚Äî so it is the strongest next-cycle deepening / kids resurrect-first; a natural cycle-2 is to graft 975's continuous tension-trail BETWEEN 974's wells (the marble's harmonic "altitude" between basins becomes audible). Builder note: `gamma ¬±35¬∞` = full tilt wants real-device tuning. Folder had `page.tsx` + `physics.ts` + `audio.ts` + README.

**For: adults.** The **maximally-legible Canvas2D twin** of `973-wave-terrain`: instead of a 3D landscape, a **top-down contour/elevation heatmap** (warm earth palette + iso-lines) with the **orbit** drawn as a bright loop over it and a glowing read-point sweeping it ‚Äî AND, side-by-side, a **scope panel** plotting the terrain heights sampled along the orbit (= exactly one period of the tone you hear) plus a small live spectrum strip. Files built this fire (lint+full-project-tsc clean): `terrain.ts` (5 presets dunes/ridges/ripples/saddle/crater + orbit + period sampler + heightmap grid) + `audio.ts` (real-DFT‚ÜíPeriodicWave engine + D-Dorian map + keyboard layout) + `page.tsx` (Canvas2D contour + orbit + read-point + scope/spectrum panel + Start gate + design-notes toggle + teardown) + README. Ambition 4/5 (#1 wave-terrain [grep-0√ó] ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems [keyboard/MIDI + orbit-sampler/morph + DFT-PeriodicWave synth + Canvas2D contour+scope render] ¬∑ #3 named refs [Mitsuhashi 1982; Borgonovo & Haus 1986; Roads *Microsound*; Scaler *Carbon Electra 2* May 28 2026; Conductive Labs *Terrain* 2025] ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß565). **De-selected ONLY because** 973's WebGL2 3D landscape is the more *spectacular and surprising* realization of "the landscape IS the sound" (Karel's surprise priority) and the stronger non-cosmic register; 974 is the *more legible/provable* and *more bulletproof* one. **Resurrect FIRST** on the next adult cycle wanting a guaranteed-everywhere render, a phone/installation surface, or the directest "see the waveform you're carving" teaching view ‚Äî OR fold its provable side-by-side scope panel INTO 973 as a toggle. ## ¬ß564 banked seeds ‚Äî 2026-06-26 (cycle 564 ¬∑ KIDS ¬∑ WIDE non-winners, both fully built + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean, then de-selected)

WIDE kids fire: 3 orthogonal explorers, each a **non-pointer input into REAL functional harmony** (answering JURY 2026-06-26 ban #1 "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch ‚Äî give them a real mode/progression/tension-resolution" + #3 "force a non-pointer input"; dodging every ban: pointer-drag-primary ¬∑ cosmic-glow ¬∑ pentatonic-kids ¬∑ GPU-sim-pulse-bell). Shipped **`972-kids-sing-garden`** (MIC live-voice-pitch ‚Üí real functional voice-leading accompaniment; the directest hit on ban #1 + the jury-blessed Canvas2D + a recent-research anchor). The two below returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) ‚Äî rebuild from these briefs.

### `971-kids-tilt-cadence` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST (kids) ‚Äî `queued`
**The one question:** *what if a 4-year-old could FEEL a real V7‚ÜíI cadence in their hands ‚Äî by TILTing the tablet to roll a glowing marble home through a tension-and-resolution landscape?* **Input = device TILT** (DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` ‚Üí gravity vector; non-pointer, off the banned drag-on-glass; iOS `requestPermission()` inside Start). **Output = WebGL2/Canvas2D additive glow**, warm meadow (NOT cosmic glow). **Technique = tilt rigid-body marble physics + Riemann functional-harmony T‚ÄìS‚ÄìD‚ÄìT state machine** (a damped point-mass rolls into "bowl" wells; well transitions drive a chord machine). Three colored wells: **gold Home = Tonic (I)**, **green Away = Subdominant (IV)**, **orange Tense = Dominant (V7, with the leading tone)**. The magic moment: roll the marble from the orange Dominant well into the gold Tonic well ‚Üí a real **V7‚ÜíI cadence** fires, sparks burst, flowers bloom ‚Äî *tension ‚Üí home, learned in the hands*. Always-on tonic drone; kids-safe chain. **Degrade:** no sensor ‚Üí pointer tilt-pad + arrow nudges + a hands-free auto-demo rolling a full T‚ÜíS‚ÜíD‚ÜíI loop within ~1 s. **Named refs:** Hugo Riemann functional harmony (the wells ARE T/S/D) ¬∑ Toca Boca tilt-toys ¬∑ BeSound (embodied music education for children). Ambition **2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [tilt-physics + functional state machine + synth + render] ¬∑ #3 named refs). **Why de-selected (not weakness):** 972 won on real-harmony *depth* (it makes harmony FROM the child's actual voice; this has 3 fixed wells) + a recent-research anchor ‚Äî but tilt is fresh (jury at 3√ó, not banned) and the *felt-cadence-in-your-hands* framing is the strongest kids hook banked; resurrect-first. Builder note: tilt sensitivity (`/35`) + `accel=1.9` need real-device tuning. Folder had `page.tsx` + `physics.ts` + `engine.ts` + README.

### `973-kids-step-parade` ‚Äî `queued`
**The one question:** *what if a child's whole-body DANCING drove the tempo and energy of a real chord-progression parade ‚Äî move a lot ‚Üí the parade marches bright and fast, stand still ‚Üí it slows to a gentle lullaby on home?* **Input = front CAMERA whole-body motion-energy** (frame-difference / optical-flow: downscale each frame to 64√ó48, diff consecutive frames, sum |luminance change| ‚Üí one smoothed scalar; NO ML model, robust across lighting; analysis-only, never recorded). The scarce camera/body sensor; off pointer-drag. **Output = WebGL2 fragment-shader parade** (four glowing creatures, one per chord). **Technique = camera optical-flow motion-energy ‚Üí tempo/dynamics modulation of a fixed I‚Äìvi‚ÄìIV‚ÄìV functional loop** (C‚ÄìAm‚ÄìF‚ÄìG, the "four-chord song" / doo-wop changes ‚Äî recognizable real harmony, NOT pentatonic) on a lookahead Web Audio scheduler (energy ‚Üí BPM 54‚Üí132, pad brightness, pluck density). The harmony is always correct; the child shapes its *energy* with their body. **Degrade:** no camera ‚Üí ‚â•96 px tap pad + slider feeding the same `inject()` energy + a hands-free auto-demo marching within ~1 s; no WebGL ‚Üí notice, audio keeps playing. **Named refs:** BeSound (whole-body ‚Üí harmony for children) ¬∑ Myron Krueger *Videoplace* (full-body camera, no wearables) ¬∑ "Moving Mandala" (2025, embodied MR synchrony in children). Ambition **2/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [camera motion-energy + groove engine + harmony loop + WebGL2 render] ¬∑ #3 named refs). **Why de-selected:** strong embodied/diversity answer, but the child only modulates *energy* of a fixed loop ‚Äî 972 lets the child *generate* the harmony. Resurrect when doing the camera-sensor revival; pairs with adult-side camera builds. Folder had `page.tsx` + `motion.ts` + `transport.ts` + `parade.ts` + README.
