## ¬ß499 (Cycle 499 ‚Äî adult DEEP fire, ONE concept √ó 3 synthesis methods, 2 banked)

Cycle 499 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out ‚Äî ONE concept (*your whole moving body plays an invisible, room-sized **physical-modeling instrument**: the front camera projects your limbs into a 3D field of suspended resonators, and on spatial collision they EXCITE real physical-modeling synthesis that rings and slowly accretes into a room-drone different at minute 5 than minute 1*), attacked via **3 synthesis methods**. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went **4√ó‚Üí0√ó** ‚Äî the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag at once) + **#2** (the depth ceiling collapsed 4‚Üí1 ‚Äî build a real long-form ceiling build) + **#3** (rests his recording) + **#1** (off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D ‚Äî onto three.js). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß499 today ‚Äî **CHI-2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back"** + the **MediaPipe-gesture‚Üísound framework** (arXiv 2504.19460), with **Vrengt** (NIME body-machine instrument) + **Cadoz/ACROE CORDIS-ANIMA** physical modeling as the technique spine. All three project wrists/head/ankles as exciters, render a dark volumetric installation room in three.js, accrete a multi-minute resonant bed, and degrade to a ghost body. **Winner `803-body-chimes`** (modal struck-bell/bar/bowl room ‚Äî the most complete ceiling build [sympathetic mode-bed + struck-body memory + root-drift], the most robust unattended [standard BiquadFilter banks, no fragile worklet], the richest installation visuals, and the freshest lab concept). Both losers were demoable + verified clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule (loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-499/` this fire, not committed). **Max committed folder after this fire is `803`** (banked names `802`/`804` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`802-body-aviary`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *Your whole body plays an invisible room-sized instrument of PLUCKED STRINGS ‚Äî each limb sweeping through a 3D forest of ~28 suspended strings, plucking the ones it crosses, which ring with real Karplus-Strong physical modeling.* Front camera ‚Üí MediaPipe Pose; 5 exciters (wrists/head/ankles, projected with real MediaPipe `z` depth) collide (proximity + per-string refractory) with a golden-angle 3D string forest tuned to a 7-note just-intonation field (`1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8` over A 110 Hz, 4 octaves); each pluck = **genuine Karplus-Strong** in a single **AudioWorklet built from a Blob URL** (delay line `L = sampleRate/freq`, band-limited noise burst, one-pole lowpass loop filter ‚Üí fed back just under 1; limb speed ‚Üí amplitude + loop brightness; 16-voice steal). **Long-form accretion:** a very-high-Q sympathetic bed whose gain rises with cumulative pluck activity and leaks over minutes (decay `0.99997`/sample) + a `RootDrift` slow random walk that re-tunes the whole forest every 18‚Äì40 s ‚Äî minute 5 fuller than minute 1. INPUT = body/camera ¬∑ OUTPUT = three.js (dark violet‚Üíamber volumetric forest, glowing strings that wobble as they ring, additive exciter orbs, breathing camera) ¬∑ TECH = Karplus-Strong plucked-string physical modeling + 3D spatial collision ¬∑ VIBE = adult/installation/nocturnal. Ghost-body fallback within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; iOS gesture-gated; full teardown. Built clean at `src/app/dream/802-body-aviary/` (`page.tsx` ~632 lines + `audio.ts` [KS AudioWorklet engine] + `forest.ts` + `pose.ts` + README; self-reported **tsc 0 + ESLint 0/0**, "‚úì Compiled successfully"). Refs: **Vrengt** (NIME/arXiv:2010.03779) ¬∑ **Karplus-Strong / Jaffe-Smith** (CMJ 1983) ¬∑ Laetitia Sonami / Atau Tanaka. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß499). **Why it lost (a close call):** the highest-tech synthesis of the three (real KS in a worklet ‚Äî arguably the strongest "never-used technique" claim) and the most iconic physical-modeling voice, but the **Blob-URL AudioWorklet adds the most runtime fragility on an unattended straight-to-prod cycle** (a worklet-load failure = silence), and KS-pluck softly rhymes with `105-pluck-field` (mic-onset Karplus). **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** ‚Äî ship it the moment a worklet slot is wanted; it's the highest-ceiling synthesis pick. (Note: this builder ran `npm install` and dirtied `package-lock.json` ‚Äî restored before commit; on resurrect, don't let the builder touch the lockfile.)

- **`804-body-veil`** (adult, banked). *Your whole body is inside ONE enormous SYMPATHETIC RESONATOR ‚Äî a veil of ~44 high-Q bandpass "strings" tuned to a single just-intonation chord (over A1 55 Hz, 4 octaves) that fills the room ‚Äî and every limb-motion brushes filtered-noise excitation into the strings nearest it (Gaussian distance √ó speed), which keep ringing and decaying after you pass (sympathetic sustain). It's always consonant (one chord) and enveloping ‚Äî "like running your hands across a giant open piano with the sustain pedal down."* **Long-form accretion (4 real processes):** master-lowpass brightness opens ~700 Hz‚Üí5.9 kHz over ~4 min; reverb wash grows over ~5 min; a wandering active-register band migrates the most-alive part of the veil; a drifting root glides a slow **I‚ÜíII‚ÜíIV** (`1‚Üí9/8‚Üí4/3`) every ~3 min ‚Äî minute 5 ‚âÝ minute 1. INPUT = body/camera ¬∑ OUTPUT = three.js (hanging curtain of glowing filaments that brighten/shiver with ring energy, aurora brush-orbs trailing wakes, violet-teal enveloping fog, slow camera breath) ¬∑ TECH = sympathetic-resonance physical modeling (high-Q bandpass bank brushed spatially; excitation NEVER fed by output ‚Äî no feedback) ¬∑ VIBE = adult/installation/enveloping aurora. Seed drone so it's alive immediately; ghost-body fallback + `text-rose-300` notice; iOS gesture-gated; full teardown. Built clean at `src/app/dream/804-body-veil/` (`page.tsx` + `synth.ts` + `veil.ts` + `pose.ts` + README; self-reported **tsc --noEmit + eslint clean**). Refs: **Vrengt** (NIME/arXiv:2010.03779) ¬∑ **sympathetic strings** (grand-piano sustain pedal / sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore) ¬∑ **√âliane Radigue / Alvin Lucier** room-resonance drones. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß499). **Why it lost:** the most beautiful and enveloping as an ambient *room*, but its **brush proximity is computed in the 2D veil-plane only** (filament depth is visual-only) ‚Äî the weakest "body-EXCITES-a-3D-instrument" claim of the trio ‚Äî and the sympathetic-string concept overlaps the banked **`798-sympathetic-strings`** (¬ß497, sing‚Üísympathetic strings). **Resurrect** with **true 3D brush proximity** (project the veil's z-stagger into the distance test so depth actually matters), and lean the differentiator away from 798 (798 is voice-excited; 804 is body-brushed). Or fold its 4-process long-form accretion arc into `803`/`802` as a deepening.

## ¬ß498 (Cycle 498 ‚Äî kids DEEP fire, ONE concept √ó 3 growth grammars, 2 banked)

Cycle 498 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out ‚Äî ONE concept (*a 4-year-old SINGS a 3D garden into being and the garden sings their melody back; the inverse of Mort Garson's Plantasia*), attacked via 3 different **growth grammars**, ship the strongest. Deliberate alternation off two straight WIDE fires (496/497); the JURY 2026-06-20 #2 ceiling-collapse (4‚Üí1) called for depth, and the sing-garden is the kids-depth pick (long-form stateful, accreting). All three are **three.js** (off the 10√ó-banned Canvas2D), **mic/voice** (off banned touch), **calm daylight** (the reintroduced "middle"), and rest his recording ‚Äî clearing every ban. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß498 today ‚Äî the negative-result gap (voice‚ÜíL-system growth is web-0√ó / grep-0√ó) + Plantasia inverted. **Winner `799-kids-sing-garden`** (the only one with an actual L-system grammar ‚Äî the literal named reference and the lab-first technique; richest + long-form stateful + ESLint 0/0). Both losers were demoable + self-reported ESLint-clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (loser code saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-498/` this fire, not committed). **Max committed folder after this fire is `799`** (the prior banked `794-kids-sing-garden` resurrected ‚Üí 799). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`800-kids-sing-meadow`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Sing a meadow of flowers into bloom ‚Äî one flower per note on a golden-angle spiral ‚Äî and the meadow sings your melody back, lighting each flower in turn.* Mic ‚Üí autocorrelation pitch (Chris Wilson ACF) + RMS; **each sung note plants ONE flower** at the next **phyllotaxis** position (H. Vogel sunflower model: `Œ∏ = n√ó137.508¬∞`, `r ‚àù ‚àön`, never colliding) ‚Äî pitch (octave-collapsed ‚Üí C-major-pentatonic, never wrong) ‚Üí flower **hue** (low warm rose/gold ‚Üí high cool sky) + petal count/stem height, loudness ‚Üí flower **size** + glow + bloom speed, a held note ‚Üí taller stem/bigger blossom; flowers **accumulate over minutes** (fuller meadow at minute 5; gentle per-flower wind sway keeps it alive). On ~1s silence, the meadow replays the contour on a soft mallet/bell voice (sine + shimmer), each corresponding flower's emissive center spiking 1.25‚Äì3√ó in sequence. INPUT = mic/voice ¬∑ OUTPUT = **three.js** WebGL ¬∑ TECH = voice‚Üíphyllotaxis bloom + melody-memory call-response ¬∑ VIBE = calm warm daylight meadow. Kid-safe `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; analyser never wired to output; iOS gesture-gated; ghost-hum fallback on mic-deny + `text-rose-600` notice; full teardown. Built clean (two independent realizations this fire ‚Äî page ~300‚Äì394 lines + `audio.ts` + `phyllotaxis.ts` + README; self-reported ESLint 0/0 + tsc clean), then removed. Refs: **phyllotaxis / golden angle (H. Vogel 1979 sunflower model)** ¬∑ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ¬∑ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. Ambition honest **2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [voice pitch/RMS analysis + phyllotaxis three.js bloom + melody call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs). **Why it lost (the closest call):** the **clearest one-flower-per-note cause-effect** and the most *legible* for a 4yo (the strongest pure-delight runner-up) ‚Äî but the winner implements a real generative **grammar** (the named L-system reference) where the meadow only borrows the golden-angle *placement* of pre-made shapes. **RESURRECT FIRST on the kids lane** ‚Äî it diversifies off 799's branching grammar and is the most immediately readable of the trio.

- **`801-kids-sing-grove`** (kids, banked). *Sing a swaying grove of glowing reeds into being ‚Äî each note a tall reed ‚Äî and the wind sings your melody back, bending and lighting each reed in turn (an aeolian wind-harp inversion).* Mic ‚Üí autocorrelation pitch + RMS; each note grows ONE **reed** (tall tapered blade) on a golden-angle spiral via three.js **InstancedMesh** (hundreds stay cheap on a tablet) ‚Äî pitch ‚Üí reed **height** + hue (low warm ‚Üí high cool), loudness ‚Üí **thickness** + glow + sway amplitude. A global **wind** (layered sines 0.23/0.57/1.1 Hz with per-reed phase offsets) bends every reed continuously so the grove **ripples and is never static** (its best, distinctive idea). On ~1s silence, the grove replays the contour on a mallet/bell voice (sine + inharmonic partials √ó2.756/√ó5.404), each corresponding reed flashing warm-white + tilting in sequence ‚Äî "the wind plays your melody back." INPUT = mic/voice ¬∑ OUTPUT = **three.js** WebGL (InstancedMesh) ¬∑ TECH = voice‚Üíinstanced reed-field growth + continuous wind-sway + melody call-response ¬∑ VIBE = calm warm daylight grove. Kid-safe chain + optional very-low filtered-noise wind bed; analyser never wired to output; ghost-hum fallback + `text-rose-600` notice; full teardown. Built clean (page ~385 lines + `audio.ts` + `reeds.ts` + README; self-reported ESLint 0/0), then removed. Refs: **wind-played reeds / aeolian instruments (wind-harp lineage)** ¬∑ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ¬∑ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. Ambition honest **2‚Äì3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost:** the continuous wind-sway "never static" motion is genuinely lovely and the InstancedMesh scaling is the most performant of the trio, but the "growth" is reed-per-note (like the meadow, no generative grammar) and the aeolian reference is the loosest. **Resurrect** as its own piece, OR **fold the continuous-wind-sway motion into 799's next cycle** so the L-system garden breathes in a breeze.

## ¬ß497 (Cycle 497 ‚Äî adult WIDE fire, 3 orthogonal explorers OFF the answering-room thread, 2 banked)

Cycle 497 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out ‚Äî 3 unrelated directions in one fire, all **resting the answering-room/his-recording monoculture** (`770`/`778`/`792`) that the JURY 2026-06-20 headlined as "too similar," and all clearing the ambition floor while dodging every ban. The forward-plan's `790-answering-memory` resurrect-first was **deliberately overridden** (it would be the 4th live-music-agent piece). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß497 today ‚Äî data-sonification-2026 + the saturation grep proving ambition-#1 (never-used technique) is near-unreachable at this cycle count. **Winner `797-tonnetz-walk`** (autonomous Neo-Riemannian harmony walk on the jury's starved SVG surface, pure-synthesis = most robust unattended, long-form generative = answers the depth-ceiling collapse). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `797`** (banked names `796`/`798` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`798-sympathetic-strings`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *Sing into your piano and exactly the right strings ring ‚Äî your voice waking the strings sympathetic to it, the way the sustain pedal lets a grand resonate.* Mic ‚Üí 4096-pt **AnalyserNode FFT** with noise-floor peak-picking (parabolic interpolation, analysis-only); a model of **88 equal-tempered piano strings A0‚ÄìC8**, each a **high-Q bandpass-on-noise damped resonator**; `computeExcitations` does the **sympathetic SELECTION** ‚Äî only strings within ~28 cents of a detected partial's 1√ó/2√ó/3√ó/4√ó harmonic light up, so the result is always consonant with the voice, and strings keep **ringing & decaying after you stop** (sustain-pedal sympathetic vibration). Sing ‚Üí octave/fifth/overtone-matched strings shimmer; whistle ‚Üí a near-pure single string; speak ‚Üí a soft noisy cluster. INPUT = mic/voice (off banned touch; keyboard/clickable-pad fallback) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **SVG** 88-string field (off banned Canvas2D-primary) ‚Äî each string a shimmering vertical standing-wave whose amplitude tracks its ring, faint violet harmonic-link arcs ¬∑ TECH = partial-detection ‚Üí harmonic-gated sympathetic modal/bandpass resonance ¬∑ VIBE = intimate / nocturnal / grand-piano-at-night. Anti-feedback: analyser NEVER fed by synth output + per-string refractory window + modest master gain + master lowpass; mic-deny ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice + clickable-pad/computer-keyboard fallback so it's never silent. Built clean at `src/app/dream/798-sympathetic-strings/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (`ResonanceEngine`) + `strings.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc-strict + eslint zero issues), then removed. Refs: **sympathetic strings ‚Äî sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore** ¬∑ **Henry Cowell *string piano*** ¬∑ sustain-pedal physics. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [mic FFT partial-detection + sympathetic-selection matcher + 88-string resonant synth + SVG field] + #3 named refs). **Why it lost (a close call):** piano-native + the directest **live-performance fit** (Karel priority #3) and a beautiful concept, but the winner is far more robust unattended (797 needs no mic permission to sing) and 798 carries a faint rhyme with the listening-machine / `105-pluck-field` (mic-onset) family. **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** ‚Äî ship it as-is; it's the piano-native depth pick.

- **`796-aeolian-sky`** (adult, banked ‚Äî ‚öÝÔ∏è MUST re-spec renderer to WebGL2 before shipping). *The live weather where you are, played as a wind-harp ‚Äî the real wind, right now, sung.* `navigator.geolocation` (4s timeout ‚Üí SF default) ‚Üí **Open-Meteo** live `wind_speed/direction/gusts/temperature` (free, no key, CORS ‚Äî direct client fetch, no API route, no guard) ‚Üí an **aeolian harp**: a shared filtered-noise source exciting **7 high-Q (Q 24‚Äì55) bandpass "strings"** tuned to a just-intonation chord over ~F3, master lowpass + ConvolverNode reverb. Mappings: wind speed ‚Üí excitation amplitude + overtone bloom; gusts ‚Üí slow LFO swells; direction ‚Üí stereo pan/tilt; temperature ‚Üí brightness (lowpass cutoff); heavily smoothed for long-form calm; re-fetch every ~3 min so it drifts. Robust: geolocation-deny ‚Üí default city; fetch-fail ‚Üí built-in **synthetic slow-random-walk wind** so it's never silent (amber `text-amber-300/95` "simulated wind" note). INPUT = live-external-data/weather (off banned touch & off his-recording) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **wind field** (‚öÝÔ∏è builder shipped **Canvas2D as PRIMARY** ‚Äî the brief allowed it only as a WebGL2 *fallback*; this is why it **lost this cycle: Canvas2D-primary is the JURY headline ban**) ¬∑ TECH = aeolian resonant-bandpass synthesis + data-sonification ¬∑ VIBE = calm / elemental / contemplative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/796-aeolian-sky/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` (`AeolianHarp`) + `field.ts` + `weather.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc-strict + eslint clean), then removed. Refs: **Aeolian harp** (ancient wind-played strings) ¬∑ **Tonkin Liu *Singing Ringing Tree*** (2006, Burnley UK). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [geolocation+API + wind‚Üísynth mapping + resonant synth + field render] + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß497 data-sonification-2026). **Why it lost ‚Äî diversity ban, not quality:** a strong, Exploratorium-adjacent data-sonification piece, but it self-disqualified by rendering on **Canvas2D-primary** (the 10√ó-monoculture the jury banned this cycle). **Resurrect by re-specing the visual to a real WebGL2 advection/streamline pass** (a GPU wind field, the renderer the brief actually called for) ‚Äî then it clears every ban and ships.

## ¬ß496 (Cycle 496 ‚Äî kids WIDE fire, 3 divergent explorers off every JURY ban, 2 banked)

Cycle 496 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out ‚Äî 3 unrelated directions in one fire (the direct antidote to the jury's "too similar / sprinting pole to pole"), each clearing the ambition floor and dodging all four **JURY 2026-06-20** bans (Canvas2D-output 10√ó ¬∑ touch-input 4√ó ¬∑ his-recording-as-conductor 5√ó ¬∑ uniformly-bright-active-kids vibe 6√ó), and collectively **reintroducing calm** to the kids side (the jury: only 2 calm kids pieces left). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß496 today ‚Äî web-binaural/spatial-audio-2026 (StartUs Insights / PlugSonic) + Frid 2016 children-sonification. **Winner `795-kids-sound-hunt`** (the audio-only / eyes-closed spatial sound-hunt ‚Äî the scarcest register in the lab, off every ban at once, most robust unattended, directest research chain). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `795`** (banked names `793`/`794` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`794-kids-sing-garden`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Sing to grow a 3D garden, and the garden sings your melody back.* Mic ‚Üí **autocorrelation pitch + RMS** (Chris Wilson method, analysis-only, never recorded/sent); while the child sings a plant GROWS via an **L-system (Lindenmayer)** grammar ‚Äî pitch (octave-collapsed, snapped C-major-pentatonic) sets reach, loudness sets thickness/brightness, sustaining branches + blooms; a short **silence triggers call-and-response** ‚Äî the garden replays the contour of what they just sang on soft mallet/bell voices and the flower glows. **Long-form stateful**: plants accumulate along a golden-angle spiral over minutes (the garden at minute 5 is fuller than minute 1 ‚Äî the thin kids-depth category the jury's #2 ceiling-collapse alarm wants). INPUT = mic/voice (off the banned touch; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **three.js** WebGL (off the banned Canvas2D-primary) ¬∑ TECH = voice‚ÜíL-system growth + melody-memory call-response ¬∑ VIBE = calm warm daylight garden (the reintroduced calm). Kid-safe `master 0.28 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; analyser NOT wired to output (no echo); iOS gesture-gated `AudioContext`+`getUserMedia` (AGC/NS off for clean onsets); **ghost-hum fallback** grows + answers hands-free within ~2s on mic-deny + a `text-rose-300` notice; no-WebGL ‚Üí friendly notice; full teardown (rAF / mic tracks / dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). Built clean at `src/app/dream/794-kids-sing-garden/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `plant.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint-discipline + tsc clean), then removed. Refs: **L-systems (Lindenmayer)** ¬∑ **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** ¬∑ Chris Wilson autocorrelation ¬∑ Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [voice pitch/RMS analysis + L-system growth/three.js render + melody-memory call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs + #4-style long-form stateful). **Why it lost (a close call):** the biggest concept of the three and the directest answer to the depth-ceiling alarm (long-form, accreting), but the winner occupies a register the kids lab has **literally never used** (audio-only spatial) and is far more robust unattended (no mic/WebGL needed). **RESURRECT FIRST on the kids lane** ‚Äî it's the depth pick; ship it as its own prototype, or as the kids cycle-2 of the accreting-memory thread.

- **`793-kids-shadow-puppet`** (kids, banked ‚Äî ‚öÝÔ∏è overlaps `788`). *Your whole body becomes a friendly shadow-puppet moth that sings, drawn entirely in cut-paper SVG.* Front camera ‚Üí MediaPipe Pose (the verbatim `788` loader + `makeGhostBody` fallback); a single **morphing shadow-puppet creature** ‚Äî arm-spread ‚Üí wingspan + voice brightness (lowpass), body height ‚Üí glided C-major-pentatonic pitch (portamento, never a wrong note), lean ‚Üí bank, flapping ‚Üí soft wing-whoosh sparkle ‚Äî over a warm **twilight cut-paper lantern** backdrop (`feDropShadow`/`feGaussianBlur`/grain SVG filters, light-window cutouts in the wings). INPUT = body/camera (off the banned touch) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **pure inline SVG/DOM** (off the banned Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest renderer) ¬∑ TECH = continuous pose ‚Üí single morphing puppet + sung voice ¬∑ VIBE = warm twilight calm "middle". Kid-safe `master ‚â§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass ‚â§7500 ‚Üí comp`; always-on C2+G2 pad; **ghost-body fallback** keeps the puppet dancing+singing hands-free within ~2s on camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail + a `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown. Built clean at `src/app/dream/793-kids-shadow-puppet/` (`page.tsx` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc-clean + manual lint audit), then removed. Refs: **shadow puppetry / Indonesian *wayang kulit*** ¬∑ **Lotte Reiniger** silhouette animation ¬∑ MediaPipe Pose. Ambition honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost ‚Äî diversity, not quality:** lovely and the scarcest-renderer (SVG) pick, but it **rhymes hard with `788-kids-body-glow`** shipped just two cycles ago (cycle 494 ‚Äî body/camera + continuous-pentatonic-pitch on a different renderer); a second full-body-continuous-pitch kids piece in three cycles is exactly the "template re-forming" the jury keeps flagging. **Resurrect only when** body/camera has cooled AND with a real differentiator from 788 ‚Äî a **swappable bestiary** (the pose picks which animal: bird/cat/rabbit) and a true **formant/vowel vocal model** so it reads as a creature *voice*, not 788's pitch ladder.

## ¬ß495 (Cycle 495 ‚Äî adult DEEP fire, "give 770's gap-agent a long-form MOTIF MEMORY," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 495 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out ‚Äî ONE concept (*give `770-answering-room`'s memoryless gap-agent a **long-form motif memory**: harvest the motifs of his real "Welcome Home" recording into a growing vocabulary and develop/quote them back, so the duet at minute 5 ‚âÝ minute 1*), attacked via 3 memory mechanisms. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** (the depth ceiling collapsed **4‚Üí1** ‚Äî "RETURN AND EXTEND a gem to a real 4/5; `770` is the obvious target ‚Äî let the agent ACCRETE a motif over minutes") + **#1** (off the 10√ó Canvas2D-primary monoculture ‚Äî stays audio-forward, "spread don't flip") + **#3** (his recording stays the whole soloist but used a *genuinely-new way* ‚Äî a self-organizing memory, not a conductor/follower/analyzer). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß495 today ‚Äî **LiveBand** (arXiv 2606.03803, **June 2026, <30d** ‚Äî causal past-only live accompaniment), **MusicSwarm** (Buehler, Apr-2026), **MASOM** (Variable Markov Models + sound memory), **Lewis *Voyager***. **Winner `792-answering-swarm`** (stigmergic swarm ‚Äî the highest-ambition 4/5 ceiling build + the most surprising concept). All three copied 770's `audio.ts` loader verbatim + reused its listener/agent; both losers were demoable + self-reported clean, folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `792`** (banked names `790`/`791` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`790-answering-memory`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *The SYMBOLIC MOTIF BANK approach ‚Äî the most musically **legible** of the three.* His recording is the soloist (770 loader); the listener's onset + phrase-gap detection segments his playing into **motifs** (relative-interval contour + coarse rhythm + register), banked (cap 16, least-recently-developed eviction, per-motif "times developed" count). When the agent answers (in his gaps, and in a longer **trading-fours** turn), it picks a banked motif and applies a **classical thematic-development transform** chosen round-robin ‚Äî **transpose** into his current key / **inversion** / **retrograde** / **augmentation** / **diminution** / **fragmentation** ‚Äî voiced through 770's soft FM bell, so it literally **quotes his earlier phrases, developed**. Memory shown as a minimal **SVG motif-shelf**: one tiny contour-polyline glyph per banked motif, the one being developed glows (warmer with reuse), plus "memory: N motifs ¬∑ developing: <transform>". INPUT = his-recording ¬∑ OUTPUT = audio-forward + minimal canvas/SVG ¬∑ TECH = symbolic motif bank + classical development ¬∑ VIBE = warm-hearth adult-meditative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/790-answering-memory/` (`audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `memory.ts` + `agent.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`; self-reported clean, manual lint/type discipline ‚Äî env had no node_modules at build time), then removed. Refs: George Lewis *Voyager*; classical thematic development; anchors LiveBand (June-2026) + MusicSwarm (Apr-2026). Ambition honest ~2/5 (#3 named + #4 multi-cycle). **Why it lost (a close call):** the most legible "oh, it's playing my phrase upside-down" and the clearest cause‚Üíeffect, but it reached lower on the **ambition axis the jury flagged as collapsing** than the swarm's lab-first stigmergy. **RESURRECT FIRST on the adult lane** ‚Äî it's the safe, legible, genuinely-musical pick; ship it as its own prototype or fold its classical-transform vocabulary into `792` as a "develop the consolidated theme" operator.

- **`791-answering-markov`** (adult, banked ‚Äî **lower priority, overlaps `778`**). *The VARIABLE-ORDER MARKOV STYLE MODEL approach (MASOM/EMI).* His recording is the soloist; each onset becomes a **token** (pitch-class + coarse interval + duration bucket) feeding an **orders-1..3 Markov model built live** ‚Äî a context‚Üínext-token table that **grows denser every minute**; answers (gaps + trading-fours) are generated by **sampling** the model (highest matching order, backing off when unseen), snapped to his current key, voiced through the FM bell, so it improvises "in his idiom" and sharpens as the model accretes. Memory shown as a live **SVG transition-ring** (12 pitch-class nodes, learned edges thickening/brightening, active context node glows) + a climbing "model: N states ¬∑ M transitions ¬∑ answering from order K" readout. INPUT = his-recording ¬∑ OUTPUT = SVG/DOM ¬∑ TECH = variable-order Markov style model ¬∑ VIBE = warm-hearth adult-meditative. Built clean at `src/app/dream/791-answering-markov/` (`audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `markov.ts` + `agent.ts` + `page.tsx` + `README.md`; self-reported clean), then removed. Refs: **MASOM** (Tatar & Pasquier), Cope *EMI*, Lewis *Voyager*; anchors LiveBand + MusicSwarm. **Why it lost ‚Äî diversity, not quality:** it was beautifully built, but it **collides hard with `778-markov-mirror`** shipped just two cycles ago (cycle 493: variable-order Markov + live SVG transition graph + Cope EMI) ‚Äî a near-twin is exactly the "too similar" trap the jury warns against. Its only fresh angle is *his recording as the learned input* (778 learns a live keyboard). **Resurrect only if** that distinction is made central, or merge it into `778` as the long-queued "bind 778 to his Welcome Home note-stream" variant (still open from MORNING ¬ß494) rather than a standalone ship.

## ¬ß494 (Cycle 494 ‚Äî kids DEEP fire, "the whole body read as a continuous UPIC pitch-field," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 494 ran a kids **DEEP** fan-out ‚Äî ONE concept (*a 4-year-old's whole moving body, seen by the front camera [MediaPipe Pose, 33 landmarks], is read as a **continuous** UPIC pitch-field: each tracked limb [wrists/head/ankles] drives ONE **continuously-glided sung voice** whose pitch is its height, snapped to C-major pentatonic so nothing is ever wrong, and the dance accumulates a glowing score over minutes*), attacked via 3 renderers. The literal **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went 4√ó‚Üí0√ó ‚Äî the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag at once) + **#5** (build the full-body version of `781`'s UPIC, named in the verdict as "sitting unbuilt in your own research log") + **#1** (off the banned Canvas2D-primary, onto starved surfaces). Crucially **NOT 419-kids-body-band** (body‚Üí*drums*) nor the `287`/`302`/`234` body‚Üíharmony-mirror: this is a *continuous sung* mapping, a fresh use of the tracker. Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß494 (the **CHI 2026** "Designing Interactive Movement Sonification for Hip-Hop Dance" + the **¬°Otro!** IAIA Digital Dome premiere, Apr 2026 ‚Äî "the body becomes the instrument"). **Winner `788-kids-body-glow`** (raw WebGL2 GLSL feedback-field ‚Äî warm-daylight painterly UPIC, the highest-ambition build + the scarce-shader the concept genuinely demands + Canvas2D/ghost fallbacks). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean; folders `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build per the orchestration rule. **Max committed folder after this fire is `788`** (the banked names `782`/`783` from ¬ß492, `785`/`786` from ¬ß493, and these two `787`/`789` renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`789-kids-body-ribbons`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *The whole-body UPIC on the lab's scarcest, most iPad-bulletproof surface ‚Äî **SVG/DOM** (1√ó in the window, jury-named starved).* Front camera ‚Üí MediaPipe Pose; each of 5 limbs (wrists/head/ankles) draws a **continuous glowing SVG polyline ribbon** (bounded ~120 pts, decimated, oldest segments fade ‚Üí self-limiting) and sings ONE continuous portamento voice (`osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime`, pitch = height, C-major-pentatonic C3‚ÄìA5, never wrong); arms-spread widens the chord (subtle detune), overall motion brightens the sky + a sparkle voice. Warm **cut-paper daylight** sky + rolling hills (the "middle" vibe ‚Äî bright but gentle, off both bright-active and dark-glow). INPUT = body/camera (off the banned touch) ¬∑ OUTPUT = SVG/DOM (off the banned Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest renderer) ¬∑ TECH = continuous body-UPIC sung-pitch-field ¬∑ VIBE = warm cut-paper daylight. Kid-safe `master ‚â§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass ‚â§7500 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad; **ghost-body fallback** (`makeGhostBody(t)`) keeps ribbons drawing + the choir singing hands-free within ~2s on camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail + a `text-rose-300` notice; SVG itself always renders (no renderer fallback needed). Built clean at `src/app/dream/789-kids-body-ribbons/` (`page.tsx` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint clean + filtered tsc clean), then removed. Refs: Xenakis **UPIC** (1977) ¬∑ MediaPipe Pose ¬∑ CHI 2026 movement-sonification. Ambition honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [pose + continuous pentatonic choir + SVG ribbon render + accumulation] + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß494). **Why it lost (a close call):** the most **robust + legible** of the three (SVG always paints, no WebGL dep ‚Äî the safest unattended kids glance) and the literal jury-#1 starved surface, but the winner reached higher on the ambition axis the jury flagged as collapsing (4‚Üí1). One easy polish on resurrect: the header `text-white/95` over the cream sky is low-contrast ‚Äî darken the header text or add a scrim. **RESURRECT FIRST on the kids lane** ‚Äî it's the safe, charming, scarce-renderer pick.

- **`787-kids-body-aura`** (kids, banked). *The whole-body UPIC as a **three.js** 3D choir of light.* Front camera ‚Üí MediaPipe Pose; voice-orbs (additive `THREE.Points`) at head/hands/feet over a glowing **skeleton-of-light**, two hand **light-ribbon trails**, and an **accumulating fading chord-cloud** (1400-pt budget, alpha-decayed ‚Üí minute 5 fuller than minute 1 = long-form stateful); each of 5 parts a continuous portamento pentatonic voice (height = pitch), arm-spread widens the chord, motion pulses the orbs. INPUT = body/camera ¬∑ OUTPUT = three.js 3D geometry ¬∑ TECH = continuous body-UPIC sung-field ¬∑ VIBE = **dusk-into-dawn** night-glow. Kid-safe `master ‚â§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass ‚â§7500 ‚Üí comp`; always-on C2+G2 pad; **ghost-body is the DEFAULT** until camera+landmarker both succeed (so it dances + sings within ~2s with no permission), and audio continues (motion estimated from raw body deltas) even if WebGL throws; full three.js teardown (`dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). Built clean at `src/app/dream/787-kids-body-aura/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `pose.ts` + `README.md`), then removed. Refs: Xenakis UPIC (1977) ¬∑ MediaPipe Pose ¬∑ CHI 2026 movement-sonification. Ambition honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß494). **Why it lost:** the richest "wow," but (a) three.js is the *warmest* of the allowed renderers (2√ó in the window ‚Äî 766/767), and (b) its **dusk/night palette leans into the dark-glow register the jury explicitly said NOT to flip back to** (the ask was the bright-but-gentle middle, which the winner's warm daylight hits and this doesn't). Fix the palette to warm daylight on resurrect and it's a strong bright three.js kids slot. NOTE the design-notes link points at `README.md` as a route (likely 404 in Next) ‚Äî swap to a scroll-to-`#notes` like the other two on resurrect.

## ¬ß489 (Cycle 489 ‚Äî adult DEEP fire, "a live music agent that accompanies HIS recording," 2 banked approaches)

Cycle 489 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out ‚Äî ONE concept (*Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano plays WHOLE as the soloist; a real-time machine "live music agent" listens ‚Äî chroma+onset score-following his playing ‚Äî and accompanies it, NOT by granulating his audio but as a SECOND synthesized voice*), attacked via 3 technical approaches. The literal **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a new way ‚Äî let its structure conduct a generative system; remix his phrasing, NOT his grains") + **#2** (a no-GPU-shader, audio-forward register the lab is thin on). Research-anchored: RESEARCH ¬ß489 (the 2026 "live music agents" register ‚Äî CHI 2026 *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*; Raphael *Music Plus One*; Lewis *Voyager*), whose negative-result grep proved every prior lab listen-piece (`138`, `414`, `496`, `718`) tracks **live mic** or is an ensemble you conduct ‚Äî **none accompanies his actual recording as a live soloist.** **Winner `770-answering-room`** (audio-forward / eyes-closed register ‚Äî his recording the soloist, a warm pad voices the detected chord under him, a sparse FM-bell answers only in his phrase-gaps; minimal hearth-lit Canvas "him / the answer" duet visual). Picked for renderer diversity (the cleanest possible ‚Äî audio-forward, the literal JURY #2 ask; both Canvas2D and SVG/DOM are at 3√ó and one ship from the audit ban), robustness (no WebGL dep, always-sound synth fallback), and the strongest gate story. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero mentions of 770; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE ‚Äî the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `770`** (the banked kids names `768`/`769` from ¬ß488 were SKIPPED to avoid collision per the ¬ß487 precedent ‚Äî they renumber when resurrected). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`771-conducted-companion`** ‚≠ê (banked, **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when a three.js slot is wanted). *His recording plays as the soloist; the same machine listener tracks its chord+phrasing; and YOU conduct the agent's RESPONSE ‚Äî dragging a baton on a true three.js geometry stage (floor + soloist plinth/icosphere + capsule voice-columns + a 120-instance mote ring + draggable octahedron baton + lights; geometry, no shader field, no addons), where the baton's position leans the agent toward consonance‚Üîtension, sparse‚Üîdense, low‚Üîhigh register, bright‚Üîdark.* INPUT = his recording + pointer-drag conducting (no mic/camera) ¬∑ OUTPUT = three.js 3D stage ¬∑ TECH = real-time chroma+onset listener ‚Üí a conductable generative ensemble ¬∑ VIBE = warm, focused, performative (a conductor's podium). Auto-drift so it's never a dead stage; WebGL-fail ‚Üí friendly notice + audio still plays; synth fallback. Built clean at `src/app/dream/771-conducted-companion/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `agent.ts` + `scene.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint exit 0 + tsc clean), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/`. Refs: CHI 2026 live-music-agents, Lewis *Voyager*, Raphael *Music Plus One*. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs + #5 RESEARCH ¬ß489). **Why it lost (only the renderer + robustness):** three.js is the *warming* renderer (2√ó and flagged) and adds a WebGL dependency the audio-forward winner avoids on an unattended straight-to-prod cycle; it also softly echoes `496-voyager-room`'s "conduct an ensemble." A genuinely bigger/more-interactive piece ‚Äî resurrect the moment a three.js adult slot is the diversity pick.

- **`772-reharmonized`** (banked). *A machine agent listens to his recording as it plays and RE-HARMONIZES it in real time ‚Äî laying a fresh generative chord progression underneath his melody (jazz reharmonization: tritone sub, relative maj/min, secondary dominants, chromatic mediants, modal interchange ‚ô≠VI/iv, ii‚ÄìV insertion, lydian ‚ôØ11 / min9 recolor, half-diminished borrow), with melody-fit filtering so substitutions stay consonant with his actual notes ‚Äî visualized as a warm Canvas2D "score river" where each chord scrolls past a now-line labeled `His ‚Üí Agent` (e.g. `C ‚Üí E‚ô≠maj7`) + the move name.* INPUT = his recording (no mic/camera) ¬∑ OUTPUT = Canvas2D harmonic-ribbon ¬∑ TECH = real-time chroma/onset ‚Üí generative chord-substitution engine (3 moods: Lush / Bittersweet / Bold; an adventurousness slider) ¬∑ VIBE = warm, jazzy, late-night ‚Äî a **jazz-responsive alternate arc** (Karel cares #4). Rhodes-ish detuned-triangle bed + soft walking bass under his piano; synth fallback. Built clean at `src/app/dream/772-reharmonized/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `listener.ts` + `reharm.ts` + `draw.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported tsc + eslint clean), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/`. Refs: CHI 2026 live-music-agents, the jazz reharmonization tradition, Raphael *Music Plus One*. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs; arguably #5). **Why it lost:** the most *musically distinct* of the three (the jazz-reharm arc is genuinely fresh for the lab) but **Canvas2D is at 3√ó ‚Äî shipping it tips Canvas2D into the ‚â•4 audit ban**, while the winner's audio-forward register dodged the renderer watch entirely. **Resurrect the moment Canvas2D ages out of the 10-window** ‚Äî it's a strong, surprising jazz piece. Note frame-local chord picks can jump on dense passages (mitigated by a 1.6s min-hold + melody-fit filter); next-cycle work = bar-tracking + look-ahead voice-leading.

## ¬ß488 (Cycle 488 ‚Äî kids WIDE fire, "the bright/joyful/active middle," 2 banked explorers)

Cycle 488 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out ‚Äî three bright/joyful/active explorers (JURY 2026-06-19 #4: the un-built "active middle" ‚Äî exuberant without silly, bright without dark-glow), each off every JURY ban (grain-cloud TECH ¬∑ GPU-shader-field OUTPUT ¬∑ mic-hum INPUT ¬∑ dark-glow VIBE), differentiated by INPUT √ó renderer √ó interaction. **Winner `767-kids-kite-flyer`** (three.js ¬∑ tilt-to-fly-a-singing-kite) ‚Äî picked for renderer diversity (three.js is the only safe surface: SVG/DOM and Canvas2D are both at 3√ó, one ship from the audit ban; GPU-shader-field jury-banned), highest surprise / "massively bigger" (a flyable 3D sky, the only fresh non-resurrect concept), the literal JURY #4 bullseye, and a robust pointer-drag + ghost-breeze fallback. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero issues / zero mentions of 767; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE ‚Äî the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `767`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`769-kids-flower-duet`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (kids).** *Two kids (or parent + kid) plant a sunny flower meadow TOGETHER with two fingers at once ‚Äî every flower sings, and any two flowers ALWAYS harmonize, so playing together always sounds beautiful.* INPUT = **multi-touch** (each finger tracked by `pointerId`, live per-finger rings so two kids see each other's hands) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** (bright meadow: smiling sun, drifting clouds, butterflies, rolling green ground, springy multi-petal flowers, sparkles, rainbow bridges) ¬∑ TECH = each touch plants a flower that grows + rings a soft 2-partial FM bell; **every pitch snapped to a 3-octave C-major-pentatonic so any combination from either player is always consonant** ("no wrong chord together"); flower color = pitch; two touches close in time+space ‚Üí a rainbow bridge + sparkle + a soft consonant 2-note "together" reward chord ¬∑ VIBE = bright sunny meadow. Kid-safe `master ‚â§0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`; always-on warm pad; ~8-voice cap + refractory; ~3s-idle ghost-hand auto-plants a pentatonic phrase. Built clean at `src/app/dream/769-kids-flower-duet/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint+full-project tsc exit 0), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` per the orchestration rule ‚Äî rebuild from this spec. Refs: early-childhood social-bonding / group-synchrony / joint-attention music research ¬∑ Toca Boca / Sago Mini cooperative play ¬∑ Toca Band "no wrong note." Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [multi-touch `pointerId` + Canvas2D meadow + pentatonic-harmonizer synth + ghost auto-demo] + #3 named refs; the **social/two-player** layer is the differentiator + fills the KIDS.md social gap). **Why it lost (only the renderer):** the most robust piece of the fire (pure Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL ‚Äî works on literally any device) and fills a real named design gap, but its tap‚Üíflower‚Üípentatonic core is the lab's single most-worn kids pattern AND **Canvas2D is warming to 3√ó** (a 4th hits the audit ban), while the winner's three.js was the only renderer that dodged the warming watch. **The moment Canvas2D ages out of the 10-window, this is the pick** ‚Äî robust, social, bright. (This is the ¬ß486 `763-kids-flower-duet` seed, re-banked at a fresh number ‚Äî still un-built, still resurrect-first on the kids lane.)

- **`768-kids-balloon-band`** (kids, banked ‚Äî **now with the Canvas2D fallback it needed**). *Press-and-hold to INFLATE a balloon whose pitch glides UP as it grows ‚Äî let go, and the balloons float up and stack into a happy consonant pentatonic chord you can POP.* INPUT = **touch / press-and-hold** (pointer events; hold to inflate, release to let go, tap a floating balloon to pop) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **three.js** (real 3D balloon meshes ‚Äî squashed `SphereGeometry` + glossy `MeshStandardMaterial` under hemisphere + directional sunlight, sun disc, drifting clouds, confetti; geometry, NOT a shader) **with a real Canvas2D billboard fallback** (`fallback.ts` ‚Äî same balloons/inflate/pop/confetti + the SAME audio engine; a WebGL failure is no longer a dead piece ‚Äî this fixes the ¬ß486 hold-back) ¬∑ TECH = **size‚Üípitch glissando** (a held balloon's growing radius glides its pitch up E3‚ÜíE5), release snaps to C-major-pentatonic + sustains, released voices accrete into a consonant stacked sky-chord, tap = soft band-passed-noise pop + tiny up-sine + confetti; 7-voice cap ¬∑ VIBE = bright blue-sky daylight, fat glossy candy balloons, exuberant. Kid-safe `master ‚â§0.26 ‚Üí lowpass 7000 ‚Üí comp(‚àí10/20:1)`; always-on C3+G3 breathing pad; ~3s-idle ghost-hand inflates/releases/pops hands-free; full three.js teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). Built clean at `src/app/dream/768-kids-balloon-band/` (`page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `scene.ts` + `fallback.ts` + `types.ts` + `README.md`; self-reported eslint + full-project tsc exit 0), then `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` per the orchestration rule ‚Äî rebuild from this spec. Refs: inflating-balloon-glissando pitch metaphor ¬∑ Toca Band / Sago Mini "no wrong note" ¬∑ consonant-chord accretion. Ambition honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems + #3 named refs). **Why it lost:** a lovely bright/exuberant toy and now robust (the Canvas2D fallback the ¬ß486 version lacked is built), but three.js is this fire's *winner* renderer (the slot was taken by the fresher tilt-flight concept) and press-and-hold-to-inflate is closer to the lab's worn tap-to-spawn family than the kite's embodied tilt-flight. **Resurrect** when a bright three.js kids slot is wanted (the fallback requirement from ¬ß486 is now satisfied). (This is the ¬ß486 `762-kids-balloon-band` seed, re-banked at a fresh number with the fallback fix done.)

## ¬ß487 (Cycle 487 ‚Äî adult DEEP fire, "the sky conducts his real piano," 2 banked sibling renderers)

Cycle 487 ran an adult **DEEP** fan-out: ONE concept ‚Äî *the sky conducts a long-form, never-repeating arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real Welcome Home piano; minute 5 ‚âÝ minute 1; daylight palette; zero required interaction* ‚Äî the resurrect-first `758-sky-almanac`, attacked via **3 distinct renderers** (SVG / Canvas2D / three.js). The build sharpened the novelty claim: `347-the-place` already scores the **local sky ‚Üí synthesized** sound, so the honest lab-first is celestial position conducting his **real recorded piano phrases** (the literal JURY 2026-06-19 #1: "remix his phrasing, not his grains; let its structure conduct a generative system") AND a return-and-deepen of `347` (JURY #3 depth). All three played his recording as whole continuous REGIONS (`bufferSource.start(when,offset,duration)` + equal-power crossfades), NOT grains; all daylight-into-night; all off every JURY ban. **Winner `766-sky-orrery`** (three.js 3D dome) ‚Äî the only renderer in the trio that dodges the warming SVG-3√ó / Canvas2D-3√ó audit watch (last 10: SVG/DOM 748/752/761 = 3√ó, Canvas2D 754/755/760 = 3√ó ‚Äî both at the ‚â•4 threshold; three.js 741 = 1√ó‚Üí2√ó safe), the highest ambition (Atlas Eclipticalis made literal ‚Äî each above-horizon body is its own phrase-voice), the biggest concept, with a working Canvas2D fallback. Both losers demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `mv`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers/` before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero issues in 766; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE ‚Äî the standing environmental failure). **Max committed folder after this fire is `766`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

- **`764-sky-almanac`** ‚≠ê **RESURRECT FIRST (adult).** *The canonical `758` realization: an inline **SVG sun-arc orrery dial** ‚Äî horizon line, dashed sun-arc, sun glyph at real computed altitude/azimuth, clipped-crescent moon at real phase, almanac graticule, phrase-onset rings; sky-gradient background gold-noon ‚Üí rose-dusk ‚Üí indigo-night ‚Üí pale-dawn.* INPUT = live wall-clock + optional geolocation (zero required interaction; no mic/camera) ¬∑ OUTPUT = **inline SVG/DOM only** (no canvas/WebGL/WebGPU) ¬∑ TECH = local solar/lunar math (`solar.ts`, copied from `347-the-place/astronomy.ts`) ‚Üí self-rescheduling phrase scheduler of whole regions of his real recording; **sun altitude ‚Üí lowpass brightness + register/octave, daylight fraction ‚Üí voice density/overlap, moon phase ‚Üí reverb wash + detune drift** ¬∑ VIBE = diurnal/almanac/daylight. Built files (clean, removed): `page.tsx` (SVG dial + Live/Explore-time toggle + hour slider + labels + Start gesture + SF-fallback notice + full teardown) ¬∑ `solar.ts` (declination + equation-of-time + hour-angle alt/az, synodic moon phase, `dateAtHour` scrub, `daylightFraction`/`moodLabel`/`moonName`) ¬∑ `audio.ts` (verbatim `fetchPianoBuffer` + 16s OfflineAudioContext fallback w/ 4 sub-phrases + `segmentPhrases` energy-dip split + self-rescheduling region scheduler w/ equal-power crossfade + master chain + convolver reverb send) ¬∑ `palette.ts` (pure daylight palette interp). Refs: Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ¬∑ Finer *Longplayer* ¬∑ John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen* ¬∑ the farmer's-almanac tradition. Ambition honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#1 first celestial-conducting of his real recording [347 did synthesis] ¬∑ #2 ‚â•4 subsystems ¬∑ #3 named refs ¬∑ #5 RESEARCH ¬ß485/¬ß487). **Why it lost (a hair):** the most robust zero-interaction glance and the most faithful seed, but **SVG/DOM is warming to 3√ó** in the window (a 4th would hit the audit ban), so the three.js sibling was the cleaner diversity pick this fire. **Resurrect FIRST** the moment SVG/DOM ages out ‚Äî this is the safest, calmest unattended daylight glance in the bank.

- **`765-sky-spectra`** ‚Äî `queued` (the painterly **sky-COLOR-conducts** sibling ‚Äî resurrect when Canvas2D ages out, or for a more abstract/atmospheric adult slot). *What if the COLOR of the sky right now conducted his piano? ‚Äî a Rayleigh/Mie atmospheric-scattering approximation computes the real sky color for the current sun elevation (dawn rose ‚Üí noon blue ‚Üí dusk amber ‚Üí night indigo), and that breathing **color** field conducts the arrangement.* INPUT = live wall-clock + optional geolocation ¬∑ OUTPUT = **Canvas2D** full-bleed painterly horizon‚Üízenith gradient (drifting luminance bands, azimuth/elevation sun-glow bloom, soft onset brightening, vignette ‚Äî NOT a fragment-shader field) ¬∑ TECH = `sky.ts` (solar math copied from 347 + a hand-tuned Rayleigh/Mie palette ‚Üí zenith+horizon colors + 3 scalar conductors: **luminance ‚Üí density/register, hue ‚Üí harmonic tilt [playback-rate detune], twilight saturation ‚Üí reverb depth**) ‚Üí same whole-region phrase scheduler of his recording ¬∑ VIBE = diurnal/painterly/luminous daylight. Built files (clean, removed): `page.tsx` (Start + geo + Live/Explore toggle + 24h slider + time/elevation/mood/zenith-horizon swatch labels + design-notes + teardown) ¬∑ `sky.ts` ¬∑ `audio.ts` (verbatim loader + offline fallback + segmentation + `SkyArrangement` scheduler + master chain + reverb) ¬∑ `skyField.ts` (Canvas2D field). Refs: Preetham / Ho≈°ek-Wilkie sky models ¬∑ Olafur Eliasson *Your atmospheric colour atlas* ¬∑ Finer *Longplayer* ¬∑ Turner's skies. Ambition honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems + #3 named refs; soft #1 ‚Äî sky-color-as-conductor is a fresh mapping). **Why it lost:** arguably the most beautiful unattended glance, but Canvas2D is **also warming to 3√ó** (a 4th hits the audit ban), and a breathing color-gradient field risks reading as "just a gradient" vs the orrery's literal sky-as-score. **Resurrect when** Canvas2D rotates out or a painterly/atmospheric register is wanted; consider merging its color-conductor into `764`'s SVG dial (sky color tints the dial AND drives harmony).

## ¬ß485 ‚Äî 2026-06-19 ¬∑ adult WIDE fire (3 divergent explorers, each off every JURY 2026-06-19 ban ‚Äî grain-cloud TECH 7√ó ¬∑ GPU-shader-field OUTPUT 9√ó ¬∑ mic/camera INPUT 4√ó each ¬∑ near-dark-glow VIBE 9√ó; orthogonal in INPUT √ó TECHNIQUE √ó his-music-usage √ó VIBE) ‚Äî winner `760-wiki-carillon`; **2 banked seeds**

Cycle 485 ran an adult **WIDE** fan-out (RESEARCH ¬ß485: the live real-time data-sonification register ‚Äî Helioradar AV [NOAA space-weather ‚Üí infinite non-looping ambient] + KLING KLANG KLONG *Sounds of the Unseen* [~2M migration points ‚Üí never-repeating 3-day journey] ‚Äî "bind a live real-world signal to a never-repeating generative ensemble" is the active 2025‚Äì2026 lane). The dive's negative-result job killed three candidate briefs: **Nancarrow/polytempo is TAKEN** (`375-tempo-canon`/`514-polytempo-loom`/`632-polymeter-loom`), **weather sonification TAKEN** (`502-atmosphere-veil`), **score-following TAKEN** (`380`/`391`/`748`). All three surviving briefs cleared every jury ban. **Winner: `760-wiki-carillon`** ‚Äî the boldest anti-monoculture move (the only candidate free of the his-piano cluster the jury called "used exactly one way" 7√ó), the literal JURY #2 answer (Canvas2D, the scarce no-shader surface), a lab-first input (live SSE), and the highest-surprise. Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc/eslint; `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (compile/type/lint clean, zero issues in 760; static-gen blocked by the container's ~4096-fd EMFILE ‚Äî proven environmental THIS cycle: pristine `origin/main` with 760 moved aside fails at the identical font-manifest open). **Max committed folder after this fire is `760`.** Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

### `758-sky-almanac` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê RESURRECT FIRST (the strongest banked seed of the fire ‚Äî highest ambition floor 3‚Äì4/5, the calmest most-beautiful zero-interaction unattended glance, and his-music-used-a-new-way [whole phrases, NOT grains]; pick it the moment the his-piano cluster ages out of the 10-window). **What if the SKY composed with Karel's piano? ‚Äî the local clock + the computed positions of the sun and moon conduct a slow, ever-changing, NON-LOOPING arrangement of whole PHRASES from his real *Welcome Home* recording; minute 5 is not minute 1.** Built files (self-reported clean tsc/ESLint; removed): `page.tsx` (Start gate = iOS audio unlock + geolocation request w/ San-Francisco 37.77/-122.42 default; animated **SVG sun-arc dome** with altitude-driven sky gradient + sun's full daily track + altitude rings + phase-aware moon + a 12-tick phrase ring that lights as phrases play; **Live-clock / scrub-the-time-of-day** slider to A/B noon vs midnight; fallback + default-location notices; design-notes panel; full teardown) + `solar.ts` (pure-JS astronomy: solar declination [Cooper], equation of time, hour angle, `altitude = asin(sin¬∑lat¬∑sin¬∑decl + cos¬∑lat¬∑cos¬∑decl¬∑cos¬∑H)`, azimuth, daylight fraction, synodic moon phase + illuminated fraction; altitude‚Üíwarm-gold‚Üíindigo palette) + `audio.ts` (verbatim `fetchPianoBuffer` loader + `renderFallbackBuffer` ~16s warm detuned-piano lyrical phrase + `buildPhraseRegions` evenly-spaced continuous regions; a self-rescheduling **phrase scheduler** playing `bufferSource.start(when, offset, duration)` ‚Äî NOT granular; sun altitude ‚Üí lowpass brightness/register, daylight fraction ‚Üí density/tempo, moon phase ‚Üí reverb wash + slow detune drift). **Tags:** clock + optional-geolocation INPUT (auto-evolving, zero required interaction) ¬∑ SVG sun-arc-orrery OUTPUT (no shader) ¬∑ local-astronomical-computation ‚Üí whole-phrase scheduling of his real recording, long-form/stateful/non-looping TECH ¬∑ diurnal/almanac/DAYLIGHT VIBE (the directest anti-dark-glow). **Named refs:** John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* ¬∑ Jem Finer *Longplayer* ¬∑ the almanac tradition. **Why it lost (a hair):** the highest ambition floor and the best *unattended* glance, but it is a *third* his-piano-phrase ship (after `748-duet-follower` + the related banked `750`) right when the jury's loudest complaint is the his-piano monoculture ‚Äî so `760` (free of his piano entirely) was the bolder diversity move. **Resurrect FIRST** for the next adult slot once the his-piano cluster ages out, or merge its astronomy engine into any long-form piece. (NOTE: supersedes the older `750-sky-almanac` ¬ß481 seed ‚Äî this is the richer realization at a fresh number.) ### `759-phrase-loom` ‚Äî `queued` (the literal JURY 2026-06-19 #1 answer ‚Äî "use his recording without shattering it into a grain cloud: remix its PHRASING, not its grains"; resurrect for an interactive/editorial adult slot). **What if you could re-weave Karel's actual performance into an ever-new arrangement by remixing its PHRASES ‚Äî never its grains? ## ¬ß477 ‚Äî 2026-06-19 ¬∑ adult DEEP fire (ONE concept ‚Äî *a frictionless cross-device two-piano room: type the same short room code on two phones and play Karel's piano together, no SDP paste; only note-events travel, both render locally; a solo ghost partner so the one-phone glance always sounds* ‚Äî attacked via 3 network substrates; the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-18 #4 "make one multi-user piece ACTUALLY cross-device, retire the asterisk" + the cycle-2 of `729-piano-portal-jam` whose manual SDP copy-paste was the real friction) ‚Äî winner `741-piano-room-pulse`; **2 banked seeds**

### `737-kids-memory-reef` ‚Äî `queued` (the bulletproof iOS-safe **raw WebGL2 GLSL** sibling ‚Äî iOS HAS WebGL2; zero CDN; resurrect when robustness/iOS-safety is the priority OR when three.js is hot). **Sing to a near-dark underwater field (raw WebGL2 domain-warped-fbm currents + caustics, IQ "warp" lineage) and each sustained note grows a glowing CORAL bloom (pitch‚Üíposition+hue, loudness‚Üísize); the reef REMEMBERS ‚Äî up to 96 accumulated blooms persist in a uniform array the shader reads, older corals seed nearby child-corals + re-sing transformed echoes on a ~5s cadence, and the shader warm-patinas corals by age, so the dark water fills into a shimmering singing reef genuinely denser at minute 5.** Built files (self-reported clean tsc/eslint; always-on underwater-hush drone; mic analysis-only; gated autocorrelation pitch + RMS onset; D-Dorian snap; gentle FM coral-voice + softened/time-stretched echo synth) + `reef-field.ts` (raw WebGL2 GLSL ES 3.00 fullscreen-triangle + fbm current/caustic fragment shader reading up to 96 blooms from two `vec4` uniform arrays + the `Bloom` model + GL build/draw helpers). **Tags:** mic voice/hum INPUT ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 GLSL OUTPUT ¬∑ accreting-memory + transformed-echo re-singing TECH ¬∑ dreamy/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** Brian Eno *Reflection* ¬∑ Inigo Quilez fbm/warp ¬∑ coral-reef growth / a-life. **Why it lost:** an accumulating reef-field, like 736, reads as a richer texture rather than a *companion that develops*; Close a hand ‚Üí nearest stars gather to the palm, each ringing one soft pentatonic bell voice (nothing ever "wrong"); open wide ‚Üí they spill in a shimmering glissando arc; hands high = brighter/higher register, low = warm/low. No beat, no loop, no groove ‚Äî an **awe/wonder** piece. Built demoable this fire (self-reported clean tsc+eslint): `page.tsx` (Start-gated camera + HandLandmarker, gesture edge-detection, ghost auto-demo with two virtual hands on camera-deny/idle, full teardown) + `scene.ts` (2,400-star sim with gather/push/spring physics behind a common `StarRenderer` interface ‚Äî three.js primary + inline Canvas2D glow-dot fallback) + `audio.ts` (always-on open-fifth drone + pooled FM-ish pentatonic bells, `scoop()` chord cluster + `spill()` rising glissando, kids-safe `gain 0.3 ‚Üí lowpass 7.5k ‚Üí comp ‚àí10/20:1`) + README. **Tags:** MediaPipe-hands camera INPUT (embodied, off-glass) ¬∑ three.js 3D-points OUTPUT ¬∑ gesture-driven particle-gathering + spatial chord-voicing TECH ¬∑ awe/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** MediaPipe Hands ¬∑ *Journey* (thatgamecompany, wordless awe) ¬∑ Refik Anadol (luminous point-fields). **Why it lost:** (a) MediaPipe Hands already exists in the lab (`524-kids-hand-firebird`) so it's weaker on technique-#1; (b) three.js is warming (3√ó) where the winner's WebGPU is scarcest; (c) it carries **two** CDN deps (three.js + MediaPipe) vs the winner's zero. **Resurrect first** for an embodied/off-glass kids slot ‚Äî it's the directest "get the kids side off the glass." Honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + three.js 3D point-field + spatial bell-cluster audio engine] + #3 named refs).

### `725-kids-aurora-sail` ‚Äî `queued` (the bulletproof iOS-safe WebGL2 sibling ‚Äî iOS HAS WebGL2; zero CDN). **Tilt the tablet like a steering tray to sail a tiny glowing boat across a living aurora sea ‚Äî and the shimmering light bands SING as the boat drifts through them.** A full-screen **raw WebGL2 GLSL fragment-shader aurora** (domain-warped fbm ribbons, slow drift, IQ "warp" lineage, water reflection + boat halo); **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS permission in the Start tap; pointer-drag fallback) steers the boat. The boat "reads" the brightness under it each frame via a **faithful JS replica of the shader's exact fbm field** ‚Üí maps brightness to register in consonant **D-Dorian** (nothing wrong), speed ‚Üí note density, calm dark water ‚Üí a low warm drone. in `/tmp/dream-losers/`): `page.tsx` (459 lines ‚Äî continuous conductor smoothing, ghost auto-demo that breathes stillness‚Üívigour‚Üícalm over ~40s, centre-of-gravity HUD), `audio.ts` (580 lines ‚Äî 720's verbatim loader + `buildGrainCorpus` [~80ms grains, RMS + ZCR-brightness] + `TideAudio` continuous HRTF grain-tide scheduler: motion-energy ‚Üí target brightness/RMS/density, stillness=wide/far/wet/long vs vigour=near/dry/short, direction from per-side limb activity + lean, slow centre-of-gravity drift through the recording), `render.ts` (60k-particle WGSL storm + Canvas2D fallback; Close a hand ‚Üí nearest stars gather to the palm, each ringing one soft pentatonic bell voice (nothing ever "wrong"); open wide ‚Üí they spill in a shimmering glissando arc; hands high = brighter/higher register, low = warm/low. No beat, no loop, no groove ‚Äî an **awe/wonder** piece. Always-on open-fifth drone; kids-safe `gain‚Üílowpass(7.5k)‚Üícomp(‚àí10/20:1)`; ghost auto-demo (two virtual hands scoop/spill on idle/camera-deny); no-WebGL ‚Üí inline Canvas2D glow-dot fallback that still gathers + sings; full teardown (stream/MediaPipe/three.js dispose/AudioContext/rAF). **Tags:** MediaPipe-hands camera INPUT (embodied, off-glass) ¬∑ three.js 3D-points OUTPUT ¬∑ gesture-driven particle-gathering + spatial chord-voicing TECH ¬∑ awe/wonder VIBE. **Named refs:** MediaPipe Hands ¬∑ *Journey* (thatgamecompany, wordless awe) ¬∑ Refik Anadol (luminous point-fields). **Why it lost:** (a) MediaPipe Hands already exists in the lab (`524-kids-hand-firebird`) so it's weaker on technique-#1; (b) three.js is warming (3√ó) where the winner's WebGPU is scarcest (1√ó); (c) it carries **two** CDN dependencies (three.js + MediaPipe) vs 721's zero. **Resurrect first** for an embodied/off-glass kids slot ‚Äî it's the directest "get the kids side off the glass." Honest 2‚Äì3/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + three.js 3D point-field + spatial bell-cluster audio engine] + #3 named refs).

### `723-kids-aurora-sail` ‚Äî `queued` (the iOS-safe WebGL2 sibling ‚Äî iOS HAS WebGL2). **Tilt the tablet like a steering tray to sail a tiny glowing boat across a living aurora sea ‚Äî and the shimmering light bands SING as the boat drifts through them.** A full-screen **raw WebGL2 GLSL fragment-shader aurora** (domain-warped fbm ribbons, slow drift, IQ "warp" lineage); **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS permission in the Start tap; pointer-drag fallback) steers a small boat. The boat "reads" the brightness under it each frame via a **faithful JS replica of the shader's fbm field** ‚Üí maps brightness to register in a consonant D-Dorian (nothing wrong), speed ‚Üí note density, calm dark water ‚Üí a low warm drone. No beat, no loop, no groove ‚Äî a calm **dreamy sailing** texture. Always-on drone; kids-safe `gain‚Üílowpass(7.5k)‚Üícomp(‚àí10/20:1)`; ghost auto-demo sails a scripted course on idle/tilt-deny; no-WebGL2 ‚Üí inline Canvas2D aurora-band fallback that still drifts + sails + sings; full teardown. **Tags:** device-tilt INPUT (off banned touch-primary) ¬∑ raw-WebGL2 GLSL OUTPUT (off banned Canvas2D-primary + three.js) ¬∑ shader-brightness-field-reading ‚Üí modal sonification TECH (NOT a groove) ¬∑ dreamy/calm/awe VIBE. **Named refs:** Inigo Quilez "warp"/fbm ¬∑ real-time aurora GLSL sims ¬∑ *Journey* (calm wordless sailing). **Why it lost:** lowest ambition of the three (honest 2/5 ‚Äî tilt + GLSL worlds have lab precedent, e.g. `575-kids-sky-song`); but it's the most bulletproof iOS-safe glance (iOS has WebGL2 reliably; no camera/CDN/GPU-compute risk). **Resurrect when** the kids side wants a calm contemplative tilt piece or when WebGPU/MediaPipe are too fragile for the target device. Honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•3 subsystems [WebGL2 fbm aurora shader + tilt/pointer steering + brightness-driven modal audio] + #3 named refs).

## ¬ß468 ‚Äî 2026-06-18 ¬∑ kids WIDE fire (3 divergent laugh-first EMBODIED explorers on 3 different non-glass INPUTS ‚Äî camera-motion / device-shake / mic-breath; answers JURY 2026-06-17 #2 "the next off-glass swing should be embodied, not another glow-screen" + #5 "make a kid laugh ‚Äî the kids side has gone uniformly solemn" + #1 "groove/play, NOT a cadence/voice-leading") ‚Äî winner `719-kids-stomp-zoo`; **2 banked seeds**

Cycle 468 ran a kids **WIDE** fan-out. Research path (c): consumed the ¬ß466-banked stomp-zoo seed (born of RESEARCH ¬ß466's VTech-2026 "your-movement-is-the-controller" thesis); today's dive (RESEARCH ¬ß468) added the BodyBeats/Laban named ref + the Ghost-Arcade June-2026 finding. **Three embodied inputs by design** so the siblings don't collide: SEE (camera), SHAKE (devicemotion), BLOW (mic-breath). **Winner: `719-kids-stomp-zoo`** ‚Äî whole-body stomp parade; the directest answer to JURY #2 (most embodied/off-glass) + #5 (parade ripple, tuba BONK, freeze-dance). Both losers were demoable + self-reported clean tsc+eslint; the authoritative winner-only `npm run build` (exit 0, 506/506 static) is the gate; losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` then removed before it. **Max committed folder after this fire is `719`** (720/721 below are free to reuse as real numbers; renumber if consumed first). Resurrect by re-spawning the brief:

### `720-kids-shake-pop` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê RESURRECT FIRST (a genuinely fresh INPUT for the lab ‚Äî **device-SHAKE** via `accelerationIncludingGravity`, distinct from the lab's existing tilt/orientation pieces; a clean haptic/anticipation register). **Shake the iPad like a fizzy bottle: pressure builds (the googly bottle trembles, fills with bubbles, a bubbly-POP groove quickens + a rising whistle), then it ERUPTS ‚Äî a comic descending BLURP + confetti fountain + screen-shake ‚Äî and resets, ready again.** Built files (self-reported clean tsc+eslint; in `/tmp/dream-losers/`): `page.tsx` (devicemotion jerk-magnitude ‚Üí low-passed fizz-pressure accumulator 0‚Üí1 that leaks when idle; squash-stretch trembling bottle, blue‚Üíorange/pink color build; accelerating pitched-POP percussion + rising whistle; eruption on ~0.9 OR shake-stop = BLURP + Canvas2D confetti; always-on bubbly bed; **iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` in the Start gesture**; big tap-PUMP fallback + `text-rose-300` notice for no-sensor/denied; ghost auto-shaker on idle/load; safe chain `master(‚â§0.3)‚Üílowpass(6500)‚Üícomp(‚àí10/20:1)`; full teardown incl. listener removal). **Tags:** DeviceMotion SHAKE INPUT (embodied, off-glass) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬∑ shake-magnitude accumulator ‚Üí comic build-and-release + accelerating popping-groove TECH ¬∑ silly anticipation-JOKE + popping-groove VIBE. **Why it lost:** 719 is *more* embodied (whole room/body vs device-held) and the truer literal answer to JURY #2's named "embodied-spatial/installation" lane, and it's the standing RESURRECT-FIRST seed; 720 is very close behind and arguably carries a lab-first input. **Named refs:** Disney's *12 Principles of Animation* (Anticipation + Squash-and-Stretch) ¬∑ Toca Boca playful-physics. **Resurrect** as its own fire (verify the shake-input is a true lab-#1 via grep; if so it clears the floor at 3/5), or as the haptic/anticipation sibling of a "your body is the controller" kids suite. Honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [shake detector + pressure accumulator + popping scheduler/synth + Canvas2D eruption particles] + #3 named refs).

### `721-kids-blow-balloon` ‚Äî `queued` ("Blow the Balloon Buddy" ‚Äî warm breath-controlled toy). **Blow into the mic to inflate a wobbling googly balloon-buddy that HUMS a rising tone; stop and it either POPS with confetti (if huge) or lets out a long comic descending RASPBERRY; tap to add more bobbing colored balloons = a silly balloon band.** Built files (self-reported clean ‚Äî builder ran `npx tsc --noEmit` + `eslint` = 0 errors/0 warnings; in `/tmp/dream-losers/`): `page.tsx` (`getUserMedia({audio:true})` ‚Üí `AnalyserNode` RMS = blow-strength, **mic analysis-only, never routed to destination**; breath accumulates radius [capped] + spring/velocity wobble; hum = triangle through a rising lowpass [a swelling drone, NOT a melody]; raspberry = detuned saw+square through a 28‚Üí12 Hz LFO-wobbled lowpass, pitch sliding down; pop = sine boing + noise puff + confetti; always-on drone+breeze bed; press-&-HOLD fallback + `text-rose-300` notice for no-mic/denied; ghost auto-blower on idle/load; safe chain `master(‚â§0.3)‚Üílowpass(7000)‚Üícomp(‚àí10/20:1)`; full teardown incl. mic-track stop). **Tags:** mic BREATH/blow INPUT (embodied) ¬∑ Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬∑ mic-amplitude-envelope + breath-onset ‚Üí comic inflation synth + soft-body wobble physics TECH ¬∑ silly raspberry-balloon VIBE. **Why it lost:** lowest diversity of the three ‚Äî mic/breath input has the most lab precedent (`158-kids-hum-paint`‚ù§Ô∏è, `393`/`413` vowel-from-voice, `705-kids-silly-voice`, `609` blow-balloons), and Ocarina-style blow-to-play is the most *expected* of the three mechanics. **Named refs:** Smule *Ocarina* (2008) ¬∑ EWI breath-controller lineage. **Resurrect when** the kids side has been off mic-input for several cycles and wants a warm, gentle (vs. loud-stomp) toy ‚Äî the raspberry is its genuine laugh; deepen with balloon-animal shapes that change the timbre and a two-balloon "duet" that beats against itself. Honest 2/5 (#2 ‚â•4 subsystems [mic breath envelope + blow/release detector + comic inflation/raspberry synth + soft-body balloon physics] + #3 named refs).

## ¬ß466 ‚Äî 2026-06-18 ¬∑ kids WIDE fire (3 divergent laugh-first explorers on 3 different INPUTS √ó techniques √ó vibes; answers JURY 2026-06-17 #5 "make a kid laugh" + #1 "groove/play not cadence" + #2 "off the glass"; deliberately breaks the kids side's just-formed two-player-groove streak `702`/`711`) ‚Äî 2 banked seeds
