## ¬ß610 banked seed ‚Äî 2026-06-30 (cycle 610 ¬∑ ADULT ¬∑ PSYCHEDELIC ¬∑ DEEP ‚Äî 1 de-selected sibling, built complete by a parallel builder + scoped tsc/ESLint-clean, then `cp`'d to scratchpad `banked-610/` and `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; shipped `1067-boundless-breath` = the breath-played three.js star-vection + Shepard-Risset ascent, cashing the queued ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST)

DEEP fire whose ONE concept was **"breathe yourself into an endless rising/falling ascent where a Shepard‚ÄìRisset glissando + a congruent visual vection field make you feel you are physically moving through boundless space"** ‚Äî attacked via two substrates (a three.js star point-cloud vs a WebGL2 optical-flow tunnel). Shipped **`1067-boundless-breath`** (three.js, the literal ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST). The one below returned complete + scoped tsc/eslint-clean; backed up to scratchpad `banked-610/`, then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed) ‚Äî rebuild from this brief. Max committed folder after this fire = **1067**; resurrect under a fresh number ‚â•**1069** (1068 was its working number this fire but was removed ‚Äî renumber only if a later fire consumes it first).

### `1068-vection-well` ‚Äî `queued` (the same boundless-vection concept on a DIFFERENT substrate: a breath-played optical-flow streak tunnel)
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the COSMIC-AMBIENT ‚Üí NDE-tunnel pole; pick it when you want a *plunging/rising tunnel of light* whose motion (not a stretched field) is the vection cue, breath-steered. ‚öÝÔ∏è CAVEAT that de-selected it: it renders as a SINGLE full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader ‚Äî exactly the *form* JURY 2026-06-29 banned ("full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at"). Even though it is breath-PLAYED (which dodges the *passive* objection), the OUTPUT form is the banned one. Resurrect ONLY if you reframe it off "a shader you stare at" ‚Äî e.g. make the streaks a real GPU/instanced particle body with parallax depth, or add a foreground element you directly manipulate, so it isn't a flat fragment field.** *"Breathe a Shepard‚ÄìRisset glissando + a streaming tunnel of light so you feel you are falling/rising forever down a luminous well ‚Äî visual vection (motion-lines rushing past) made congruent with auditory vection."* `state: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí NDE tunnel-of-light ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (tips intense on deep exhale)`. **INPUT** active **breath** via mic RMS envelope as the steering signal (inhale = ascend/decelerate, exhale = plunge/accelerate); ~5.5/min sine LFO fallback when no mic. **OUTPUT** **WebGL2 raw GLSL** full-screen radial optical-flow streak tunnel (`render.ts`): full-screen triangle + a fragment shader with `NRINGS` depth-staggered streak shells; a JS-accumulated `uDepth` (so motion is breath-rate-controlled + continuous, not `uTime`-locked) advances the radial flow window; warm core bloom at the vanishing point, cool cyan streaks toward the rim, chromatic-offset depth, per-streak sub-1 Hz decorrelated twinkle (no strobe ‚Äî global luminance only drifts). **TECHNIQUE** Shepard‚ÄìRisset endless glissando (`shepard.ts`, 9 octave-spaced sine partials, Gaussian log-freq window, octave-wrapping transpose; exhale drives the transpose DOWN = descent, inhale slows/rises) + breath-RMS envelope + congruent radial visual vection. **AUDIO** (`audio.ts`) Shepard + JI drone (root + 3:2, detuned) + code-generated convolution reverb (decaying-noise IR, no fetch) ‚Üí breath-opened lowpass + reverb send ‚Üí `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Why it's promising:** the radial-expansion optic-flow is the strongest forward-self-motion cue, breath-steerable plunge‚Üîrise is visceral, and pairing it with the congruent Shepard descent directly exploits the auditory-vection finding (RESEARCH ¬ß610). **Why de-selected this cycle:** all cleared the floor, but 1067 is the literal ‚≠êRESURRECT-FIRST AND its three.js point-cloud is a genuine 3D body that **dodges the banned full-screen-fragment-shader form** 1068 sits in (real 3D optic-flow vection reads more honestly than a 2D shader fake), and brings the scarce three.js output back (Canvas2D was the 5√ó-in-10 banned output last cycle). **To resurrect:** reframe off the flat-shader form per the caveat, then verify the streak density/brightness + breath plunge‚Üîrise feel on a real GPU + mic. Named refs: Roger Shepard (1964); Jean-Claude Risset (continuous glissando); auditory-vection / postural-sway research on the Shepard‚ÄìRisset glissando (metaphorical self-motion); optic-flow self-motion / vection literature. (Full working build existed at `src/app/dream/1068-vection-well/` this cycle ‚Äî `page.tsx` + `render.ts` + `shepard.ts` + `audio.ts` + `breath.ts` + `readme.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to scratchpad `banked-610/1068-vection-well/`; rebuild from this spec.)

### `1070-deep-tremor` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê RESURRECT-FIRST for the DARK pole
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the DARK / NDE-void, dissociative pole, AND the lab's first HRTF-spatialised planetary instrument. Pick it when the pole has drifted bright/warm and you want a vast, sparse, slow void you float in ‚Äî it's the orthogonal-dark sibling to 1069's bright aurora. Also discharges the JURY 2026-06-30 #2 "spatial" want (0√ó in window) on top of real-world-data sonification.** *"What if every earthquake happening on Earth right now struck a resonant gong in a vast dark void around you?"* `state: ketamine/NDE-void ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient (dark)`. **INPUT** the **live USGS global earthquake GeoJSON feed** (`earthquake.usgs.gov/.../summary/all_hour.geojson`, falls back to `all_day.geojson` when the hour is quiet; no key, permissive CORS; client-side fetch with 4 s `AbortController` + mandatory Ring-of-Fire-weighted **synthetic** fallback so the void is never silent offline). On first load it gently *replays* the last hour's quakes spread over ~36 s so a glance populates audibly, then strikes only on new event ids; polls every 60 s. **OUTPUT** **three.js dark void** ‚Äî a faint wireframe/point GLOBE (FogExp2, star field) slowly auto-rotating; each quake spawns an expanding faint amber RING **at its true lat/lon on the globe surface** (parented to the rotating globe, so it rides the surface ‚Äî explicitly NOT a center-out bloom). **AUDIO** each quake = a modal bell (3‚Äì5 partials) + noise mallet ‚Üí exp envelope ‚Üí **depth-driven lowpass** (shallow = metallic, deep = muffled) ‚Üí an **HRTF `PannerNode`** (longitude ‚Üí azimuth, latitude ‚Üí elevation) ‚Üí `createVoidReverb` (~8 s cavernous tail); a very-low `startDroneBank` (root ~30 Hz, drive ~0.06) is the void's continuous presence; strikes throttled to ‚â§3 per 1.4 s so it stays sparse/meditative. **TECHNIQUE** real-seismic-data sonification + HRTF spatialisation + modal/FM strike synthesis. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 first seismic sonification + first HRTF planetary instrument in the lab (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (USGS fetch/parse + HRTF panner field + modal-strike synth + three.js globe + drone + reverb) ¬∑ #3 named ref. **Named refs:** Florian Dombois, *Auditory Seismology* (earthquake sonification); the data-driven seismic-sonification tradition. **Why de-selected this fire:** all three cleared the floor and dodged every ban, but 1069 has the clearest research‚Üíbuild chain (it implements ¬ß613 directly), lands the loved aurora-particle aesthetic, and is the *most* headless-verifiable (1070's signature HRTF spatialisation needs headphones to confirm ‚Äî its one device-only payoff). **To resurrect:** rebuild from the backup; verify the HRTF azimuth/elevation on headphones + the live USGS path on a networked device. (Files existed at `src/app/dream/1070-deep-tremor/`: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `data.ts` + `scene.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-613/1070-deep-tremor/`.)

### `1071-following-light` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê (the unclaimed JURY #5 live-performance category)
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî warm/LSD-drift pole, AND the lab's FIRST score-following / reactive-accompaniment piece (JURY 2026-06-30 #5: score-following is 0√ó in the window and the obvious unclaimed real-piano move). Pick it when you want the real piano to do something the 4√ó spectral-wallpaper uses never did ‚Äî be *listened and answered to*, not just visualised. Strongest resurrect path: drive it from a LIVE mic (a real player) rather than the fixed recording, which makes it a true live-performance instrument.** *"What if the lab stopped just visualising Karel's piano and instead followed it ‚Äî tracked onsets + tempo in real time and answered with a low-latency generative accompaniment, a duet WITH the recording?"* `state: LSD/psilocybin warm-drift ¬∑ pole: cosmic-ambient ‚Üí warm`. **INPUT** Karel's real recording via the proven `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` loader (a READ of an existing public GET ‚Äî no new route, no guard; 4 s abort; JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes; offline detuned-piano arpeggio fallback so the follower always runs) ‚Üí an `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048). **TECHNIQUE ‚Äî the score-follower (the heart):** per frame, **spectral-flux onset detection** (sum of positive bin-to-bin magnitude increases) with an **adaptive threshold + ~95 ms refractory**; a **median-IOI tempo/beat-phase tracker** (predicted next-beat time, continuous 0..1 phase, exposed BPM); a **dominant-FFT-peak pitch class**. **The accompaniment** answers each onset with a just-intonation pluck (fifth+third, an octave under the piano's pitch class) **scheduled to the predicted next beat** (anticipatory, not merely triggered), routed through `createVoidReverb`; onset density drives a warm `startDroneBank` bed + the visual energy; polyphony capped at 6 with cleanup. **OUTPUT** **three.js** two-point-family dialogue ‚Äî the PIANO's onsets pulse a warm amber family (left), the machine's ANSWERS pulse a complementary violet/rose family (right, beat-fraction later), with a beat-phase breathing dolly and a density-driven connective lattice ‚Äî so the call-and-response is *visible* (NOT Canvas2D, NOT a bloom). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 first score-following/onset-tracking reactive accompaniment in the lab (grep-0√ó, JURY #5) ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (audio decode + onset/tempo tracker + anticipatory accompaniment synth + three.js dialogue field) ¬∑ #3 named refs. **Named refs:** Roger Dannenberg (score-following, 1984); Arshia Cont, *Antescofo* (anticipatory score-following); Bello et al., *A Tutorial on Onset Detection* (spectral flux). **Why de-selected this fire:** it reuses the real piano (the jury flagged it as a 4√ó crutch ‚Äî score-following is the sanctioned-new use, so it's defensible, but it's the weakest diversity story of the three), and whether the follower *convincingly follows* is tuning-sensitive + unconfirmable headless (the onset-threshold/tempo constants weren't tuned against live audio). **To resurrect:** rebuild from backup; the highest-value upgrade is **swap the fixed recording for live mic input** so it becomes a true live-performance score-follower (active mic = the jury's wanted live-performance category, distinct from the banned *passive* mic); then tune the onset threshold + accompaniment latency against real playing. (Files existed at `src/app/dream/1071-following-light/`: `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `scene.ts` + `README.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-613/1071-following-light/`.)

### `1097-veil-listen` ‚Äî `queued` ‚≠ê **RESURRECT-FIRST (the cycle-2 graft)**
**For: adult psychedelic ‚Äî the eerie-liminal / hypnagogic / Ganzfeld pole. This is the VISUAL twin of the shipped `1096-noise-bloom`, and the cleanest cycle-2 story in the queue: MERGE its visual-Ganzfeld resolve onto 1096's audio SR core so the phantom is SEEN and HEARD emerging together at one shared resonance sweet-spot ‚Äî a single cross-modal stochastic-resonance instrument. Resurrect FIRST when the lane wants the eerie-liminal pole or a cross-modal deepening.** *"What if a presence hidden inside visual static only appeared when you added the RIGHT amount of noise ‚Äî and you tuned the noise until it resolved, hearing it coalesce as you see it?"* `state: Ganzfeld / hypnagogia / sensory-deprivation ¬∑ pole: eerie-liminal`. **INPUT** a noise-level dial (drag OR arrow-key). **OUTPUT** Canvas2D noise/Ganzfeld field (primary) + Web Audio coalescing chord. **TECHNIQUE ‚Äî stochastic resonance + Ganzfeld:** a faint, slowly-morphing symmetric mandala (`computeForm`: radial + petal sinusoids under a centred gaussian envelope) is buried at `BASE_CONTRAST 5` ‚Äî near-invisible ‚Äî in per-frame **xorshift value-noise** rendered on a **160px offscreen buffer and upscaled** (never full-res per-pixel work). `clarityFor(noise, sweetSpot)` is a Gaussian inverted-U on a drifting sweet-spot; at the sweet-spot the form's contrast is boosted (+64) to legibility while the real noise carries the texture ‚Äî the SR "resolve". Audio: band-passed noise ‚Üí a just-intonation chord (3‚Äì5 partials) coalesces OUT of the hiss in lockstep with clarity, dissolving back past the sweet-spot. **SAFETY (verified in design):** flicker-safe by construction ‚Äî the field mean is **pinned at 128** with zero-mean high-spatial-frequency noise, so there are NO full-screen luminance swings; the only slow change is the seconds-scale form drift + a static vignette. Idle 15s auto-sweep so a hands-free glance shows the presence arrive + dissolve. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 first stochastic-resonance/Ganzfeld VISUAL emergence in the lab (grep-0√ó) ¬∑ #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (value-noise field + hidden-form generator + SR compositor + coalescing-chord audio = 4) ¬∑ #3 named refs (Krauss et al. bioRxiv 2020 SR-model; Wolfgang Metzger ‚Äî Ganzfeld; Brion Gysin ‚Äî *Dreamachine*, form-from-emptiness; noise-enhanced visual perception, arXiv:1008.0230). **Why de-selected this fire:** both cleared the floor + dodged every ban; 1096 won on research fidelity (SR is literally the model of *auditory* perception, so the auditory version IS the cited mechanism), musician-surprise ("noise lets you hear the music"), fresher audio-first output, and replay life. **To resurrect / graft:** rebuild from backup, then either (a) ship standalone for the eerie-liminal pole, or (b) **the preferred move** ‚Äî graft the `FieldEngine` visual resolve onto 1096 so one noise dial drives both the audible melody-bloom AND the visible presence-resolve at the same sweet-spot. Files were `page.tsx` + `audio.ts` + `field.ts` + `README.md`; backed up to `/tmp/dream-losers-629/1097-veil-listen/`.

### ‚≠ê TOP resurrect ‚Äî `1137-theta-cathedral` ‚Äî the same theta‚Äìgamma engine as a boundless **true-3D three.js nebula you fall through** (active pointer-look INPUT ¬∑ true-3D three.js OUTPUT ¬∑ cosmic-ambient pole ¬∑ electric-teal‚Üídeep-indigo‚Üíviolet) ‚Äî `queued`
- **The question:** what if the cortex's ~5 Hz theta breath (with ~40 Hz gamma nested at each peak) became a vast 3D space you drift *inside* rather than a flat field you watch? ~6000 custom-shader points recycled along depth for an **endless descent**; teal‚Üíindigo‚Üíviolet by radius; the gamma envelope swells each point's *size* on the theta clock (coupling as spatial sparkle); brightness gated by a `uLum` **SafeFlicker** uniform with a floor. Audio = the well's **energy eigenspectrum** (QHO = evenly-spaced partials; box = n¬≤): a drone tracks ‚ü®E‚ü©, shimmer detune tracks spread Œîx (a real Œîx¬∑Œîp feel), each collapse rings the nearest eigenmode. - **`1144-two-slit`** ‚Äî the most *cerebral / pedagogical-yet-trippy* of the three: **wave‚Äìparticle duality as a playable knob**. Particles fire one at a time and pile up **dot-by-dot into interference fringes** (the Tonomura single-particle-buildup result) on a WebGL2 ping-pong accumulation buffer styled as a cyan/green **phosphor detector screen**. **Drag** sets slit separation d (‚Üê‚Üí) and wavelength Œª (‚Üë‚Üì) ‚Üí fringe spacing morphs (‚àù Œª/d) ‚Üí the standing chord's harmonic spacing shifts. A **which-path knob** continuously **decoheres** via the real **Englert‚ÄìGreenberger‚ÄìYasin** complementarity relation (V¬≤+D¬≤‚â§1): 0 = bright even fringes + consonant harmonic chord; 1 = two single-slit blobs + a detuned noisy cluster (**decoherence-as-dissonance**); partial = interpolated fringe visibility. Ships with a unit-tested (5/5 Vitest) pure-physics kernel `interference.ts`. Named refs: Young's double-slit, Tonomura buildup, EGY relation, decoherence. **Why bank not ship:** the phosphor-screen/physics-demo aesthetic is the least *transporting* of the three (reads cerebral, not cosmic) ‚Äî but it's the best "quantum pedagogy as instrument" bank and the which-path‚Üídissonance mapping is a genuinely fresh audio idea. **Resurrect when:** a cerebral/Ikeda-adjacent or explicitly-pedagogical lane is due.
